<script>
    // Tooltip functionality for rejection reasons
    (function() {
        let activeTooltip = null;
        
        document.querySelectorAll('.rejection-tooltip').forEach(tooltip => {
            tooltip.addEventListener('mouseenter', function(e) {
                const reason = this.getAttribute('data-reason');
                if (!reason) return;
                
                // Remove any existing tooltip
                if (activeTooltip) activeTooltip.remove();
                
                // Create tooltip
                const tooltipDiv = document.createElement('div');
                tooltipDiv.className = 'rejection-custom-tooltip';
                tooltipDiv.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="tooltip-arrow"></div>
                    <div class="tooltip-content">${escapeHtml(reason)}</div>
                `;
                
                // Style the tooltip
                tooltipDiv.style.position = 'fixed';
                tooltipDiv.style.backgroundColor = '#1f2937';
                tooltipDiv.style.color = 'white';
                tooltipDiv.style.borderRadius = '0.5rem';
                tooltipDiv.style.fontSize = '0.75rem';
                tooltipDiv.style.maxWidth = '350px';
                tooltipDiv.style.zIndex = '10000';
                tooltipDiv.style.boxShadow = '0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)';
                tooltipDiv.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
                
                const rect = this.getBoundingClientRect();
                tooltipDiv.style.bottom = (window.innerHeight - rect.top + 8) + 'px';
                tooltipDiv.style.left = rect.left + 'px';
                
                document.body.appendChild(tooltipDiv);
                activeTooltip = tooltipDiv;
            });
            
            tooltip.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
                if (activeTooltip) {
                    activeTooltip.remove();
                    activeTooltip = null;
                }
            });
        });
        
        // Helper function to escape HTML
        function escapeHtml(text) {
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.textContent = text;
            return div.innerHTML;
        }
        
        // Close tooltip on scroll
        window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
            if (activeTooltip) {
                activeTooltip.remove();
                activeTooltip = null;
            }
        });
    })();
</script>

<style>
    /* Additional styles for custom tooltip */
    .rejection-custom-tooltip {
        position: fixed;
        background-color: #1f2937;
        color: white;
        border-radius: 0.5rem;
        font-size: 0.75rem;
        max-width: 350px;
        z-index: 10000;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        pointer-events: none;
    }
    
    .rejection-custom-tooltip .tooltip-content {
        padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
        word-wrap: break-word;
        line-height: 1.4;
    }
    
    .rejection-custom-tooltip .tooltip-arrow {
        position: absolute;
        bottom: -6px;
        left: 12px;
        width: 12px;
        height: 6px;
        background-color: #1f2937;
        clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 50% 100%);
    }
</style>

--- Views\Admin\SellerApprovals.cshtml ---
﻿<!-- Views/Admin/SellerApprovals.cshtml -->
@model IReadOnlyList<ThriftLoop.Models.SellerProfile>
@using ThriftLoop.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Seller Approvals";
    Layout = "~/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml";
    var statusFilter = Context.Request.Query["status"].ToString();
}

@section Styles {
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Admin.css" asp-append-version="true" />
}

<div class="admin-dashboard">
    <div class="admin-header">
        <div>
            <p class="admin-header__eyebrow">Commerce</p>
            <h1>Seller Approvals</h1>
            <p>Review and process seller applications</p>
        </div>
        <div class="admin-header__actions">
            <span class="stat-badge" style="background: #f3f4f6; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #374151;">@Model.Count() applications</span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Status Filters -->
    <div class="recent-card" style="margin-bottom: 24px;">
        <div class="recent-card__header">
            <h2>Filter by Status</h2>
        </div>
        <div style="padding: 20px; display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
            <a asp-action="SellerApprovals" asp-route-status="" 
               style="padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; @(string.IsNullOrEmpty(statusFilter) ? "background: #2d1b69; color: white;" : "background: #f3f4f6; color: #374151;")">All</a>
            <a asp-action="SellerApprovals" asp-route-status="Pending" 
               style="padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; @(statusFilter == "Pending" ? "background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e;" : "background: #f3f4f6; color: #374151;")">Pending</a>
            <a asp-action="SellerApprovals" asp-route-status="Approved" 
               style="padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; @(statusFilter == "Approved" ? "background: #ecfdf5; color: #065f46;" : "background: #f3f4f6; color: #374151;")">Approved</a>
            <a asp-action="SellerApprovals" asp-route-status="Rejected" 
               style="padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; @(statusFilter == "Rejected" ? "background: #fef2f2; color: #991b1b;" : "background: #f3f4f6; color: #374151;")">Rejected</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Applications Table -->
    <div class="recent-card">
        <div class="recent-card__header">
            <h2>All Applications</h2>
        </div>
        <table class="recent-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>ID</th>
                    <th>User</th>
                    <th>Shop Name</th>
                    <th>Bio</th>
                    <th>Applied</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Actions</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                @foreach (var app in Model)
                {
                    <tr>
                        <td><span style="color: #9ca3af; font-size: 0.9rem;">#@app.Id</span></td>
                        <td style="font-weight: 500;">@app.User?.Email</td>
                        <td style="font-weight: 600; color: #111827;">@app.ShopName</td>
                        <td style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.9rem; max-width: 200px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;">@(app.Bio ?? "—")</td>
                        <td style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.9rem;">@app.AppliedAt.ToString("MMM d, yyyy")</td>
                        <td>
                            <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
                                @(app.ApplicationStatus == ApplicationStatus.Pending ? "background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e;" : 
                                  app.ApplicationStatus == ApplicationStatus.Approved ? "background: #ecfdf5; color: #065f46;" : 
                                  "background: #fef2f2; color: #991b1b;")">
                                <span style="width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: 
                                    @(app.ApplicationStatus == ApplicationStatus.Pending ? "#f59e0b" : 
                                      app.ApplicationStatus == ApplicationStatus.Approved ? "#10b981" : "#ef4444");"></span>
                                @app.ApplicationStatus
                            </span>
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            @if (app.ApplicationStatus == ApplicationStatus.Pending)
                            {
                                <div style="display: flex; gap: 8px;">
                                    <form method="post" asp-action="ApproveSeller" class="inline-form" style="display: flex;">
                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                        <input type="hidden" name="applicationId" value="@app.Id" />
                                        <button type="submit" onclick="return confirm('Approve @app.ShopName?')"
                                                style="padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; background: #ecfdf5; color: #065f46;"
                                                onmouseover="this.style.opacity='0.8'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">Approve</button>
                                    </form>
                                    <form method="post" asp-action="RejectSeller" class="inline-form" style="display: flex;">
                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                        <input type="hidden" name="applicationId" value="@app.Id" />
                                        <button type="submit" onclick="return confirm('Reject @app.ShopName?')"
                                                style="padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; background: #fef2f2; color: #dc2626;"
                                                onmouseover="this.style.opacity='0.8'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">Reject</button>
                                    </form>
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <span style="color: #9ca3af; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500;">
                                    @(app.ApplicationStatus == ApplicationStatus.Approved ? "✓ Approved" : "✕ Rejected")
                                </span>
                            }
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                }
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>

    @if (!Model.Any())
    {
        <div class="recent-card" style="text-align: center; padding: 60px;">
            <p style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 1rem;">No seller applications found.</p>
        </div>
    }
</div>

--- Views\Admin\TopUpRequests.cshtml ---
@model ThriftLoop.ViewModels.Admin.TopUpReviewViewModel
@using ThriftLoop.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Top-Up Requests Review";
    Layout = "~/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml";
    const decimal priorityThreshold = 300m;
}

<div class="admin-topup-shell">
    <nav class="detail-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">
        <a asp-action="Index" asp-controller="Admin" class="detail-breadcrumb__link">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8">
                <path d="M12.5 5L7.5 10L12.5 15" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
            </svg>
            Back to Admin Dashboard
        </a>
    </nav>

    <div class="admin-topup-header">
        <div>
            <h1 class="admin-topup__title">Top-Up Requests Review</h1>
            <p class="admin-topup__subtitle">
                Review and approve GCash top-up requests.
                <span class="admin-priority-note">
                    ⚡ Transactions above ₱@(priorityThreshold.ToString("N0")) require manual approval.
                </span>
            </p>
        </div>
        <div class="admin-topup-stats">
            <div class="admin-stat-pill admin-stat-pill--pending">
                <span class="admin-stat__number">@Model.PendingCount</span>
                <span class="admin-stat__label">Pending</span>
            </div>
            <div class="admin-stat-pill admin-stat-pill--review">
                <span class="admin-stat__number">@Model.NeedsReviewCount</span>
                <span class="admin-stat__label">Needs Review</span>
            </div>
            @if (Model.AutoApprovedPendingReviewCount > 0)
            {
                <div class="admin-stat-pill admin-stat-pill--auto">
                    <span class="admin-stat__number">@Model.AutoApprovedPendingReviewCount</span>
                    <span class="admin-stat__label">Auto-Approved</span>
                </div>
            }
            @if (Model.HighValuePendingCount > 0)
            {
                <div class="admin-stat-pill admin-stat-pill--priority">
                    <span class="admin-stat__number">@Model.HighValuePendingCount</span>
                    <span class="admin-stat__label">High Value (>₱@(priorityThreshold.ToString("N0")))</span>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] is string successMsg)
    {
        <div class="admin-alert admin-alert--success" role="alert">@successMsg</div>
    }
    @if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] is string errorMsg)
    {
        <div class="admin-alert admin-alert--error" role="alert">@errorMsg</div>
    }

    <div class="admin-topup-filters">
        <span class="admin-filter-label">Filter:</span>
        <a asp-action="TopUpRequests" class="admin-filter-btn @(Model.CurrentFilter == null ? "admin-filter-btn--active" : "")">All Active</a>
        <a asp-action="TopUpRequests" asp-route-status="@TopUpStatus.Pending" class="admin-filter-btn @(Model.CurrentFilter == TopUpStatus.Pending ? "admin-filter-btn--active" : "")">Pending</a>
        <a asp-action="TopUpRequests" asp-route-status="@TopUpStatus.NeedsReview" class="admin-filter-btn @(Model.CurrentFilter == TopUpStatus.NeedsReview ? "admin-filter-btn--active" : "")">Needs Review</a>
        <a asp-action="TopUpRequests" asp-route-status="@TopUpStatus.Approved" class="admin-filter-btn @(Model.CurrentFilter == TopUpStatus.Approved ? "admin-filter-btn--active" : "")">Approved</a>
        <a asp-action="TopUpRequests" asp-route-status="@TopUpStatus.Rejected" class="admin-filter-btn @(Model.CurrentFilter == TopUpStatus.Rejected ? "admin-filter-btn--active" : "")">Rejected</a>
        <a asp-action="TopUpRequests" asp-route-status="@TopUpStatus.Voided" class="admin-filter-btn @(Model.CurrentFilter == TopUpStatus.Voided ? "admin-filter-btn--active" : "")">Voided</a>
    </div>

    @if (Model.Requests.Count == 0)
    {
        <div class="admin-topup-empty">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" width="48" height="48">
                <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/>
                <path d="M12 6v6l4 2"/>
            </svg>
            <p>No top-up requests found.</p>
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="admin-topup-table-wrapper">
            <table class="admin-topup-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th style="width: 30px;"></th>
                        <th>ID</th>
                        <th>User</th>
                        <th>Reference #</th>
                        <th>Amount</th>
                        <th>Account Match</th>
                        <th>Status</th>
                        <th>Submitted</th>
                        <th>Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var request in Model.Requests)
                    {
                        var isHighValue = request.Amount > priorityThreshold;
                        var isPriority = (request.Status == TopUpStatus.Pending || request.Status == TopUpStatus.NeedsReview) && isHighValue;
                        var isAutoApproved = request.Status == TopUpStatus.Approved && request.IsAutoApproved;
                        var needsReview = request.NeedsAdminReview;
                        var rowClass = isPriority ? "admin-topup-row--priority" : (isAutoApproved && needsReview ? "admin-topup-row--auto" : "");

                        <tr class="admin-topup-row admin-topup-row--@request.Status.ToString().ToLower() @rowClass">
                            <td class="admin-topup-priority-cell">
                                @if (isPriority)
                                {
                                    <span class="priority-indicator" title="High value - requires priority review">⚡</span>
                                }
                                else if (isAutoApproved && needsReview)
                                {
                                    <span class="auto-indicator" title="Auto-approved - pending review">✓</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td data-label="ID">#@request.Id</td>
                            <td data-label="User">@(request.User?.Email ?? "Unknown")</td>
                            <td data-label="Reference #"><code>@request.ReferenceNumber</code></td>
                            <td data-label="Amount" class="admin-topup-amount @(isHighValue ? "admin-topup-amount--high" : "")">
                                ₱@request.Amount.ToString("N2")
                                @if (isHighValue)
                                {
                                    <span class="high-value-badge">High Value</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td data-label="Account Match">
                                @if (request.AccountNumberMatched.HasValue)
                                {
                                    if (request.AccountNumberMatched.Value)
                                    {
                                        <span class="account-match account-match--yes">✓ Match</span>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span class="account-match account-match--no" title="Receipt account number does not match expected GCash number">✗ Mismatch</span>
                                    }
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="account-match account-match--unknown">—</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td data-label="Status">
                                <span class="admin-status-badge admin-status-badge--@request.Status.ToString().ToLower()">
                                    @if (isAutoApproved)
                                    {
                                        <text>Auto-Approved</text>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        @request.Status
                                    }
                                    @if (request.IsAutoApproved)
                                    {
                                        <span class="admin-status-note">(auto)</span>
                                    }
                                </span>
                                @if (request.NeedsAdminReview)
                                {
                                    <span class="admin-review-flag" title="Needs admin review">🔍 Review</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td data-label="Submitted">@request.CreatedAt.ToString("MMM dd, HH:mm")</td>
                            <td data-label="Actions">
                                <div class="admin-topup-actions">
                                    @if (request.ScreenshotPath != null)
                                    {
                                        <a href="@request.ScreenshotPath" target="_blank" class="admin-action-btn admin-action-btn--view">
                                            View Receipt
                                        </a>
                                    }

                                    @if (request.Status == TopUpStatus.Pending || request.Status == TopUpStatus.NeedsReview)
                                    {
                                        if (request.Amount > 0)
                                        {
                                            <form asp-action="ApproveTopUpRequest" method="post" class="admin-action-form">
                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                                <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@request.Id" />
                                                <button type="submit" class="admin-action-btn admin-action-btn--approve"
                                                        onclick="return confirm('Approve top-up of ₱@request.Amount.ToString("N2") for @(request.User?.Email)?')">
                                                    Approve
                                                </button>
                                            </form>
                                        }

                                        <button type="button" class="admin-action-btn admin-action-btn--review"
                                                onclick="openReviewModal(@request.Id, '@request.ScreenshotPath?.Replace("\\", "\\\\")', @request.Amount, '@request.ReferenceNumber')">
                                            Review & Approve
                                        </button>

                                        <button type="button" class="admin-action-btn admin-action-btn--void"
                                                onclick="openVoidModal(@request.Id, @request.Amount, '@(request.User?.Email)', false)">
                                            Void
                                        </button>
                                    }

                                    @if (isAutoApproved && request.NeedsAdminReview)
                                    {
                                        <form asp-action="MarkTopUpAsReviewed" method="post" class="admin-action-form">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@request.Id" />
                                            <button type="submit" class="admin-action-btn admin-action-btn--confirm"
                                                    onclick="return confirm('Mark this transaction as reviewed?')">
                                                ✓ Mark Reviewed
                                            </button>
                                        </form>

                                        <button type="button" class="admin-action-btn admin-action-btn--void"
                                                onclick="openVoidModal(@request.Id, @request.Amount, '@(request.User?.Email)', true)">
                                            Void
                                        </button>
                                    }

                                    @if (request.Status == TopUpStatus.Approved && !request.NeedsAdminReview)
                                    {
                                        <span class="admin-action-status">✓ Reviewed</span>
                                    }

                                    @if (request.Status == TopUpStatus.Voided && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(request.VoidReason))
                                    {
                                        <span class="admin-void-reason" title="@request.VoidReason">
                                            Voided: @request.VoidReason.Substring(0, Math.Min(30, request.VoidReason.Length))@(request.VoidReason.Length > 30 ? "..." : "")
                                        </span>
                                    }
                                    else if (request.Status == TopUpStatus.Rejected && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(request.RejectionReason))
                                    {
                                        <span class="admin-rejection-reason" title="@request.RejectionReason">
                                            Rejected: @request.RejectionReason.Substring(0, Math.Min(30, request.RejectionReason.Length))@(request.RejectionReason.Length > 30 ? "..." : "")
                                        </span>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>

        @if (Model.TotalPages > 1)
        {
            <div class="admin-topup-pagination">
                @if (Model.HasPreviousPage)
                {
                    <a asp-action="TopUpRequests" asp-route-page="@(Model.CurrentPage - 1)" asp-route-status="@Model.CurrentFilter" class="admin-pagination-btn">← Previous</a>
                }

                <span class="admin-pagination-info">Page @Model.CurrentPage of @Model.TotalPages</span>

                @if (Model.HasNextPage)
                {
                    <a asp-action="TopUpRequests" asp-route-page="@(Model.CurrentPage + 1)" asp-route-status="@Model.CurrentFilter" class="admin-pagination-btn">Next →</a>
                }
            </div>
        }
    }
</div>

@* ── Review Modal ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── *@
<div id="reviewModal" class="admin-modal" style="display: none;">
    <div class="admin-modal__overlay" onclick="closeReviewModal()"></div>
    <div class="admin-modal__content">
        <div class="admin-modal__header">
            <h3>Review Top-Up Request</h3>
            <button type="button" class="admin-modal__close" onclick="closeReviewModal()">&times;</button>
        </div>

        <div class="admin-modal__body">
            <div class="admin-modal__receipt">
                <img id="modalReceiptImage" src="" alt="GCash Receipt" />
                <div id="ocrScanning" class="admin-ocr-status">
                    <span class="admin-ocr-spinner"></span>
                    <span>Scanning receipt for amount and reference number...</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <form id="reviewForm" asp-action="ReviewAndApproveTopUp" method="post" class="admin-review-form">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <input type="hidden" id="modalRequestId" name="id" />

                <div class="admin-form-group">
                    <label for="modalAmount">Amount (₱)</label>
                    <input type="number" id="modalAmount" name="amount" step="0.01" min="1" required class="admin-form-input" />
                    <span class="admin-form-hint">Extracted from receipt. Edit if needed.</span>
                </div>

                <div class="admin-form-group">

                    <button type="button" class="admin-btn admin-btn--secondary" onclick="closeReviewModal()">Cancel</button>
                    <button type="submit" class="admin-btn admin-btn--approve">Approve Top-Up</button>
                </div>

</div>

        <div class="admin-modal__body">
            <div class="admin-void-info" id="voidInfo"></div>

            <form id="voidForm" asp-action="VoidTopUpRequest" method="post">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <input type="hidden" id="voidRequestId" name="id" />

                <div class="admin-form-group">
                    <label for="voidReasonSelect">Reason for voiding</label>
                    <select id="voidReasonSelect" class="admin-form-input" onchange="updateVoidReason()">
                        <option value="">Select a reason...</option>
                        <option value="Duplicate transaction - receipt already used">Duplicate transaction</option>
                        <option value="Invalid reference number">Invalid reference number</option>
                        <option value="Receipt illegible or unreadable">Receipt illegible</option>
                        <option value="Amount does not match receipt">Amount mismatch</option>
                        <option value="GCash account number mismatch">Account number mismatch</option>
                        <option value="Suspected fraudulent transaction">Suspected fraud</option>
                        <option value="Other">Other (specify below)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <div class="admin-form-group">
                    <label for="voidReasonText">Additional details (required)</label>
                    <textarea id="voidReasonText" name="reason" class="admin-form-input" rows="3" required
                              placeholder="Provide details about why this transaction is being voided..."></textarea>
                    <span class="admin-form-hint">This reason will be recorded in the system.</span>
                </div>

                <div class="admin-void-warning" id="voidWarning"></div>

                <div class="admin-modal__actions">
                    <button type="button" class="admin-btn admin-btn--secondary" onclick="closeVoidModal()">Cancel</button>
                    <button type="submit" class="admin-btn admin-btn--danger">Confirm Void</button>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        const PRIORITY_THRESHOLD = @priorityThreshold;
        let currentVoidRequestId = 0;
        let currentVoidAmount = 0;
        let currentVoidIsAutoApproved = false;

        function openReviewModal(id, screenshotPath, currentAmount, currentRef) {
            document.getElementById('modalRequestId').value = id;
            document.getElementById('modalReceiptImage').src = screenshotPath || '';
            document.getElementById('modalAmount').value = currentAmount > 0 ? currentAmount : '';
            document.getElementById('modalReference').value = currentRef && currentRef !== 'MANUAL-REVIEW' ? currentRef : '';

            document.getElementById('reviewModal').style.display = 'block';
            document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';

            var ocrDiv = document.getElementById('ocrScanning');
            if (currentAmount === 0 || currentRef === 'MANUAL-REVIEW') {
                ocrDiv.style.display = 'flex';
                setTimeout(function() {
                    ocrDiv.style.display = 'none';
                    if (!document.getElementById('modalAmount').value) {
                        document.getElementById('modalAmount').placeholder = 'Could not detect - enter manually';
                    }
                    if (!document.getElementById('modalReference').value) {
                        document.getElementById('modalReference').placeholder = 'Could not detect - enter manually';
                    }
                }, 1500);
            } else {
                ocrDiv.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

        function closeReviewModal() {
            document.getElementById('reviewModal').style.display = 'none';
            document.body.style.overflow = '';
        }

        function openVoidModal(id, amount, userEmail, isAutoApproved) {
            currentVoidRequestId = id;
            currentVoidAmount = amount;
            currentVoidIsAutoApproved = isAutoApproved;

            const isHighValue = amount > PRIORITY_THRESHOLD;
            const infoDiv = document.getElementById('voidInfo');
            const warningDiv = document.getElementById('voidWarning');

            let autoWarning = '';
            if (isAutoApproved) {
                autoWarning = '<br><span style="color: #dc2626; font-weight: 600;">⚠️ AUTO-APPROVED: Voiding will DEDUCT ₱' +
                    amount.toLocaleString('en-PH', {minimumFractionDigits: 2}) +
                    ' from user\'s wallet!</span>';
            }

            infoDiv.innerHTML = `
                <strong>Request #${id}</strong><br>
                User: ${userEmail || 'Unknown'}<br>
                Amount: ₱${amount.toLocaleString('en-PH', {minimumFractionDigits: 2})}
                ${isHighValue ? '<br><span style="color: #dc2626;">⚠️ High-value transaction</span>' : ''}
                ${autoWarning}
            `;

            if (isAutoApproved) {
                warningDiv.innerHTML = `
                    <strong>⚠️ AUTO-APPROVED TRANSACTION - VOID WILL DEDUCT FUNDS</strong><br>
                    This transaction was auto-approved and funds were already credited to the user's wallet.
                    Voiding will deduct ₱${amount.toLocaleString('en-PH', {minimumFractionDigits: 2})} from their balance.
                    Please ensure this is legitimate before proceeding.
                `;
            } else if (isHighValue) {
                warningDiv.innerHTML = `
                    <strong>⚠️ High-Value Transaction</strong><br>
                    Please ensure you've verified all details before voiding.
                `;
            } else {
                warningDiv.innerHTML = `
                    <strong>Note:</strong> Please provide a clear reason for voiding this transaction.
                `;
            }

            document.getElementById('voidRequestId').value = id;
            document.getElementById('voidReasonSelect').value = '';
            document.getElementById('voidReasonText').value = '';
            document.getElementById('voidModal').style.display = 'block';
            document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
        }

        function closeVoidModal() {
            document.getElementById('voidModal').style.display = 'none';
            document.body.style.overflow = '';
        }

        function updateVoidReason() {
            const select = document.getElementById('voidReasonSelect');
            const textarea = document.getElementById('voidReasonText');
            const selectedReason = select.value;

            if (selectedReason && selectedReason !== 'Other') {
                textarea.value = selectedReason;
            } else if (selectedReason === 'Other') {
                textarea.value = '';
                textarea.focus();
            }
        }

        // Close modals on Escape key
        document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                closeReviewModal();
                closeVoidModal();
            }
        });

        // Close modals when clicking outside content
        document.querySelectorAll('.admin-modal__overlay').forEach(overlay => {
            overlay.addEventListener('click', function() {
                closeReviewModal();
                closeVoidModal();
            });
        });
    </script>
}

@model ThriftLoop.ViewModels.Admin.UserManagementViewModel
@using ThriftLoop.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "User Management";
    Layout = "~/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml";
}

@section Styles {
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Admin.css" asp-append-version="true" />
}

<div class="admin-dashboard">
    <div class="admin-header">
        <div>
            <p class="admin-header__eyebrow">User Directory</p>
            <h1>User Management</h1>
            <p>Manage user accounts, roles, and status</p>
        </div>
        <div class="admin-header__actions">
            <span class="stat-badge" style="background: #f3f4f6; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #374151;">@Model.TotalCount total users</span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Filters Card -->
    <div class="recent-card" style="margin-bottom: 24px;">
        <div class="recent-card__header">
            <h2>Filters</h2>
        </div>
        <form method="get" asp-action="Users" style="padding: 20px; display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap;">
            <input type="text" name="search" placeholder="Search by email..." value="@Model.SearchTerm" style="flex: 1; min-width: 200px; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid #e2ddd6; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.9rem;" />
            <select name="role" style="padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid #e2ddd6; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.9rem; background: white;">
                <option value="">All Roles</option>
                @foreach (var role in ThriftLoop.ViewModels.Admin.UserManagementViewModel.RoleFilters.Where(r => r != "All"))
                {
                    <option value="@role" selected="@(Model.RoleFilter == role)">@role</option>
                }
            </select>
            <button type="submit" class="admin-header__btn admin-header__btn--primary" style="border: none; cursor: pointer;">Filter</button>
            <a asp-action="Users" class="admin-header__btn admin-header__btn--ghost">Clear</a>
        </form>
    </div>

    <!-- Users Table -->
    <div class="recent-card">
        <div class="recent-card__header">
            <h2>All Users</h2>
        </div>
        <table class="recent-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>ID</th>
                    <th>Email</th>
                    <th>Role</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Joined</th>
                    <th>Actions</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                @foreach (var user in Model.Users)
                {
                    <tr>
                        <td><span style="color: #9ca3af; font-size: 0.9rem;">#@user.Id</span></td>
                        <td style="font-weight: 500;">@user.Email</td>
                        <td>
                            <form method="post" asp-action="UpdateUserRole" class="inline-form" style="display: flex;">
                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                <input type="hidden" name="userId" value="@user.Id" />
                                <select name="newRole" onchange="this.form.submit()" style="padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid #e2ddd6; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.85rem; background: white; cursor: pointer;">
                                    @foreach (UserRole role in Enum.GetValues(typeof(UserRole)))
                                    {
                                        if (role == UserRole.Rider) continue;
                                        <option value="@role" selected="@(user.Role == role)">@role</option>
                                    }
                                </select>
                            </form>
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; background: @(user.IsDisabled ? "#fef2f2" : "#ecfdf5"); color: @(user.IsDisabled ? "#dc2626" : "#059669");">
                                <span style="width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: @(user.IsDisabled ? "#ef4444" : "#10b981");"></span>
                                @(user.IsDisabled ? "Disabled" : "Active")
                            </span>
                        </td>
                        <td style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.9rem;">@user.CreatedAt.ToString("MMM d, yyyy")</td>
                        <td>
                            <form method="post" asp-action="ToggleUserStatus" class="inline-form">
                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                <input type="hidden" name="userId" value="@user.Id" />
                                <input type="hidden" name="isDisabled" value="@(!user.IsDisabled)" />
                                <button type="submit" 
                                        onclick="return confirm('@(user.IsDisabled ? "Enable" : "Disable") user @user.Email?')"
                                        style="padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; background: @(user.IsDisabled ? "#ecfdf5" : "#fef2f2"); color: @(user.IsDisabled ? "#059669" : "#dc2626");"
                                        onmouseover="this.style.opacity='0.8'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">
                                    @(user.IsDisabled ? "Enable" : "Disable")
                                </button>
                            </form>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                }
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>

    <!-- Pagination -->
    @if (Model.TotalPages > 1)
    {
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; margin-top: 24px; padding: 16px;">
            @if (Model.HasPreviousPage)
            {
                <a asp-action="Users" asp-route-page="@(Model.CurrentPage - 1)" asp-route-search="@Model.SearchTerm" asp-route-role="@Model.RoleFilter" 
                   class="admin-header__btn admin-header__btn--ghost" style="text-decoration: none;">← Previous</a>
            }
            <span style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.9rem;">Page <strong style="color: #111827;">@Model.CurrentPage</strong> of <strong style="color: #111827;">@Model.TotalPages</strong></span>
            @if (Model.HasNextPage)
            {
                <a asp-action="Users" asp-route-page="@(Model.CurrentPage + 1)" asp-route-search="@Model.SearchTerm" asp-route-role="@Model.RoleFilter" 
                   class="admin-header__btn admin-header__btn--primary" style="text-decoration: none;">Next →</a>
            }
        </div>
    }
</div>

@model IReadOnlyList<ThriftLoop.Models.Withdrawal>
@using ThriftLoop.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Withdrawal Management";
    Layout = "~/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml";
    var statusFilter = Context.Request.Query["status"].ToString();
}

@section Styles {
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Admin.css" asp-append-version="true" />
}

<div class="admin-dashboard">
    <div class="admin-header">
        <div>
            <p class="admin-header__eyebrow">Payments</p>
            <h1>Withdrawal Management</h1>
            <p>Process and track seller withdrawal requests</p>
        </div>
        <div class="admin-header__actions">
            <span class="stat-badge" style="background: #f3f4f6; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #374151;">@Model.Count() withdrawals</span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Status Filters -->
    <div class="recent-card" style="margin-bottom: 24px;">
        <div class="recent-card__header">
            <h2>Filter by Status</h2>
        </div>
        <div style="padding: 20px; display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
            <a asp-action="Withdrawals" asp-route-status="" 
               style="padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; @(string.IsNullOrEmpty(statusFilter) ? "background: #2d1b69; color: white;" : "background: #f3f4f6; color: #374151;")">All</a>
            <a asp-action="Withdrawals" asp-route-status="Requested" 
               style="padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; @(statusFilter == "Requested" ? "background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e;" : "background: #f3f4f6; color: #374151;")">Requested</a>
            <a asp-action="Withdrawals" asp-route-status="Processed" 
               style="padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; @(statusFilter == "Processed" ? "background: #dbeafe; color: #1e40af;" : "background: #f3f4f6; color: #374151;")">Processed</a>
            <a asp-action="Withdrawals" asp-route-status="Completed" 
               style="padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; @(statusFilter == "Completed" ? "background: #ecfdf5; color: #065f46;" : "background: #f3f4f6; color: #374151;")">Completed</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Withdrawals Table -->
    <div class="recent-card">

        </div>

            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>ID</th>
                    <th>User</th>
                    <th>Amount</th>
                    <th>Method</th>
                    <th>Reference</th>
                    <th>Requested</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Actions</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                @foreach (var wd in Model)
                {
                    <tr>
                        <td><span style="color: #9ca3af; font-size: 0.9rem;">#@wd.Id</span></td>
                        <td style="font-weight: 500;">@wd.User?.Email</td>

                        <td style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.9rem;">@(wd.Method == WithdrawalMethod.BankTransfer ? "Bank Transfer" : "Pickup")</td>
                        <td style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.9rem;">@(wd.Reference ?? "—")</td>
                        <td style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.9rem;">@wd.RequestedAt.ToString("MMM d, yyyy")</td>
                        <td>
                            <span style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
                                @(wd.Status == WithdrawalStatus.Requested ? "background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e;" : 
                                  wd.Status == WithdrawalStatus.Processed ? "background: #dbeafe; color: #1e40af;" : 
                                  "background: #ecfdf5; color: #065f46;")">
                                <span style="width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: 
                                    @(wd.Status == WithdrawalStatus.Requested ? "#f59e0b" : 
                                      wd.Status == WithdrawalStatus.Processed ? "#3b82f6" : "#10b981");"></span>
                                @wd.Status
                            </span>
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            @if (wd.Status == WithdrawalStatus.Requested)
                            {
                                <form method="post" asp-action="ProcessWithdrawal" class="inline-form" style="display: flex;">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="withdrawalId" value="@wd.Id" />
                                    <button type="submit" 
                                            style="padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; background: #dbeafe; color: #1e40af;"
                                            onmouseover="this.style.opacity='0.8'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">Mark Processed</button>
                                </form>
                            }
                            else if (wd.Status == WithdrawalStatus.Processed)
                            {
                                <form method="post" asp-action="CompleteWithdrawal" class="inline-form" style="display: flex;">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="withdrawalId" value="@wd.Id" />
                                    <button type="submit" 
                                            style="padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; background: #ecfdf5; color: #065f46;"
                                            onmouseover="this.style.opacity='0.8'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">Mark Completed</button>
                                </form>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <span style="color: #9ca3af; font-size: 0.9rem;">—</span>
                            }
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                }
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>

    @if (!Model.Any())
    {
        <div class="recent-card" style="text-align: center; padding: 60px;">
            <p style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 1rem;">No withdrawals found.</p>
        </div>
    }
</div>

    Layout = null;
    var returnUrl = ViewData["ReturnUrl"] as string;
}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>@ViewData["Title"] - ThriftLoop</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Auth.css" asp-append-version="true" />
</head>
<body>
    <div class="auth-shell">

        <aside class="auth-panel auth-panel--brand">
            <div class="brand-wordmark">ThriftLoop</div>
            <p class="brand-tagline">Second-hand style.<br>First-class finds.</p>
            <div class="brand-decoration" aria-hidden="true">
                <span class="deco-ring deco-ring--lg"></span>
                <span class="deco-ring deco-ring--md"></span>
                <span class="deco-ring deco-ring--sm"></span>
            </div>
        </aside>

        <main class="auth-panel auth-panel--form">
            <div class="form-card">

                <header class="form-card__header">
                    <h1 class="form-card__title">Welcome back</h1>
                    <p class="form-card__subtitle">Sign in to continue to ThriftLoop</p>
                </header>

                @* Google error (e.g. OAuth cancelled) *@
                @if (TempData["ExternalAuthError"] is string extError)
                {
                    <div class="alert alert--error" role="alert">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm-.75-4.75a.75.75 0 001.5 0v-4.5a.75.75 0 00-1.5 0v4.5zm.75-7a.75.75 0 110 1.5.75.75 0 010-1.5z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>
                        <span>@extError</span>
                    </div>
                }

                @* Successful password reset redirect *@
                @if (TempData["ResetSuccess"] is string resetMsg)
                {
                    <div class="alert alert--success" role="alert">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.857-9.809a.75.75 0 00-1.214-.882l-3.483 4.79-1.88-1.88a.75.75 0 10-1.06 1.061l2.5 2.5a.75.75 0 001.137-.089l4-5.5z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>
                        <span>@resetMsg</span>
                    </div>
                }

                @* Invalid reset link redirect *@
                @if (TempData["ResetError"] is string resetErr)
                {
                    <div class="alert alert--error" role="alert">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm-.75-4.75a.75.75 0 001.5 0v-4.5a.75.75 0 00-1.5 0v4.5zm.75-7a.75.75 0 110 1.5.75.75 0 010-1.5z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>
                        <span>@resetErr</span>
                    </div>
                }

                @if (!ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
                {
                    <div class="alert alert--error" role="alert">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm-.75-4.75a.75.75 0 001.5 0v-4.5a.75.75 0 00-1.5 0v4.5zm.75-7a.75.75 0 110 1.5.75.75 0 010-1.5z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly"></div>
                    </div>
                }

                <a asp-action="GoogleLogin" asp-controller="Auth"
                   asp-route-returnUrl="@returnUrl"
                   class="btn btn--google">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true">
                        <path fill="#4285F4" d="M22.56 12.25c0-.78-.07-1.53-.2-2.25H12v4.26h5.92c-.26 1.37-1.04 2.53-2.21 3.31v2.77h3.57c2.08-1.92 3.28-4.74 3.28-8.09z" />
                        <path fill="#34A853" d="M12 23c2.97 0 5.46-.98 7.28-2.66l-3.57-2.77c-.98.66-2.23 1.06-3.71 1.06-2.86 0-5.29-1.93-6.16-4.53H2.18v2.84C3.99 20.53 7.7 23 12 23z" />
                        <path fill="#FBBC05" d="M5.84 14.09c-.22-.66-.35-1.36-.35-2.09s.13-1.43.35-2.09V7.07H2.18C1.43 8.55 1 10.22 1 12s.43 3.45 1.18 4.93l3.66-2.84z" />
                        <path fill="#EA4335" d="M12 5.38c1.62 0 3.06.56 4.21 1.64l3.15-3.15C17.45 2.09 14.97 1 12 1 7.7 1 3.99 3.47 2.18 7.07l3.66 2.84c.87-2.6 3.3-4.53 6.16-4.53z" />
                    </svg>
                    Continue with Google
                </a>

                <div class="auth-divider">
                    <span>or sign in with email</span>
                </div>

                <form asp-action="Login" asp-controller="Auth" asp-route-returnUrl="@returnUrl"
                      method="post" novalidate class="auth-form">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

                    <div class="field">
                        <label asp-for="Email" class="field__label"></label>
                        <input asp-for="Email"
                               class="field__input"
                               type="email"
                               autocomplete="email"
                               placeholder="you@example.com"
                               spellcheck="false" />
                        <span asp-validation-for="Email" class="field__error"></span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="field">
                        <div class="field__label-row">
                            <label asp-for="Password" class="field__label"></label>
                            <a asp-action="ForgotPassword" asp-controller="Auth" class="field__link">Forgot password?</a>
                        </div>
                        <div class="field__input-wrapper">
                            <input asp-for="Password"
                                   id="passwordInput"
                                   class="field__input"
                                   type="password"
                                   autocomplete="current-password"
                                   placeholder="••••••••" />
                            <button type="button" class="toggle-password" aria-label="Toggle password visibility"
                                    onclick="togglePassword()">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" /></svg>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <span asp-validation-for="Password" class="field__error"></span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="field field--inline">
                        <label class="checkbox-label">
                            <input asp-for="RememberMe" type="checkbox" class="checkbox-input" />
                            <span class="checkbox-custom"></span>
                            <span class="checkbox-text">Keep me signed in</span>
                        </label>
                    </div>

                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn--primary">
                        Sign In
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M3 10a.75.75 0 01.75-.75h10.638L10.23 5.29a.75.75 0 111.04-1.08l5.5 5.25a.75.75 0 010 1.08l-5.5 5.25a.75.75 0 11-1.04-1.08l4.158-3.96H3.75A.75.75 0 013 10z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>
                    </button>
                </form>

                <footer class="form-card__footer">
                    <p>
                        Don't have an account?
                        <a asp-action="Register" asp-controller="Auth" class="footer-link">Create one free</a>
                    </p>
                </footer>

            </div>
        </main>

    </div>

    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.6.0/jquery.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-validate/1.19.5/jquery.validate.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-validation-unobtrusive/3.2.12/jquery.validate.unobtrusive.min.js"></script>
    <script>
        function togglePassword() {
            const input = document.getElementById('passwordInput');
            input.type = input.type === 'password' ? 'text' : 'password';
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>

                </header>

                {
                    <div class="alert alert--error" role="alert">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm-.75-4.75a.75.75 0 001.5 0v-4.5a.75.75 0 00-1.5 0v4.5zm.75-7a.75.75 0 110 1.5.75.75 0 010-1.5z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly"></div>
                    </div>
                }

                @* Google sign-up *@
                <a asp-action="GoogleLogin" asp-controller="Auth" class="btn btn--google">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true">
                        <path fill="#4285F4" d="M22.56 12.25c0-.78-.07-1.53-.2-2.25H12v4.26h5.92c-.26 1.37-1.04 2.53-2.21 3.31v2.77h3.57c2.08-1.92 3.28-4.74 3.28-8.09z" />
                        <path fill="#34A853" d="M12 23c2.97 0 5.46-.98 7.28-2.66l-3.57-2.77c-.98.66-2.23 1.06-3.71 1.06-2.86 0-5.29-1.93-6.16-4.53H2.18v2.84C3.99 20.53 7.7 23 12 23z" />
                        <path fill="#FBBC05" d="M5.84 14.09c-.22-.66-.35-1.36-.35-2.09s.13-1.43.35-2.09V7.07H2.18C1.43 8.55 1 10.22 1 12s.43 3.45 1.18 4.93l3.66-2.84z" />
                        <path fill="#EA4335" d="M12 5.38c1.62 0 3.06.56 4.21 1.64l3.15-3.15C17.45 2.09 14.97 1 12 1 7.7 1 3.99 3.47 2.18 7.07l3.66 2.84c.87-2.6 3.3-4.53 6.16-4.53z" />
                    </svg>
                    Continue with Google
                </a>

                <div class="auth-divider">
                    <span>or register with email</span>
                </div>

                <form asp-action="Register" asp-controller="Auth"
                      method="post" novalidate class="auth-form">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

                    <div class="field">
                        <label asp-for="Email" class="field__label"></label>
                        <input asp-for="Email"
                               class="field__input"
                               type="email"
                               autocomplete="email"
                               placeholder="you@example.com"
                               spellcheck="false" />
                        <span asp-validation-for="Email" class="field__error"></span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="field">
                        <label asp-for="Password" class="field__label"></label>
                        <div class="field__input-wrapper">
                            <input asp-for="Password"
                                   id="passwordInput"
                                   class="field__input"
                                   type="password"
                                   autocomplete="new-password"
                                   placeholder="Min. 8 characters" />
                            <button type="button" class="toggle-password" aria-label="Toggle password visibility"
                                    onclick="togglePassword('passwordInput')">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" /></svg>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <span asp-validation-for="Password" class="field__error"></span>
                        <div class="strength-bar" aria-hidden="true">
                            <span class="strength-bar__fill" id="strengthFill"></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="field">
                        <label asp-for="ConfirmPassword" class="field__label"></label>
                        <div class="field__input-wrapper">
                            <input asp-for="ConfirmPassword"
                                   id="confirmPasswordInput"
                                   class="field__input"
                                   type="password"
                                   autocomplete="new-password"
                                   placeholder="Repeat your password" />
                            <button type="button" class="toggle-password" aria-label="Toggle confirm password visibility"
                                    onclick="togglePassword('confirmPasswordInput')">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" /></svg>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <span asp-validation-for="ConfirmPassword" class="field__error"></span>
                    </div>

                    <p class="legal-note">
                        By registering, you agree to our
                        <a href="#" class="footer-link">Terms of Service</a> and
                        <a href="#" class="footer-link">Privacy Policy</a>.
                    </p>

                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn--primary">
                        Create Account
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M3 10a.75.75 0 01.75-.75h10.638L10.23 5.29a.75.75 0 111.04-1.08l5.5 5.25a.75.75 0 010 1.08l-5.5 5.25a.75.75 0 11-1.04-1.08l4.158-3.96H3.75A.75.75 0 013 10z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>
                    </button>
                </form>

                <footer class="form-card__footer">
                    <p>
                        Already have an account?
                        <a asp-action="Login" asp-controller="Auth" class="footer-link">Sign in</a>
                    </p>
                    <p class="mt-2" style="margin-top: 0.5rem;">
                        <a asp-action="RiderRegister" asp-controller="Auth" class="footer-link">Register as Rider →</a>
                    </p>
                </footer>

            </div>
        </main>

    </div>

    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.6.0/jquery.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-validate/1.19.5/jquery.validate.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-validation-unobtrusive/3.2.12/jquery.validate.unobtrusive.min.js"></script>
    <script>
        function togglePassword(inputId) {
        const input = document.getElementById(inputId);
        input.type = input.type === 'password' ? 'text' : 'password';
        }

        document.getElementById('passwordInput').addEventListener('input', function () {
        const val  = this.value;
        const fill = document.getElementById('strengthFill');
        let strength = 0;
        if (val.length >= 8)          strength++;
        if (/[A-Z]/.test(val))        strength++;
        if (/[0-9]/.test(val))        strength++;
        if (/[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(val)) strength++;

        const pct = (strength / 4) * 100;
        fill.style.width = pct + '%';
        fill.className   = 'strength-bar__fill';
        if (strength <= 1)      fill.classList.add('strength-bar__fill--weak');
        else if (strength <= 2) fill.classList.add('strength-bar__fill--fair');
        else if (strength <= 3) fill.classList.add('strength-bar__fill--good');
        else                    fill.classList.add('strength-bar__fill--strong');
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>

                {

                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm-.75-4.75a.75.75 0 001.5 0v-4.5a.75.75 0 00-1.5 0v4.5zm.75-7a.75.75 0 110 1.5.75.75 0 010-1.5z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly"></div>
                    </div>
                }

                <form asp-action="ResetPassword" asp-controller="Auth"
                      method="post" novalidate class="auth-form">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

                    @* Hidden fields — token and email are injected from the reset link *@
                    <input asp-for="Token" type="hidden" />
                    <input asp-for="Email" type="hidden" />

                    <div class="field">
                        <label asp-for="Password" class="field__label"></label>
                        <div class="field__input-wrapper">
                            <input asp-for="Password"
                                   id="passwordInput"
                                   class="field__input"
                                   type="password"
                                   autocomplete="new-password"
                                   placeholder="Min. 8 characters"
                                   autofocus />
                            <button type="button" class="toggle-password" aria-label="Toggle password visibility"
                                    onclick="togglePassword('passwordInput')">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" /></svg>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <span asp-validation-for="Password" class="field__error"></span>
                        <div class="strength-bar" aria-hidden="true">
                            <span class="strength-bar__fill" id="strengthFill"></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="field">
                        <label asp-for="ConfirmPassword" class="field__label"></label>
                        <div class="field__input-wrapper">
                            <input asp-for="ConfirmPassword"
                                   id="confirmPasswordInput"
                                   class="field__input"
                                   type="password"
                                   autocomplete="new-password"
                                   placeholder="Repeat your password" />
                            <button type="button" class="toggle-password" aria-label="Toggle confirm password visibility"
                                    onclick="togglePassword('confirmPasswordInput')">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" /></svg>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <span asp-validation-for="ConfirmPassword" class="field__error"></span>
                    </div>

                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn--primary">
                        Update Password
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M3 10a.75.75 0 01.75-.75h10.638L10.23 5.29a.75.75 0 111.04-1.08l5.5 5.25a.75.75 0 010 1.08l-5.5 5.25a.75.75 0 11-1.04-1.08l4.158-3.96H3.75A.75.75 0 013 10z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>
                    </button>
                </form>

            </div>
        </main>

    </div>

    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.6.0/jquery.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-validate/1.19.5/jquery.validate.min.js"></script>

    <script>
        function togglePassword(inputId) {
            const input = document.getElementById(inputId);
            input.type = input.type === 'password' ? 'text' : 'password';
        }

        document.getElementById('passwordInput').addEventListener('input', function () {
            const val  = this.value;
            const fill = document.getElementById('strengthFill');
            let strength = 0;
            if (val.length >= 8)          strength++;
            if (/[A-Z]/.test(val))        strength++;
            if (/[0-9]/.test(val))        strength++;
            if (/[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(val)) strength++;

            const pct = (strength / 4) * 100;
            fill.style.width = pct + '%';
            fill.className   = 'strength-bar__fill';
            if (strength <= 1)      fill.classList.add('strength-bar__fill--weak');
            else if (strength <= 2) fill.classList.add('strength-bar__fill--fair');

    // Read timestamps provided by controller
    DateTime? rejectedAt = ViewBag.RejectedAt as DateTime?;
    DateTime? resubmittedAt = ViewBag.ResubmittedAt as DateTime?;

    // Use controller-provided CanEdit when available; otherwise fall back to legacy logic
    var canEdit = (bool)(ViewBag.CanEdit ?? (!isApproved && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(rejectionReason) && (resubmittedAt == null || (rejectedAt != null && resubmittedAt <= rejectedAt))));
}

--- Views\Auth\RiderRegister.cshtml ---
﻿@model ThriftLoop.DTOs.Auth.RiderRegisterDTO
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Rider Application";
    Layout = null;
    
    @* Address field validation state *@
    var addrError = ViewData.ModelState.ContainsKey("Address")
                    && ViewData.ModelState["Address"]!.Errors.Count > 0;
    var addrErrorMsg = addrError
                       ? ViewData.ModelState["Address"]!.Errors[0].ErrorMessage
                       : string.Empty;
}
