    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.6.0/jquery.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-validate/1.19.5/jquery.validate.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-validation-unobtrusive/3.2.12/jquery.validate.unobtrusive.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
    <script src="~/js/map-picker.js" asp-append-version="true"></script>
    <script>
        function togglePassword(inputId) {
        const input = document.getElementById(inputId);
        input.type = input.type === 'password' ? 'text' : 'password';
        }

        document.getElementById('passwordInput').addEventListener('input', function() {
        const val = this.value;
        const fill = document.getElementById('strengthFill');
        let strength = 0;
        if (val.length >= 8) strength++;
        if (/[A-Z]/.test(val)) strength++;
        if (/[0-9]/.test(val)) strength++;
        if (/[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(val)) strength++;
        const pct = (strength / 4) * 100;
        fill.style.width = pct + '%';
        fill.className = 'strength-bar__fill';
        if (strength <= 1) fill.classList.add('strength-bar__fill--weak');
        else if (strength <= 2) fill.classList.add('strength-bar__fill--fair');
        else if (strength <= 3) fill.classList.add('strength-bar__fill--good');
        else fill.classList.add('strength-bar__fill--strong');
        });

        function previewLicense(input) {
        const preview = document.getElementById('licensePreview');
        const body = document.getElementById('licenseUploadBody');
        if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
        if (input.files[0].size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
        alert('File exceeds 5 MB. Please choose a smaller image.');
        input.value = '';
        return;
        }
        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = function(e) {
        preview.src = e.target.result;
        preview.style.display = 'block';
        body.style.display = 'none';
        };
        reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
        }
        }

        document.querySelector('[name="LicensePlate"]')
        ?.addEventListener('blur', function() { this.value = this.value.toUpperCase(); });
    </script>
</body>
</html>

--- Views\Cart\Index.cshtml ---
@using ThriftLoop.ViewModels
@model CartIndexViewModel
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Shopping Cart";

    // Group items by shop
    var groupedByShop = Model.Items
        .GroupBy(i => new { i.ShopId, i.ShopName, i.SellerId })
        .Select(g => new
        {
            ShopId = g.Key.ShopId,
            ShopName = g.Key.ShopName ?? "Unknown Shop",
            SellerId = g.Key.SellerId,
            Items = g.ToList()
        })
        .ToList();
}

<div class="cart-page">
    <h1 class="cart-page__title">Shopping Cart</h1>

    @if (Model.IsEmpty)
    {
        <div class="cart-page__empty">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" width="64" height="64">
                <path d="M3 3h2l.4 2M7 13h10l4-8H5.4M7 13L5.4 5M7 13l-2.293 2.293c-.63.63-.184 1.707.707 1.707H17m0 0a2 2 0 1 0 0 4 2 2 0 0 0 0-4zm-8 2a2 2 0 1 1 0 4 2 2 0 0 1 0-4z" />
            </svg>
            <p>Your cart is empty</p>
            <a asp-controller="Sellers" asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-primary">Browse Sellers</a>
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        @if (Model.InvalidItemCount > 0)
        {
            <div class="cart-warning-banner">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="18" height="18">
                    <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M8.257 3.099c.765-1.36 2.722-1.36 3.486 0l5.58 9.92c.75 1.334-.213 2.98-1.742 2.98H4.42c-1.53 0-2.493-1.646-1.743-2.98l5.58-9.92zM11 13a1 1 0 11-2 0 1 1 0 012 0zm-1-8a1 1 0 00-1 1v3a1 1 0 002 0V6a1 1 0 00-1-1z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                </svg>
                <span>@Model.InvalidItemCount item@(Model.InvalidItemCount > 1 ? "s are" : " is") no longer available and cannot be purchased.</span>
                <form asp-controller="Cart" asp-action="Clear" method="post" style="margin-left: auto;">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <button type="submit" class="cart-warning-banner__clear">Remove unavailable items</button>
                </form>
            </div>
        }

        <div class="cart-page__content">
            <div class="cart-page__items">
                @foreach (var shopGroup in groupedByShop)
                {
                    var hasValidItems = shopGroup.Items.Any(i => i.IsValid);
                    <div class="cart-shop-group" data-shop-id="@shopGroup.ShopId" data-seller-id="@shopGroup.SellerId">
                        <div class="cart-shop-header">
                            <div class="cart-shop-header__left">
                                <label class="cart-shop-checkbox">
                                    <input type="checkbox" class="shop-select-all" data-shop-id="@shopGroup.ShopId" @(hasValidItems ? "checked" : "disabled") />
                                    <span class="checkmark"></span>
                                </label>
                                <span class="cart-shop-name">
                                    <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="14" height="14">
                                        <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M8 1a2.5 2.5 0 00-2.5 2.5H3.5A1.5 1.5 0 002 5v8.5A1.5 1.5 0 003.5 15h9a1.5 1.5 0 001.5-1.5V5a1.5 1.5 0 00-1.5-1.5h-2A2.5 2.5 0 008 1zm0 1.5A1 1 0 019 3.5v0H7v0A1 1 0 018 2.5z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                                    </svg>
                                    @shopGroup.ShopName
                                </span>
                            </div>
                            <a asp-controller="Shop" asp-action="Index" asp-route-id="@shopGroup.ShopId" class="cart-shop-visit">Visit Shop →</a>
                        </div>

                        <div class="cart-shop-items">
                            @foreach (var item in shopGroup.Items)
                            {
                                <div class="cart-item @(item.IsValid ? "" : "cart-item--invalid")"
                                     data-cart-item-id="@item.CartItemId"
                                     data-shop-id="@item.ShopId"
                                     data-seller-id="@item.SellerId">
                                    <label class="cart-item-checkbox">
                                        <input type="checkbox" name="selectedItems" value="@item.CartItemId"
                                               class="item-checkbox"
                                               data-cart-item-id="@item.CartItemId"
                                               data-shop-id="@item.ShopId"
                                               data-seller-id="@item.SellerId"
                                               data-price="@item.Price.ToString("F2", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)"
                                               data-quantity="@item.Quantity"
                                        @(item.IsValid ? "checked" : "disabled") />
                                        <span class="checkmark"></span>
                                    </label>

                                    <div class="cart-item__image">
                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.ItemImageUrl))
                                        {
                                            <img src="@item.ItemImageUrl" alt="@item.ItemTitle" />
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <div class="cart-item__placeholder">No Image</div>
                                        }
                                    </div>

                                    <div class="cart-item__details">
                                        <div class="cart-item__header">
                                            <h3 class="cart-item__title">
                                                <a asp-controller="Shop" asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@item.ItemId">@item.ItemTitle</a>
                                            </h3>
                                        </div>

                                        <div class="cart-item__variant">
                                            <span class="cart-item__variant-name">@item.VariantName</span>
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.Size))
                                            {
                                                <span class="cart-item__size">Size: @item.Size</span>
                                            }
                                        </div>

                                        <div class="cart-item__meta">
                                            <span class="cart-item__condition">@item.Condition</span>
                                            <span class="cart-item__category">@item.Category</span>
                                        </div>

                                        @if (!item.IsValid && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.InvalidReason))
                                        {
                                            <div class="cart-item__error">
                                                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12">
                                                    <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M8 15A7 7 0 108 1a7 7 0 000 14zm-.75-9.25a.75.75 0 011.5 0v4a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0v-4zm.75 7.5a1 1 0 100-2 1 1 0 000 2z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                                                </svg>
                                                @item.InvalidReason
                                            </div>
                                        }
                                    </div>

                                    <div class="cart-item__actions">
                                        <div class="cart-item__quantity">
                                            <button type="button" class="btn-quantity" data-action="decrease" @(item.Quantity <= 1 || !item.IsValid ? "disabled" : "")>-</button>
                                            <input type="number" value="@item.Quantity" min="1" max="@item.AvailableStock" readonly />
                                            <button type="button" class="btn-quantity" data-action="increase" @(item.Quantity >= item.AvailableStock || !item.IsValid ? "disabled" : "")>+</button>
                                        </div>

                                        <div class="cart-item__price">
                                            <span class="cart-item__unit-price">₱@item.Price.ToString("N2") each</span>
                                            <span class="cart-item__line-total" data-line-total="@item.LineTotal.ToString("F2", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)">₱@item.LineTotal.ToString("N2")</span>
                                        </div>

                                        <button type="button" class="cart-item__remove" data-action="remove" title="Remove from cart">
                                            <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="16" height="16">
                                                <path d="M5.5 5.5A.5.5 0 016 6v6a.5.5 0 01-1 0V6a.5.5 0 01.5-.5zm2.5 0a.5.5 0 01.5.5v6a.5.5 0 01-1 0V6a.5.5 0 01.5-.5zm3 .5a.5.5 0 00-1 0v6a.5.5 0 001 0V6z" />
                                                <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M14.5 3a1 1 0 01-1 1H13v9a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V4h-.5a1 1 0 01-1-1V2a1 1 0 011-1H6a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1h3.5a1 1 0 011 1v1zM4.118 4L4 4.059V13a1 1 0 001 1h6a1 1 0 001-1V4.059L11.882 4H4.118zM2.5 3V2h11v1h-11z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                                            </svg>
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>

            <div class="cart-page__summary">
                <h2>Order Summary</h2>

                <div class="summary-row">
                    <span>Subtotal (<span id="selectedItemCount">0</span> items)</span>
                    <span id="cart-subtotal">₱0.00</span>
                </div>

                <div class="summary-row">
                    <span>Delivery Fee (<span id="selectedShopCount">0</span> shop<span id="shopPlural">s</span> × ₱@Model.DeliveryFeePerShop.ToString("N2"))</span>
                    <span id="cart-delivery">₱0.00</span>
                </div>

                <div class="summary-row summary-row--total">
                    <span>Total</span>
                    <span id="cart-total">₱0.00</span>
                </div>

                @if (!Model.HasValidItems)
                {
                    <div class="alert alert-warning">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="16" height="16">
                            <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M8.257 3.099c.765-1.36 2.722-1.36 3.486 0l5.58 9.92c.75 1.334-.213 2.98-1.742 2.98H4.42c-1.53 0-2.493-1.646-1.743-2.98l5.58-9.92zM11 13a1 1 0 11-2 0 1 1 0 012 0zm-1-8a1 1 0 00-1 1v3a1 1 0 002 0V6a1 1 0 00-1-1z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                        </svg>
                        <span>Some items are unavailable. Please remove them to proceed.</span>
                    </div>
                }

                <button type="button" id="checkoutBtn" class="btn btn-primary btn-checkout" disabled>
                    Proceed to Checkout (<span id="selectedCount">0</span> items)
                </button>

                <form asp-controller="Cart" asp-action="Clear" method="post" class="mt-2">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm">Clear Cart</button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    }
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            const DELIVERY_FEE_PER_SHOP = @Model.DeliveryFeePerShop;
            
            // Store all cart items data for calculations
            const cartItemsData = new Map();
            
            // Initialize cart items data from server-rendered values
            document.querySelectorAll('.cart-item').forEach(item => {
                const cartItemId = parseInt(item.dataset.cartItemId);
                const shopId = item.dataset.shopId;
                const sellerId = item.dataset.sellerId;
                const checkbox = item.querySelector('.item-checkbox');
                const lineTotalEl = item.querySelector('.cart-item__line-total');
                
                cartItemsData.set(cartItemId, {
                    cartItemId: cartItemId,
                    shopId: shopId,
                    sellerId: sellerId,
                    price: parseFloat(checkbox?.dataset.price || '0'),
                    quantity: parseInt(checkbox?.dataset.quantity || '1'),
                    lineTotal: parseFloat(lineTotalEl?.dataset.lineTotal || '0'),
                    isValid: !checkbox?.disabled,
                    element: item,
                    checkbox: checkbox
                });
            });

            // Function to recalculate and update the order summary based on checked items
            function updateOrderSummary() {
                let selectedSubtotal = 0;
                let selectedItemCount = 0;
                const selectedShops = new Set();
                const selectedSellers = new Set();
                let checkedCount = 0;

                cartItemsData.forEach((data, cartItemId) => {
                    const checkbox = data.checkbox;
                    if (checkbox && checkbox.checked && !checkbox.disabled) {
                        selectedSubtotal += data.lineTotal;
                        selectedItemCount += data.quantity;
                        checkedCount++;
                        if (data.shopId) {
                            selectedShops.add(data.shopId);
                        }
                        if (data.sellerId) {
                            selectedSellers.add(data.sellerId);
                        }
                    }
                });

                // Delivery fee is per SHOP (or per seller if shopId is null)
                const uniqueDeliveryGroups = selectedShops.size > 0 ? selectedShops.size : selectedSellers.size;
                const selectedDelivery = uniqueDeliveryGroups * DELIVERY_FEE_PER_SHOP;
                const selectedTotal = selectedSubtotal + selectedDelivery;

                // Update UI
                document.getElementById('cart-subtotal').textContent = '₱' + selectedSubtotal.toLocaleString('en-PH', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 });
                document.getElementById('cart-delivery').textContent = '₱' + selectedDelivery.toLocaleString('en-PH', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 });
                document.getElementById('cart-total').textContent = '₱' + selectedTotal.toLocaleString('en-PH', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 });
                document.getElementById('selectedItemCount').textContent = selectedItemCount;
                document.getElementById('selectedShopCount').textContent = uniqueDeliveryGroups;
                document.getElementById('shopPlural').textContent = uniqueDeliveryGroups === 1 ? '' : 's';
                document.getElementById('selectedCount').textContent = checkedCount;
                
                const checkoutBtn = document.getElementById('checkoutBtn');
                checkoutBtn.disabled = checkedCount === 0;
            }

            // Function to update shop "select all" checkbox state
            function updateShopSelectAll(shopId) {
                const shopCb = document.querySelector(`.shop-select-all[data-shop-id="${shopId}"]`);
                if (!shopCb) return;
                
                const shopItems = document.querySelectorAll(`.item-checkbox[data-shop-id="${shopId}"]:not(:disabled)`);
                const allChecked = Array.from(shopItems).every(cb => cb.checked);
                shopCb.checked = allChecked && shopItems.length > 0;
            }

            // Quantity update function
            async function updateQuantity(cartItemId, newQuantity) {
                const token = document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value;
                
                try {
                    const response = await fetch('/Cart/UpdateQuantity', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                            'RequestVerificationToken': token
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({
                            cartItemId: cartItemId,
                            quantity: newQuantity
                        })
                    });
                    
                    const data = await response.json();
                    
                    if (data.success) {
                        // Update the stored data
                        const itemData = cartItemsData.get(cartItemId);
                        if (itemData) {
                            itemData.quantity = data.quantity;
                            itemData.lineTotal = parseFloat(data.lineTotal.replace(/,/g, ''));
                            
                            // Update UI elements
                            const itemEl = itemData.element;
                            const quantityInput = itemEl.querySelector('input[type="number"]');
                            const lineTotalEl = itemEl.querySelector('.cart-item__line-total');
                            const decreaseBtn = itemEl.querySelector('[data-action="decrease"]');
                            const increaseBtn = itemEl.querySelector('[data-action="increase"]');
                            const checkbox = itemEl.querySelector('.item-checkbox');
                            
                            if (quantityInput) quantityInput.value = data.quantity;
                            if (lineTotalEl) {
                                lineTotalEl.textContent = '₱' + data.lineTotal;
                                lineTotalEl.dataset.lineTotal = data.lineTotal;
                            }
                            if (checkbox) {
                                checkbox.dataset.quantity = data.quantity;
                            }
                            if (decreaseBtn) decreaseBtn.disabled = data.quantity <= 1;
                            
                            const maxQty = parseInt(quantityInput?.max || '1');
                            if (increaseBtn) increaseBtn.disabled = data.quantity >= maxQty;
                            
                            // Update navbar cart count
                            updateNavbarCartCount(data.cartCount);
                        }
                        
                        // Recalculate summary
                        updateOrderSummary();
                        
                        // Update shop select all for this item's shop
                        const itemEl = document.querySelector(`.cart-item[data-cart-item-id="${cartItemId}"]`);
                        if (itemEl) {
                            updateShopSelectAll(itemEl.dataset.shopId);
                        }
                    } else {
                        // Show error in the item row
                        const itemEl = document.querySelector(`.cart-item[data-cart-item-id="${cartItemId}"]`);
                        const errorEl = itemEl?.querySelector('.cart-item__error');
                        if (errorEl) {
                            errorEl.innerHTML = `<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M8 15A7 7 0 108 1a7 7 0 000 14zm-.75-9.25a.75.75 0 011.5 0v4a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0v-4zm.75 7.5a1 1 0 100-2 1 1 0 000 2z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>${data.error}`;
                            errorEl.style.display = 'flex';
                        }
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Failed to update quantity:', error);
                }
            }

            // Remove item function
            async function removeItem(cartItemId) {
                const token = document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value;
                
                try {
                    const response = await fetch('/Cart/Remove', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
                            'RequestVerificationToken': token
                        },
                        body: `cartItemId=${cartItemId}`
                    });
                    
                    const data = await response.json();
                    
                    if (data.success) {
                        // Remove from data map
                        cartItemsData.delete(cartItemId);
                        
                        // Remove element
                        const itemEl = document.querySelector(`.cart-item[data-cart-item-id="${cartItemId}"]`);
                        const shopGroup = itemEl?.closest('.cart-shop-group');
                        const shopId = itemEl?.dataset.shopId;
                        
                        itemEl?.remove();
                        
                        // If shop group is empty, remove it
                        if (shopGroup && shopGroup.querySelectorAll('.cart-item').length === 0) {
                            shopGroup.remove();
                        }
                        
                        // Update navbar cart count
                        updateNavbarCartCount(data.cartCount);
                        
                        // Recalculate summary
                        updateOrderSummary();
                        
                        // Update shop select all
                        if (shopId) {
                            updateShopSelectAll(shopId);
                        }
                        
                        // If cart is empty, reload page
                        if (data.isEmpty) {
                            location.reload();
                        }
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Failed to remove item:', error);
                }
            }

            function updateNavbarCartCount(count) {
                const cartBadge = document.querySelector('.cart-badge');
                if (cartBadge) {
                    cartBadge.textContent = count;
                    cartBadge.style.display = count > 0 ? 'flex' : 'none';
                }
            }

            // Event delegation for cart item actions
            document.querySelector('.cart-page__items')?.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
                const target = e.target;
                
                // Quantity decrease
                if (target.matches('[data-action="decrease"]') || target.closest('[data-action="decrease"]')) {
                    const btn = target.closest('[data-action="decrease"]');
                    if (btn.disabled) return;
                    
                    const itemEl = btn.closest('.cart-item');
                    const cartItemId = parseInt(itemEl.dataset.cartItemId);
                    const quantityInput = itemEl.querySelector('input[type="number"]');
                    const currentQty = parseInt(quantityInput.value);
                    
                    if (currentQty > 1) {
                        await updateQuantity(cartItemId, currentQty - 1);
                    }
                }
                
                // Quantity increase
                if (target.matches('[data-action="increase"]') || target.closest('[data-action="increase"]')) {
                    const btn = target.closest('[data-action="increase"]');
                    if (btn.disabled) return;
                    
                    const itemEl = btn.closest('.cart-item');
                    const cartItemId = parseInt(itemEl.dataset.cartItemId);
                    const quantityInput = itemEl.querySelector('input[type="number"]');
                    const currentQty = parseInt(quantityInput.value);
                    const maxQty = parseInt(quantityInput.max);
                    
                    if (currentQty < maxQty) {
                        await updateQuantity(cartItemId, currentQty + 1);
                    }
                }
                
                // Remove item
                if (target.matches('[data-action="remove"]') || target.closest('[data-action="remove"]')) {
                    const btn = target.closest('[data-action="remove"]');
                    const itemEl = btn.closest('.cart-item');
                    const cartItemId = parseInt(itemEl.dataset.cartItemId);
                    
                    if (confirm('Remove this item from your cart?')) {
                        await removeItem(cartItemId);
                    }
                }
            });

            // Shop "select all" checkbox
            document.querySelectorAll('.shop-select-all').forEach(shopCb => {
                shopCb.addEventListener('change', () => {
                    const shopId = shopCb.dataset.shopId;
                    const shopItems = document.querySelectorAll(`.item-checkbox[data-shop-id="${shopId}"]:not(:disabled)`);
                    shopItems.forEach(itemCb => {
                        itemCb.checked = shopCb.checked;
                    });
                    updateOrderSummary();
                });
            });

            // Individual item checkbox
            document.querySelectorAll('.item-checkbox').forEach(itemCb => {
                itemCb.addEventListener('change', () => {
                    const shopId = itemCb.dataset.shopId;
                    updateShopSelectAll(shopId);
                    updateOrderSummary();
                });
            });

            // Checkout button
            document.getElementById('checkoutBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const selected = document.querySelectorAll('.item-checkbox:checked:not(:disabled)');
                if (selected.length === 0) return;

                const params = new URLSearchParams();
                selected.forEach(cb => {
                    params.append('cartItemIds', cb.value);
                });

                window.location.href = '/Orders/CartCheckout?' + params.toString();
            });

            // Initial summary calculation
            updateOrderSummary();
            
            // Initialize shop select all states
            document.querySelectorAll('.cart-shop-group').forEach(group => {
                const shopId = group.dataset.shopId;
                if (shopId) {
                    updateShopSelectAll(shopId);
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}

--- Views\Chat\_ContextCard.cshtml ---
@* Views/Chat/_ContextCard.cshtml *@
@model ThriftLoop.DTOs.Chat.ContextCardDTO
@using ThriftLoop.DTOs.Chat
@using ThriftLoop.Enums

@* BUG FIX 4: Add data attributes for cache seeding on page load *@
<div class="context-card" 
     data-context-card-id="@Model.Id" 
     data-status="@Model.Status"
     data-expires-at="@Model.ExpiresAt.ToString("o")"
     data-is-seller="@Model.IsCurrentUserSeller.ToString().ToLower()"
     data-is-buyer="@Model.IsCurrentUserBuyer.ToString().ToLower()">
    <div class="context-card-header">
        <div class="context-card-item-info">
            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ItemImageUrl))
            {
                <img src="@Model.ItemImageUrl" alt="@Model.ItemTitle" class="context-card-item-image" />
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="context-card-item-placeholder">
                    <svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5"></circle>
                        <polyline points="21 15 16 10 5 21"></polyline>
                    </svg>
                </div>
            }
            <div class="context-card-item-details">
                <h4 class="context-card-item-title">@Model.ItemTitle</h4>
                <div class="context-card-item-meta">
                    <span class="context-card-price">₱@Model.ItemPrice.ToString("N2")</span>
                    <span class="context-card-condition">@Model.Condition</span>
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Size))
                    {
                        <span class="context-card-size">Size: @Model.Size</span>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="context-card-status">
            @switch (Model.Status)
            {
                case ContextCardStatus.Pending:
                    <span class="status-badge status-pending">Pending</span>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.Accepted:
                    <span class="status-badge status-accepted">Accepted</span>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.ItemHandedOff:
                    <span class="status-badge status-handed-off">Item Handed Off</span>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.ItemReceived:
                    <span class="status-badge status-received">Item Received</span>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.Completed:
                    <span class="status-badge status-completed">Completed</span>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.Cancelled:
                    <span class="status-badge status-cancelled">Cancelled</span>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.Declined:
                    <span class="status-badge status-declined">Declined</span>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.Expired:
                    <span class="status-badge status-expired">Expired</span>
                    break;
            }
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="context-card-body">
        <div class="context-card-participants">
            <div class="participant-info">
                <span class="participant-label">Seller:</span>
                <span class="participant-name">@Model.SellerName</span>
            </div>
            <div class="participant-info">
                <span class="participant-label">Buyer:</span>
                <span class="participant-name">@Model.BuyerName</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        @if (Model.Status != ContextCardStatus.Completed && Model.Status != ContextCardStatus.Cancelled && 
             Model.Status != ContextCardStatus.Declined && Model.Status != ContextCardStatus.Expired)
        {
            <div class="context-card-timer">
                @if (Model.Status == ContextCardStatus.Pending)
                {
                    <span class="timer-text">Expires in: <strong>@Model.TimeRemaining</strong></span>
                }
                else
                {
                    <span class="timer-text">Transaction in progress</span>
                }
            </div>
        }
    </div>

    <div class="context-card-actions">
        @if (Model.IsCurrentUserSeller)
        {
            @switch (Model.Status)
            {
                case ContextCardStatus.Pending:
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-success btn-sm context-card-action" 
                            data-action="accept" data-context-card-id="@Model.Id">
                        Accept
                    </button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm context-card-action" 
                            data-action="decline" data-context-card-id="@Model.Id">
                        Decline
                    </button>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.Accepted:
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm context-card-action" 
                            data-action="item-handed-off" data-context-card-id="@Model.Id">
                        Item Handed Off
                    </button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm context-card-action" 
                            data-action="cancel" data-context-card-id="@Model.Id">
                        Cancel
                    </button>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.ItemHandedOff:
                case ContextCardStatus.ItemReceived:
                    <span class="action-text">Waiting for buyer to confirm receipt</span>
                    break;
            }
        }
        else if (Model.IsCurrentUserBuyer)
        {
            @switch (Model.Status)
            {
                case ContextCardStatus.Pending:
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm context-card-action" 
                            data-action="cancel" data-context-card-id="@Model.Id">
                        Cancel
                    </button>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.Accepted:
                    <span class="action-text">Waiting for seller to hand off item</span>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm context-card-action" 
                            data-action="cancel" data-context-card-id="@Model.Id">
                        Cancel
                    </button>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.ItemHandedOff:
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm context-card-action" 
                            data-action="item-received" data-context-card-id="@Model.Id">
                        Item Received
                    </button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm context-card-action" 
                            data-action="cancel" data-context-card-id="@Model.Id">
                        Cancel
                    </button>
                    break;
                case ContextCardStatus.ItemReceived:
                    <div class="payment-selection">
                        <p class="payment-prompt">Select payment method:</p>
                        <div class="wallet-balance-info">
                            <span class="balance-label">Your Balance:</span>
                            <span class="balance-amount @(Model.HasEnoughBalance ? "balance-ok" : "balance-low")">
                                ₱@Model.BuyerWalletBalance.ToString("N2")
                            </span>
                            @if (!Model.HasEnoughBalance)
                            {
                                <span class="balance-warning">(Insufficient funds)</span>
                            }
                        </div>
                        <div class="payment-options">
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm payment-option @(Model.HasEnoughBalance ? "" : "disabled")"
                                    data-payment="wallet" data-context-card-id="@Model.Id"
                                    @(Model.HasEnoughBalance ? "" : "disabled")
                                    title="@(Model.HasEnoughBalance ? "Pay with Wallet" : $"Need ₱{(Model.ItemPrice - Model.BuyerWalletBalance):N2} more")">
                                <i class="fas fa-wallet"></i> Wallet
                            </button>
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm payment-option"
                                    data-payment="cash" data-context-card-id="@Model.Id">
                                <i class="fas fa-money-bill-wave"></i> Cash
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    break;
            }
        }
    </div>
</div>

.context-card[data-status="completed"] .context-card-actions,

    justify-content: center;

.context-card[data-status="cancelled"] .action-text,

.context-card[data-status="expired"] .action-text {
    color: #6b7280;
    font-size: 13px;

<script>
    // Inline ContextCard JavaScript – loaded once per page even if partial renders multiple times
    (function () {
        'use strict';

        if (window.contextCardHandler) return; // Already initialized

        const ACTION_MAP = {
            'accept': 'Accept',
            'decline': 'Decline',
            'cancel': 'Cancel',
            'item-handed-off': 'ItemHandedOff',
            'item-received': 'ItemReceived',
        };

        const PAYMENT_MAP = {
            'wallet': 'Wallet',
            'cash': 'Cash',
        };

        function getAntiForgeryToken() {
            return document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value ?? '';
        }

        async function callUpdateApi(contextCardId, action, paymentMethod = null) {
            const body = { action };
            if (paymentMethod) body.paymentMethod = paymentMethod;

            const response = await fetch(`/api/ContextCard/${contextCardId}`, {
                method: 'PUT',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'RequestVerificationToken': getAntiForgeryToken(),
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(body),
            });

            if (!response.ok) {
                const text = await response.text();
                throw new Error(text || `HTTP ${response.status}`);
            }

            return response.json();
        }

        function statusBadgeHtml(status) {
            const map = {
                Pending: '<span class="status-badge status-pending">Pending</span>',
                Accepted: '<span class="status-badge status-accepted">Accepted</span>',
                ItemHandedOff: '<span class="status-badge status-handed-off">Item Handed Off</span>',
                ItemReceived: '<span class="status-badge status-received">Item Received</span>',
                Completed: '<span class="status-badge status-completed">Completed</span>',
                Cancelled: '<span class="status-badge status-cancelled">Cancelled</span>',
                Declined: '<span class="status-badge status-declined">Declined</span>',
                Expired: '<span class="status-badge status-expired">Expired</span>',
            };
            return map[status] ?? `<span class="status-badge">${status}</span>`;
        }

        function actionsHtml(card) {
            const id = card.id;
            const s = card.isCurrentUserSeller;
            const b = card.isCurrentUserBuyer;

            if (s) {
                switch (card.status) {
                    case 'Pending':
                        return `
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-success btn-sm context-card-action"
                                    data-action="accept" data-context-card-id="${id}">Accept</button>
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm context-card-action"
                                    data-action="decline" data-context-card-id="${id}">Decline</button>`;
                    case 'Accepted':
                        return `
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm context-card-action"
                                    data-action="item-handed-off" data-context-card-id="${id}">Item Handed Off</button>
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm context-card-action"
                                    data-action="cancel" data-context-card-id="${id}">Cancel</button>`;
                    case 'ItemHandedOff':
                    case 'ItemReceived':
                        return `<span class="action-text">Waiting for buyer to confirm receipt</span>`;
                }
            } else if (b) {
                switch (card.status) {
                    case 'Pending':
                        return `
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm context-card-action"
                                    data-action="cancel" data-context-card-id="${id}">Cancel</button>`;
                    case 'Accepted':
                        return `
                            <span class="action-text">Waiting for seller to hand off item</span>
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm context-card-action"
                                    data-action="cancel" data-context-card-id="${id}">Cancel</button>`;
                    case 'ItemHandedOff':
                        return `
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm context-card-action"
                                    data-action="item-received" data-context-card-id="${id}">Item Received</button>
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm context-card-action"
                                    data-action="cancel" data-context-card-id="${id}">Cancel</button>`;
                    case 'ItemReceived':
                        return `
                            <div class="payment-selection">
                                <p class="payment-prompt">Select payment method:</p>
                                <div class="payment-options">
                                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm payment-option"
                                            data-payment="wallet" data-context-card-id="${id}">
                                        <i class="fas fa-wallet"></i> Wallet
                                    </button>
                                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm payment-option"
                                            data-payment="cash" data-context-card-id="${id}">
                                        <i class="fas fa-money-bill-wave"></i> Cash
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>`;
                }
            }
            return '';
        }

        function updateContextCardUI(card) {
            const cardEl = document.querySelector(`.context-card[data-context-card-id="${card.id}"]`);
            if (!cardEl) {
                console.warn('[ContextCard] Element not found for id:', card.id);
                return;
            }

            cardEl.dataset.status = card.status;
            cardEl.dataset.expiresAt = card.expiresAt;
            cardEl.dataset.isSeller = String(card.isCurrentUserSeller);
            cardEl.dataset.isBuyer = String(card.isCurrentUserBuyer);

            const statusEl = cardEl.querySelector('.context-card-status');
            if (statusEl) statusEl.innerHTML = statusBadgeHtml(card.status);

            const timerEl = cardEl.querySelector('.context-card-timer');
            if (timerEl) {
                const terminal = ['Completed', 'Cancelled', 'Declined', 'Expired'];
                timerEl.style.display = terminal.includes(card.status) ? 'none' : '';
            }

            const actionsEl = cardEl.querySelector('.context-card-actions');
            if (actionsEl) {
                actionsEl.innerHTML = actionsHtml(card);
                bindButtons(cardEl);
            }

            console.log('[ContextCard] UI updated for card', card.id, '→', card.status);
        }

        function bindButtons(cardEl) {
            cardEl.querySelectorAll('.context-card-action').forEach(btn => {
                btn.addEventListener('click', async function () {
                    const action = ACTION_MAP[this.dataset.action];
                    if (!action) return;
                    const cardId = parseInt(this.dataset.contextCardId, 10);

                    disableButtons(cardEl);
                    try {
                        const updated = await callUpdateApi(cardId, action);
                        updateContextCardUI(updated);
                    } catch (err) {
                        console.error('[ContextCard] Action failed:', err);
                        alert('Could not perform action: ' + err.message);
                        enableButtons(cardEl);
                    }
                });
            });

            cardEl.querySelectorAll('.payment-option').forEach(btn => {
                btn.addEventListener('click', async function () {
                    const payment = PAYMENT_MAP[this.dataset.payment];
                    if (!payment) return;

                    // Skip if button is disabled
                    if (this.disabled || this.classList.contains('disabled')) {
                        return;
                    }

                    const cardId = parseInt(this.dataset.contextCardId, 10);
                    const targetCardEl = document.querySelector(`.context-card[data-context-card-id="${cardId}"]`);
                    const itemPrice = targetCardEl?.querySelector('.context-card-price')?.textContent || '';

                    // Confirmation dialog for Wallet payment
                    if (payment === 'Wallet') {
                        const confirmed = confirm(`Confirm Wallet Payment\n\nYou are about to pay ${itemPrice} from your wallet.\n\nThis action cannot be undone.\n\nDo you want to proceed?`);
                        if (!confirmed) {
                            return; // User cancelled
                        }
                    }

                    disableButtons(targetCardEl);
                    try {
                        const updated = await callUpdateApi(cardId, 'SelectPayment', payment);
                        updateContextCardUI(updated);
                    } catch (err) {
                        console.error('[ContextCard] Payment selection failed:', err);
                        alert('Could not select payment: ' + err.message);
                        enableButtons(targetCardEl);
                    }
                });
            });
        }

        function disableButtons(cardEl) {
            cardEl.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => (b.disabled = true));
        }

        function enableButtons(cardEl) {
            cardEl.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => (b.disabled = false));
        }

        function initialize() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.context-card').forEach(cardEl => bindButtons(cardEl));
            console.log('[ContextCard] Initialized', document.querySelectorAll('.context-card').length, 'card(s)');
        }

        window.contextCardHandler = {
            updateContextCardUI,
            contextCardDataCache: new Map(),
        };

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initialize);
        } else {
            initialize();
        }
    })();
</script>

--- Views\Chat\_ConversationList.cshtml ---
﻿@* Views/Chat/_ConversationList.cshtml *@
@model List<ThriftLoop.DTOs.Chat.ConversationDTO>

@if (Model == null || Model.Count == 0)
{
    <div class="chat-empty-state">
        <svg width="64" height="64" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
            <path d="M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z" />
        </svg>
        <h3>No messages yet</h3>
        <p>Start a conversation with someone!</p>
    </div>
}
else
{
    @foreach (var conv in Model)
    {
        <partial name="_ConversationListItem" model="conv" />
    }
}

--- Views\Chat\_ConversationListItem.cshtml ---
﻿@* Views/Chat/_ConversationListItem.cshtml *@
@model ThriftLoop.DTOs.Chat.ConversationDTO

@{
    var itemClass = Model.UnreadCount > 0 ? "conversation-item unread" : "conversation-item";
    var timeString = GetRelativeTime(Model.LastMessageAt);
}

<a href="@Url.Action("Conversation", new { id = Model.Id })" class="@itemClass" data-conversation-id="@Model.Id">
    <div class="conversation-avatar">
        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.OtherUserAvatarUrl))
        {
            <img src="@Model.OtherUserAvatarUrl" alt="@Model.OtherUserName" />
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="avatar-placeholder">
                @GetInitials(Model.OtherUserName)
            </div>
        }
    </div>

    <div class="conversation-content">
        <div class="conversation-header">
            <span class="conversation-name" title="@Model.OtherUserName">@Truncate(Model.OtherUserName, 25)</span>
            <span class="conversation-time" title="@Model.LastMessageAt.ToLocalTime().ToString("f")">@timeString</span>
        </div>

        <div class="conversation-preview">
            @if (Model.LastMessageIsFromCurrentUser)
            {
                <span class="you-prefix">You: </span>
            }
            <span class="last-message" title="@Model.LastMessage">@Truncate(Model.LastMessage, 35)</span>
            
            @if (Model.UnreadCount > 0)
            {
                <span class="unread-badge">@GetBadgeCount(Model.UnreadCount)</span>
            }
        </div>

        @if (Model.LastMessageIsFromCurrentUser)
        {
            <div class="message-status">
                @Html.Raw(GetStatusIcon(Model.LastMessageStatus))
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</a>

@functions {
    private string GetRelativeTime(DateTime timestamp)
    {
        var now = DateTime.UtcNow;
        var localTime = timestamp.ToLocalTime();
        var diff = now - timestamp;

        if (diff.TotalMinutes < 1)
            return "just now";
        if (diff.TotalMinutes < 60)
            return $"{(int)diff.TotalMinutes}m";
        if (diff.TotalHours < 24)
            return $"{(int)diff.TotalHours}h";
        if (diff.TotalDays < 7)
            return $"{(int)diff.TotalDays}d";
        
        return localTime.ToString("MMM d");
    }

    private string Truncate(string text, int maxLength)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text) || text.Length <= maxLength)
            return text ?? string.Empty;
        return text.Substring(0, maxLength) + "...";
    }

    private string GetBadgeCount(int count)
    {
        return count > 99 ? "99+" : count.ToString();
    }

    private string GetInitials(string name)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name))
            return "?";
        
        var parts = name.Split(' ', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
        if (parts.Length >= 2)
            return $"{parts[0][0]}{parts[1][0]}".ToUpper();
        
        return name.Substring(0, 1).ToUpper();
    }

    private string GetStatusIcon(string status)
    {
        return status?.ToLower() switch
        {
            "read" => @"
                <svg width='14' height='14' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='#34B7F1' stroke-width='2'>
                    <path d='M20 6L9 17l-5-5'/>
                    <path d='M16 6l-7 7 5 5 7-7'/>
                </svg>",
            "delivered" => @"
                <svg width='14' height='14' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'>
                    <path d='M20 6L9 17l-5-5'/>
                    <path d='M16 6l-7 7'/>
                </svg>",
            "sent" => @"
                <svg width='14' height='14' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'>
                    <path d='M20 6L9 17l-5-5'/>
                </svg>",
            _ => ""
        };
    }
}

--- Views\Chat\_MessageBubble.cshtml ---
﻿@* Views/Chat/_MessageBubble.cshtml *@
@model ThriftLoop.DTOs.Chat.MessageDTO

@{
    var bubbleClass = Model.BubbleClass;
    var statusIcon = Model.IsFromCurrentUser ? GetStatusIcon(Model.Status) : "";
}

@if (Model.IsEventBubble)
{
    @* Event/Status bubble - centered, no avatar, for system messages *@
    <div class="@bubbleClass"
         data-message-id="@Model.Id"
         data-sender-id=""
         data-status="@Model.Status.ToString().ToLower()"
         data-message-type="@((int)Model.MessageType)"
         id="message-@Model.Id">
        <div class="event-content">
            <span class="event-text">@Model.Content</span>
            <span class="event-time">@Model.FormattedTime</span>
        </div>
    </div>
}
else
{
    @* Regular message bubble *@
    <div class="@bubbleClass"
         data-message-id="@Model.Id"
         data-sender-id="@Model.SenderId"
         data-status="@Model.Status.ToString().ToLower()"
         data-message-type="@((int)Model.MessageType)"
         id="message-@Model.Id">
    
        @if (!Model.IsFromCurrentUser)
        {
            <div class="message-avatar">
                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.SenderAvatarUrl))
                {
                    <img src="@Model.SenderAvatarUrl" alt="@Model.SenderName" />
                }
                else
                {
                    <div class="avatar-placeholder small">
                        @Model.SenderName.Substring(0, 1).ToUpper()
                    </div>
                }
            </div>
        }

        <div class="message-content-wrapper">
            @if (!Model.IsFromCurrentUser)
            {
                <span class="message-sender">@Model.SenderName</span>
            }

            <div class="message-content">
                <p class="message-text">@Html.Raw(FormatMessageContent(Model.Content))</p>
            
                <div class="message-meta">
                    <span class="message-time">@Model.FormattedTime</span>
                
                    @if (Model.IsFromCurrentUser)
                    {
                        <span class="message-status" data-status="@Model.Status.ToString().ToLower()">
                            @Html.Raw(statusIcon)
                        </span>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        @if (Model.IsFromCurrentUser)
        {
            <div class="message-avatar-placeholder"></div>
        }
    </div>
}

@functions {
    private string GetStatusIcon(ThriftLoop.Enums.MessageStatus status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            ThriftLoop.Enums.MessageStatus.Read => @"
                <svg width='16' height='16' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='#34B7F1' stroke-width='2'>
                    <path d='M20 6L9 17l-5-5'/>
                    <path d='M16 6l-7 7 5 5 7-7'/>
                </svg>",
            ThriftLoop.Enums.MessageStatus.Delivered => @"
                <svg width='16' height='16' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'>
                    <path d='M20 6L9 17l-5-5'/>
                    <path d='M16 6l-7 7'/>
                </svg>",
            ThriftLoop.Enums.MessageStatus.Sent => @"
                <svg width='16' height='16' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'>
                    <path d='M20 6L9 17l-5-5'/>
                </svg>",
            _ => ""
        };
    }

    private string FormatMessageContent(string content)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(content))
            return content;

        // Escape HTML
        content = System.Net.WebUtility.HtmlEncode(content);
        
        // Convert URLs to clickable links
        var urlPattern = @"(https?:\/\/[^\s]+)";
        content = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(content, urlPattern,
            "<a href=\"$1\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">$1</a>");
        
        // Convert line breaks to <br />
        content = content.Replace("\n", "<br />");
        
        return content;
    }
}

<script>
    (function() {
        // Modal functionality for the search modal
        const modal = document.getElementById('userSearchModal');
        const searchInput = document.getElementById('userSearchInput');
        const clearBtn = document.getElementById('clearSearchBtn');
        const searchResults = document.getElementById('userSearchResults');
        const searchLoading = document.getElementById('searchLoading');
        const selectedUserId = document.getElementById('selectedUserId');
        const selectedUserDisplay = document.getElementById('selectedUserDisplay');
        const newMessageForm = document.getElementById('newMessageForm');
        const startChatBtn = document.getElementById('startChatBtn');
        const changeUserBtn = document.getElementById('changeUserBtn');
        const initialMessage = document.getElementById('initialMessage');
        const charCount = document.getElementById('charCount');
        
        let searchTimeout = null;
        let selectedUserData = null;
        
        // Character count for message
        if (initialMessage) {
            initialMessage.addEventListener('input', function() {
                const count = this.value.length;
                charCount.textContent = count;
            });
        }
        
        // Clear search
        if (clearBtn) {
            clearBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                searchInput.value = '';
                clearBtn.style.display = 'none';
                showEmptyState();
            });
        }
        
        // Search input
        if (searchInput) {
            searchInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                const query = this.value.trim();
                clearBtn.style.display = query ? 'block' : 'none';
                
                if (searchTimeout) {
                    clearTimeout(searchTimeout);
                }
                
                if (query.length < 2) {
                    showEmptyState();
                    return;
                }
                
                searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => performSearch(query), 300);
            });
        }
        
        // Change user button
        if (changeUserBtn) {
            changeUserBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                newMessageForm.style.display = 'none';
                searchResults.style.display = 'block';
                searchInput.disabled = false;
                searchInput.focus();
            });
        }
        
        function showEmptyState() {
            searchResults.innerHTML = `
                <div class="search-empty-state">
                    <svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                        <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/>
                        <path d="M21 21l-4.35-4.35"/>
                    </svg>
                    <p>Type at least 2 characters to search for users</p>
                </div>
            `;
        }
        
        async function performSearch(query) {
            searchLoading.style.display = 'flex';
            searchResults.innerHTML = '';
            
            try {
                const response = await fetch(`/Chat/SearchUsers?query=${encodeURIComponent(query)}`);
                const users = await response.json();
                
                searchLoading.style.display = 'none';
                
                if (users.length === 0) {
                    searchResults.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="search-empty-state">
                            <p>No users found</p>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    return;
                }
                
                renderSearchResults(users);
            } catch (error) {
                searchLoading.style.display = 'none';
                searchResults.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="search-empty-state">
                        <p>Error searching. Please try again.</p>
                    </div>
                `;
            }
        }
        
        function renderSearchResults(users) {
            const template = document.getElementById('userSearchResultTemplate').innerHTML;
            let html = '';
            
            users.forEach(user => {
                let itemHtml = template
                    .replace(/{{userId}}/g, user.id)
                    .replace(/{{userName}}/g, user.name)
                    .replace(/{{userEmail}}/g, user.email)
                    .replace(/{{conversationId}}/g, user.existingConversationId || '')
                    .replace(/{{avatarUrl}}/g, user.avatarUrl || '')
                    .replace(/{{initials}}/g, getInitials(user.name))
                    .replace(/{{#hasExistingConversation}}([\s\S]*?){{\/hasExistingConversation}}/g,
                        user.existingConversationId ? '$1' : '');
                
                html += itemHtml;
            });
            
            searchResults.innerHTML = html;
            
            // Add click handlers
            searchResults.querySelectorAll('.user-search-item').forEach(item => {
                item.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    selectUser({
                        id: this.dataset.userId,
                        name: this.dataset.userName,
                        email: this.dataset.userEmail,
                        conversationId: this.dataset.conversationId
                    });
                });
            });
        }
        
        function selectUser(user) {
            selectedUserData = user;
            selectedUserId.value = user.id;
            
            // Render selected user
            const template = document.getElementById('selectedUserTemplate').innerHTML;
            const html = template
                .replace(/{{userId}}/g, user.id)
                .replace(/{{userName}}/g, user.name)
                .replace(/{{userEmail}}/g, user.email)
                .replace(/{{avatarUrl}}/g, user.avatarUrl || '')
                .replace(/{{initials}}/g, getInitials(user.name));
            
            selectedUserDisplay.innerHTML = html;
            
            // Switch to message form
            searchResults.style.display = 'none';
            newMessageForm.style.display = 'block';
            searchInput.disabled = true;
            startChatBtn.disabled = false;
            
            initialMessage.focus();
        }
        
        function getInitials(name) {
            if (!name) return '?';
            const parts = name.split(' ').filter(p => p);
            if (parts.length >= 2) {
                return (parts[0][0] + parts[1][0]).toUpperCase();
            }
            return name.substring(0, 1).toUpperCase();
        }
        
        // If there's an existing conversation, redirect instead of showing form
        window.checkExistingConversation = function(userId, conversationId) {
            if (conversationId) {
                window.location.href = `/Chat/Conversation/${conversationId}`;
                return true;
            }
            return false;
        };
    })();
</script>

--- Views\Chat\Conversation.cshtml ---
﻿﻿@* Views/Chat/Conversation.cshtml *@
@model ThriftLoop.DTOs.Chat.ConversationDetailDTO

<div class="chat-container">
    @* Sidebar *@
    <div class="chat-sidebar" id="chatSidebar">
        <div class="chat-sidebar-header">
            <h2>Messages</h2>

                <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">

                </div>
                <div class="chat-user-info">

                        <path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2" />

                    </svg>
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>

        @* Messages Area *@
        <div class="chat-messages" id="messageContainer">
            @if (Model.HasMoreMessages)
            {
                <div class="load-more-container">
                    <button type="button" class="btn-load-more-messages" id="loadOlderMessages" data-page="@(Model.Page + 1)" data-has-more="true">
                        Load older messages
                    </button>
                </div>
            }

            <div class="messages-list" id="messagesList">
                @foreach (var message in Model.Messages)
                {
                    if (message.MessageType == MessageType.ContextCard && message.ContextCard != null)
                    {
                        <partial name="_ContextCard" model="message.ContextCard" />
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <partial name="_MessageBubble" model="message" />
                    }
                }
            </div>

            <div id="typingIndicator" class="typing-indicator hidden">
                <span></span>
                <span></span>
                <span></span>
                <span class="typing-text">@Model.OtherUserName is typing...</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        @* Message Input Area *@
        <div class="chat-input-area">
            <form id="messageForm" class="message-form">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <input type="hidden" id="conversationId" value="@Model.Id" />
                <input type="hidden" id="recipientId" value="@Model.OtherUserId" />
                
                <textarea id="messageInput"
                          class="message-input"
                          placeholder="Type a message..."
                          rows="1"
                          maxlength="2000"
                          autocomplete="off"></textarea>
                
                <button type="submit" class="btn-send" id="sendMessageBtn" disabled>
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path d="M22 2L11 13M22 2l-7 20-4-9-9-4 20-7z" />
                    </svg>
                </button>
            </form>
            <small class="char-count"><span id="messageCharCount">0</span>/2000</small>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@* New Message Modal *@
<div class="modal" id="newMessageModal" tabindex="-1">
    <div class="modal-dialog">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h3>New message</h3>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-dismiss="modal">&times;</button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body">
                <partial name="_UserSearchModal" />
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/microsoft-signalr/7.0.5/signalr.min.js"></script>
    <script src="~/js/chat.js" asp-append-version="true"></script>
    <script>
        // BUG FIX 3: Set chatConfig IMMEDIATELY (synchronously) so it's available when chat.js loads
        window.chatConfig = {
        conversationId: @Model.Id,
        currentUserId: @(Context.User.FindFirst(System.Security.Claims.ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value ?? "0"),
        otherUserId: @Model.OtherUserId,
        otherUserName: '@Html.Raw(Model.OtherUserName)',
        prefillMessage: ''
        };

        console.log('Chat config set. chat.js will initialize when DOM ready.');

        // Auto-scroll to bottom on page load/refresh
        (function() {
        function scrollToBottomImmediate() {
        const messageContainer = document.getElementById('messageContainer');
        if (messageContainer) {
        messageContainer.scrollTop = messageContainer.scrollHeight;
        }
        }
            
        // Try immediate scroll
        scrollToBottomImmediate();
            
        // Also scroll after short delays to ensure images and dynamic content are loaded
        setTimeout(scrollToBottomImmediate, 100);
        setTimeout(scrollToBottomImmediate, 300);
        setTimeout(scrollToBottomImmediate, 500);
        setTimeout(scrollToBottomImmediate, 1000);
            
        // Use MutationObserver to detect when new messages are added
        const messagesList = document.getElementById('messagesList');
        if (messagesList) {
        const observer = new MutationObserver(function() {
        scrollToBottomImmediate();
        });
        observer.observe(messagesList, { childList: true, subtree: true });
        }
        })();

        // Global error handler to catch all JavaScript errors
        window.addEventListener('error', function(event) {
        console.error('Global JavaScript error:', {
        message: event.message,
        filename: event.filename,
        lineno: event.lineno,
        colno: event.colno,
        stack: event.error?.stack
        });
        });

        // Global unhandled promise rejection handler
        window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', function(event) {
        console.error('Unhandled promise rejection:', {
        reason: event.reason,
        stack: event.stack
        });
        });

        // Debug function to test SignalR connectivity
        window.testSignalRConnection = function() {
        console.log('=== SignalR Connection Test ===');
        console.log('Connection object:', window.connection);
        console.log('Connection state:', window.connection?.state);
        console.log('Connection ID:', window.connection?.connectionId);
        console.log('Current conversation ID:', window.chatConfig?.conversationId);
        console.log('ContextCard handler available:', !!window.contextCardHandler);
        console.log('updateContextCardUI function available:', !!(window.contextCardHandler && window.contextCardHandler.updateContextCardUI));
        console.log('ContextCard cache size:', window.contextCardHandler?.contextCardDataCache?.size || 0);
            
        // Test ContextCard update manually
        if (window.contextCardHandler && window.contextCardHandler.updateContextCardUI) {
        console.log('Testing manual ContextCard update...');
        const testContextCard = {
        id: 1,
        status: 'Pending',
        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 3600000).toISOString(), // 1 hour from now
        isCurrentUserSeller: false,
        isCurrentUserBuyer: true
        };
        window.contextCardHandler.updateContextCardUI(testContextCard);
        console.log('Manual update test completed');
        }
            
        // Test SignalR message sending
        if (window.connection && window.connection.state === 'Connected') {
        console.log('Testing SignalR ping...');
        window.connection.invoke('Ping').then(() => {
        console.log('SignalR ping successful');
        }).catch(err => {
        console.error('SignalR ping failed:', err);
        });
        } else {
        console.error('SignalR connection not available or not connected');
        }
        };

        // Auto-run test after 3 seconds
        setTimeout(() => {
        console.log('Auto-running SignalR test...');
        window.testSignalRConnection();
        }, 3000);
    </script>
}

                    Load more

    </div>

                <path d="M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z" />

            <h2>Your messages</h2>
            <p>Select a conversation or start a new one</p>
            <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" id="newMessageEmptyBtn">New message</button>

</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script src="~/js/chat-inbox.js" asp-append-version="true"></script>
}

@functions {
    private string GetRelativeTime(DateTime timestamp)
    {
        var now = DateTime.UtcNow;
        var diff = now - timestamp;

        if (diff.TotalMinutes < 1)
            return "just now";
        if (diff.TotalMinutes < 60)
            return $"{(int)diff.TotalMinutes}m";
        if (diff.TotalHours < 24)
            return $"{(int)diff.TotalHours}h";
        if (diff.TotalDays < 7)
            return $"{(int)diff.TotalDays}d";
        
        return timestamp.ToLocalTime().ToString("MMM d");
    }

    private string Truncate(string text, int maxLength)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text) || text.Length <= maxLength)
            return text;
        return text.Substring(0, maxLength) + "...";
    }

    private string GetBadgeCount(int count)
    {
        return count > 99 ? "99+" : count.ToString();
    }

    private string GetStatusIcon(string status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Read" => "✓✓",
            "Delivered" => "✓✓",
            "Sent" => "✓",
            _ => ""
        };
    }
}

--- Views\Home\Index.cshtml ---
@model ThriftLoop.ViewModels.HomeIndexViewModel
@using ThriftLoop.Models
@using ThriftLoop.ViewModels
@using System.Text.Json
@using ThriftLoop.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "For You";
    Layout = null;

    var maxPrice = Model.Items.Any() ? (int)Math.Ceiling((double)Model.Items.Max(i => i.Price)) : 100000;
    ViewBag.MaxPrice = maxPrice;

    // Helper to get location preview - skip last 3 parts, if 4+ remain skip first part
    string GetLocationPreview(string? address)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(address))
            return "Unknown";

        var parts = address.Split(',', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)
                           .Select(p => p.Trim())
                           .Where(p => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(p))
                           .ToList();

        if (parts.Count <= 3)
            return address.Trim(); // Too short, return as-is

        // Skip last 3 parts (country, region, province)
        var remaining = parts.Take(parts.Count - 3).ToList();

        // If 4+ parts remain, skip the first one (street address detail)
        if (remaining.Count >= 4)
            remaining = remaining.Skip(1).ToList();

        return string.Join(", ", remaining);
    }
}

<html lang="en">

                        Clear filters
                    </button>

                <div class="fy-grid" id="itemGrid">
                    @foreach (var item in Model.Items)
                    {
                        var isOwner = Model.CurrentUserId.HasValue && item.UserId == Model.CurrentUserId.Value;
                        var isStealable = item.ListingType == ListingType.Stealable;
                        var isReserved = item.Status == ItemStatus.Reserved;
                        var isSold = item.Status == ItemStatus.Sold;
                        var isShopItem = item.ShopId.HasValue;
                        var hasDiscount = item.HasActiveDiscount;
                        var imagesJson = JsonSerializer.Serialize(item.ImageUrls);

                        // Calculate expiry text
                        string? expiryText = null;
                        if (hasDiscount && item.DiscountExpiresAt.HasValue)
                        {
                            var timeLeft = item.DiscountExpiresAt.Value - DateTime.UtcNow;
                            if (timeLeft.TotalDays >= 1)
                            {
                                var days = (int)timeLeft.TotalDays;
                                expiryText = $"{days}d left";
                            }
                            else if (timeLeft.TotalHours >= 1)
                            {
                                var hours = (int)timeLeft.TotalHours;
                                expiryText = $"{hours}h left";
                            }
                            else if (timeLeft.TotalMinutes > 0)
                            {
                                var mins = (int)timeLeft.TotalMinutes;
                                expiryText = $"{mins}m left";
                            }
                        }

                        // Get price display string (without "From" prefix since we'll add it separately)
                        var priceDisplay = Model.ShopItemPriceDisplay.ContainsKey(item.Id)
                            ? Model.ShopItemPriceDisplay[item.Id]
                            : "₱" + item.Price.ToString("N2");
                        
                        // Check if price string is long (more than 15 chars)
                        var isLongPrice = priceDisplay.Length > 15;

                                 data-category="@item.Category"
                                 data-condition="@item.Condition"
                                 data-price="@item.Price.ToString("F2", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)"
                                 data-title="@item.Title.ToLower()"
                                 data-desc="@item.Description.ToLower()">

                                {
