<body>
    @await Html.PartialAsync("_Navbar")

    <div class="mp-shell">

        <header class="mp-header">
            <div>
                <h1 class="mp-header__title">My Purchases</h1>
                <p class="mp-header__subtitle">
                    @Model.Count order@(Model.Count == 1 ? "" : "s") placed
                </p>
            </div>
            <div class="mp-header__actions">
                <a asp-action="Index" asp-controller="Wallet" class="btn btn--ghost mp-wallet-link">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="15" height="15" aria-hidden="true">
                        <path d="M1 4.25a3.733 3.733 0 012-.575h13.5c.43 0 .845.069 1.232.198A2.25 2.25 0 0015.5 3h-11a3 3 0 00-3 3v1.25H1V4.25z" />
                        <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M1 8.5v6A2.5 2.5 0 003.5 17h13a2.5 2.5 0 002.5-2.5v-6A2.5 2.5 0 0016.5 6h-13A2.5 2.5 0 001 8.5zm14.5 3a1 1 0 100 2 1 1 0 000-2z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                    </svg>
                    My Wallet
                </a>
                <a asp-action="Index" asp-controller="Home" class="btn btn--ghost mp-header__cta">
                    Browse listings
                </a>
            </div>
        </header>

        @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] is string successMsg)
        {
            <div class="mp-toast mp-toast--success" id="mpToast" role="status">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="18" height="18" aria-hidden="true">
                    <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.857-9.809a.75.75 0 00-1.214-.882l-3.483 4.79-1.88-1.88a.75.75 0 10-1.06 1.061l2.5 2.5a.75.75 0 001.137-.089l4-5.5z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                </svg>
                @successMsg
            </div>
        }
        @if (TempData["InfoMessage"] is string infoMsg)
        {
            <div class="mp-toast mp-toast--info" id="mpToast" role="status">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="18" height="18" aria-hidden="true">
                    <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M18 10a8 8 0 11-16 0 8 8 0 0116 0zm-7-4a1 1 0 11-2 0 1 1 0 012 0zM9 9a.75.75 0 000 1.5h.253a.25.25 0 01.244.304l-.459 2.066A1.75 1.75 0 0010.747 15H11a.75.75 0 000-1.5h-.253a.25.25 0 01-.244-.304l.459-2.066A1.75 1.75 0 009.253 9H9z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                </svg>
                @infoMsg
            </div>
        }
        @if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] is string errMsg)
        {
            <div class="mp-toast mp-toast--error" id="mpToast" role="alert">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="18" height="18" aria-hidden="true">
                    <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M18 10a8 8 0 11-16 0 8 8 0 0116 0zm-8-5a.75.75 0 01.75.75v4.5a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0v-4.5A.75.75 0 0110 5zm0 10a1 1 0 100-2 1 1 0 000 2z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                </svg>
                @errMsg
            </div>
        }

        @if (!Model.Any())
        {
            <div class="mp-empty">
                <div class="mp-empty__icon" aria-hidden="true">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4">
                        <rect x="8" y="16" width="48" height="36" rx="6" />
                        <path d="M22 16v-4a10 10 0 0120 0v4" stroke-linecap="round" />
                        <path d="M24 36h16" stroke-linecap="round" />
                    </svg>
                </div>
                <h2 class="mp-empty__title">No purchases yet</h2>
                <p class="mp-empty__body">Items you confirm will appear here.</p>
                <a asp-action="Index" asp-controller="Home" class="btn btn--primary mp-empty__cta">
                    Browse listings
                </a>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="mp-list">
                @foreach (var order in Model)
                {
                    var sellerEmail = order.Seller?.Email ?? string.Empty;
                    var sellerDisplay = sellerEmail.Contains('@') ? sellerEmail.Split('@')[0] : sellerEmail;

                    string statusClass = order.Status switch
                    {
                        OrderStatus.Pending => "mp-status--pending",
                        OrderStatus.Completed => "mp-status--completed",
                        OrderStatus.Cancelled => "mp-status--cancelled",
                        _ => ""
                    };

                    string statusLabel = order.Status switch
                    {
                        OrderStatus.Pending => "Pending",
                        OrderStatus.Completed => "Completed",
                        OrderStatus.Cancelled => "Cancelled",
                        _ => order.Status.ToString()
                    };

                    string payLabel = order.PaymentMethod switch
                    {
                        PaymentMethod.Wallet => "Wallet (escrow)",
                        PaymentMethod.Cash => "Cash on Delivery",
                        _ => order.PaymentMethod.ToString()
                    };

                    // Check delivery status to determine if buyer can confirm receipt
                    bool canMarkDelivered = order.Status == OrderStatus.Pending
                        && order.Delivery != null
                        && order.Delivery.Status == DeliveryStatus.Delivered;
                    
                    // Show delivery status message
                    string deliveryStatusMessage = order.Delivery?.Status switch
                    {
                        DeliveryStatus.Available => "Waiting for a rider to accept this delivery.",
                        DeliveryStatus.Accepted => "A rider has accepted your delivery and is on the way to pick up the item.",
                        DeliveryStatus.PickedUp => "Rider has picked up your item and is en route.",
                        DeliveryStatus.Delivered => "Rider has delivered your item. Please confirm receipt.",
                        DeliveryStatus.Completed => "Delivery completed. Thank you!",
                        _ => "Delivery pending."
                    };

                    <article class="mp-row">

                        <div class="mp-row__img-wrap">
                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(order.Item?.ImageUrl))
                            {
                                <img src="@order.Item.ImageUrl" alt="@order.Item?.Title"
                                     class="mp-row__img" loading="lazy" />
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="mp-row__img mp-row__img--placeholder" aria-hidden="true">
                                    <svg viewBox="0 0 32 32" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4">
                                        <rect x="3" y="5" width="26" height="22" rx="3" />
                                        <circle cx="11" cy="13" r="3" />
                                        <path d="M3 23l8-7 5 5 4-3 9 7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
                                    </svg>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>

                        <div class="mp-row__body">
                            <div class="mp-row__top">
                                <h3 class="mp-row__title">
                                    @(order.Item?.Title ?? "Item #" + order.ItemId)
                                </h3>
                                <span class="mp-status @statusClass">@statusLabel</span>
                            </div>

                            <p class="mp-row__seller">Seller: @sellerDisplay</p>

                            @* Payment method pill *@
                            <p class="mp-row__pay">
                                <span class="mp-pay-pill mp-pay-pill--@(order.PaymentMethod == PaymentMethod.Wallet ? "wallet" : "cod")">
                                    @if (order.PaymentMethod == PaymentMethod.Wallet)
                                    {
                                        <svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor" width="10" height="10" aria-hidden="true">
                                            <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M1 3.5A1.5 1.5 0 012.5 2h9A1.5 1.5 0 0113 3.5v7A1.5 1.5 0 0111.5 12h-9A1.5 1.5 0 011 10.5v-7zm10.5 2.5a.75.75 0 100 1.5.75.75 0 000-1.5z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                                        </svg>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor" width="10" height="10" aria-hidden="true">
                                            <path d="M7 1a6 6 0 100 12A6 6 0 007 1zm.6 8.9H6.4V6.4h1.2v3.5zm0-4.6H6.4V4.1h1.2v1.2z" />
                                        </svg>
                                    }
                                    @payLabel
                                </span>
                            </p>

                            @* Delivery status message *@
                            @if (order.Delivery != null)
                            {
                                <p class="mp-row__delivery" style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6b7280; margin: 0.5rem 0;">
                                    📦 @deliveryStatusMessage
                                </p>
                            }

                            <p class="mp-row__date">
                                Ordered
                                <time datetime="@order.OrderDate.ToString("yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ")">
                                    @order.OrderDate.ToString("MMMM d, yyyy · h:mm tt") UTC
                                </time>
                            </p>

                            @* Mark Delivered — only visible when delivery is in Delivered state *@
                            @if (canMarkDelivered)
                            {
                                <form asp-action="MarkDelivered"
                                      asp-controller="Orders"
                                      asp-route-orderId="@order.Id"
                                      method="post"
                                      class="mp-deliver-form"
                                      onsubmit="return confirm('Confirm receipt of this order? This will release payment to the seller.');">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <button type="submit" class="mp-deliver-btn">
                                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="14" height="14" aria-hidden="true">
                                            <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M16.704 4.153a.75.75 0 01.143 1.052l-8 10.5a.75.75 0 01-1.127.075l-4.5-4.5a.75.75 0 011.06-1.06l3.894 3.893 7.48-9.817a.75.75 0 011.05-.143z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                                        </svg>
                                        I have received this item
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            }
                        </div>

                        <div class="mp-row__price-col">
                            <span class="mp-row__price">₱@order.FinalPrice.ToString("N2")</span>
                            <span class="mp-row__price-label">Final price</span>
                        </div>

                    </article>
                }
            </div>
        }

    </div>

    <script>
            (function () {
                'use strict';
                var toast = document.getElementById('mpToast');
                if (toast) {
                    setTimeout(function () {
                        toast.style.opacity = '0';
                        setTimeout(function () { toast.remove(); }, 400);
                    }, 5000);
                }
            }());
    </script>
</body>
</html>

--- Views\Rider\ActiveDelivery.cshtml ---
﻿@model ThriftLoop.Models.Delivery
@using ThriftLoop.Models
@using ThriftLoop.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Active Delivery";
    var riderName = ViewBag.RiderName as string ?? "Rider";
    var riderLat = ViewBag.RiderLatitude as decimal?;
    var riderLng = ViewBag.RiderLongitude as decimal?;
    Layout = null;

    var order = Model?.Order;
    var item = order?.Item;
    var buyer = order?.Buyer;
    
    // Determine seller info
    string sellerName;
    string sellerAddress;
    string sellerContact;
    decimal? sellerLat = null;
    decimal? sellerLng = null;
    
    if (item?.ShopId != null && item?.Shop != null)
    {
        sellerName = item.Shop.ShopName;
        sellerAddress = item.Shop.StoreAddress ?? "Store address not provided";
        sellerContact = item.Shop.User?.Email?.Split('@')[0] ?? "Seller";
        sellerLat = item.Shop.Latitude;
        sellerLng = item.Shop.Longitude;
    }
    else if (order?.Seller != null)
    {
        sellerName = order.Seller.Email?.Split('@')[0] ?? "Seller";
        sellerAddress = order.Seller.Address ?? "Address not provided";
        sellerContact = order.Seller.PhoneNumber ?? order.Seller.Email ?? "No contact";
        sellerLat = order.Seller.Latitude;
        sellerLng = order.Seller.Longitude;
    }
    else
    {
        sellerName = "Unknown Seller";
        sellerAddress = "Address not available";
        sellerContact = "No contact info";
    }
    
    var buyerName = buyer?.Email?.Split('@')[0] ?? "Buyer";
    var buyerAddress = buyer?.Address ?? "Address not provided";
    var buyerContact = buyer?.PhoneNumber ?? buyer?.Email ?? "No contact";
    var buyerLat = buyer?.Latitude;
    var buyerLng = buyer?.Longitude;
    
    var itemPrice = (order?.FinalPrice ?? 0m) - (order?.DeliveryFee ?? 0m);
    var deliveryFee = order?.DeliveryFee ?? 50m;
    
    string GetStatusClass()
    {
        return Model?.Status switch
        {
            DeliveryStatus.Accepted => "status-accepted",
            DeliveryStatus.PickedUp => "status-pickedup",
            DeliveryStatus.Delivered => "status-delivered",
            DeliveryStatus.Completed => "status-completed",
            _ => "status-default"
        };
    }
    
    string GetStatusText()
    {
        return Model?.Status switch
        {
            DeliveryStatus.Accepted => "Accepted - En Route to Seller",
            DeliveryStatus.PickedUp => "Picked Up - En Route to Buyer",
            DeliveryStatus.Delivered => "Delivered - Awaiting Confirmation",
            DeliveryStatus.Completed => "Completed",
            _ => Model?.Status.ToString() ?? "Unknown"
        };
    }
}

<body>
    <partial name="_Navbar" />

    <div class="active-delivery-container">
        <a href="@Url.Action("Index")" class="back-link">
            ← Back to Dashboard
        </a>

        @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] is string successMsg)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-success">✅ @successMsg</div>
        }
        @if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] is string errMsg)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-error">❌ @errMsg</div>
        }

        @if (Model == null)
        {
            <div class="empty-state">
                <h3>No active delivery found</h3>
                <p>You don't have an active delivery at the moment.</p>
                <a href="@Url.Action("Index")" style="display: inline-block; margin-top: 20px; color: #2d1b69;">Browse available jobs →</a>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="delivery-card">
                <!-- Status Header -->
                <div class="status-header">
                    <span class="status-badge @GetStatusClass()">@GetStatusText()</span>
                    <h1>@(item?.Title ?? $"Item #{order?.ItemId}")</h1>
                    <p>Delivery #@Model.Id • Accepted @(Model.AcceptedAt?.ToString("MMM d, h:mm tt") ?? "Just now")</p>
                </div>

                <!-- Progress Steps -->
                <div class="progress-steps">
                    <div class="step completed">
                        <div class="step-icon">✓</div>
                        <div class="step-content">
                            <div class="step-label">Step 1</div>
                            <div class="step-title">Accepted</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="step-connector @(Model.Status != DeliveryStatus.Accepted ? "completed" : "")"></div>
                    <div class="step @(Model.Status != DeliveryStatus.Accepted ? "completed" : "active")">
                        <div class="step-icon">@(Model.Status != DeliveryStatus.Accepted ? "✓" : "2")</div>
                        <div class="step-content">
                            <div class="step-label">Step 2</div>
                            <div class="step-title">Pickup</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="step-connector @(Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Delivered || Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Completed ? "completed" : "")"></div>
                    <div class="step @(Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Delivered || Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Completed ? "completed" : (Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.PickedUp ? "active" : ""))">
                        <div class="step-icon">@(Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Delivered || Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Completed ? "✓" : "3")</div>
                        <div class="step-content">
                            <div class="step-label">Step 3</div>
                            <div class="step-title">Delivery</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="step-connector @(Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Completed ? "completed" : "")"></div>
                    <div class="step @(Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Completed ? "completed" : "")">
                        <div class="step-icon">@(Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Completed ? "✓" : "4")</div>
                        <div class="step-content">
                            <div class="step-label">Step 4</div>
                            <div class="step-title">Confirmed</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Item Info -->
                <div class="item-section">
                    <div class="item-image">
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item?.ImageUrl))
                        {
                            <img src="@item.ImageUrl" alt="@item.Title" />
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #a39e98; font-size: 1.5rem;">📦</div>
                        }
                    </div>
                    <div class="item-details">
                        <h2>@(item?.Title ?? $"Item #{order?.ItemId}")</h2>
                        <div class="item-meta">
                            <span>@(item?.Category ?? "General")</span>
                            <span>•</span>
                            <span>@(item?.Condition ?? "N/A")</span>
                            <span>•</span>
                            <span>Seller: @sellerName</span>
                        </div>
                        <span class="payment-badge @(order?.PaymentMethod == PaymentMethod.Wallet ? "wallet" : "cod")">
                            @(order?.PaymentMethod == PaymentMethod.Wallet ? "Wallet Payment" : "Cash on Delivery")
                        </span>
                        <div class="route-toggle">
                            <label>
                                <input type="checkbox" id="showRoadRoute" checked> Show actual road route
                            </label>
                            <span style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #a39e98;">(powered by OSRM)</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Map -->
                <div class="map-section">
                    <div id="deliveryMap"></div>
                    <div class="route-loading" id="routeLoading">
                        <div class="route-loading-spinner"></div>
                        <span>Calculating road route...</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="route-error" id="routeError">
                        ⚠️ Could not calculate road route. Showing straight-line distance instead.
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Distance Summary -->
                <div class="distance-summary">
                    <div class="distance-block" id="currentLegBlock">
                        <div class="distance-block-label" id="currentLegLabel">
                            <span>📍 Current Leg</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="distance-block-value" id="currentLegDistance">--</div>
                        <div class="distance-note" id="currentLegNote"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="distance-block">
                        <div class="distance-block-label">
                            <span>📏 Total Route</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="distance-block-value" id="totalRouteDistance">--</div>
                        <div class="distance-note" id="totalRouteNote"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Locations -->
                <div class="locations-section">
                    @if (riderLat.HasValue && riderLng.HasValue)
                    {
                        <div class="location-card">
                            <div class="location-icon current">🚴</div>
                            <div class="location-content">
                                <div class="location-label">Your Current Location</div>
                                <div class="location-address">@ViewBag.RiderAddress</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                    
                    <div class="location-card">
                        <div class="location-icon pickup">📦</div>
                        <div class="location-content">
                            <div class="location-label">Pickup from Seller</div>
                            <div class="location-address">@sellerAddress</div>
                            <div class="location-contact">@sellerName • @sellerContact</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="location-card">
                        <div class="location-icon dropoff">🏠</div>
                        <div class="location-content">
                            <div class="location-label">Deliver to Buyer</div>
                            <div class="location-address">@buyerAddress</div>
                            <div class="location-contact">@buyerName • @buyerContact</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Earnings -->
                <div class="earnings-section">
                    <div class="earnings-row">
                        <span class="earnings-label">Item Price (goes to seller)</span>
                        <span class="earnings-value">₱@itemPrice.ToString("N2")</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="earnings-row">
                        <span class="earnings-label">🚚 Your Delivery Fee</span>
                        <span class="earnings-value highlight">₱@deliveryFee.ToString("N2")</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="earnings-divider"></div>
                    <div class="earnings-row">
                        <span class="earnings-label">Order Total</span>
                        <span class="earnings-value" style="font-weight: 600;">₱@((order?.FinalPrice ?? 0m).ToString("N2"))</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Actions -->
                <div class="action-section">
                    @if (Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Accepted)
                    {
                        <form asp-action="MarkPickedUp" method="post">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                            <input type="hidden" name="deliveryId" value="@Model.Id" />
                            <button type="submit" class="action-btn primary" onclick="return confirm('Confirm you have picked up the item from the seller?')">
                                ✓ Mark as Picked Up
                            </button>
                        </form>
                    }
                    else if (Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.PickedUp)
                    {
                        <form asp-action="MarkDelivered" method="post">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                            <input type="hidden" name="deliveryId" value="@Model.Id" />
                            <button type="submit" class="action-btn success" onclick="return confirm('Confirm you have delivered the item to the buyer?')">
                                ✓ Mark as Delivered
                            </button>
                        </form>
                    }
                    else if (Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Delivered)
                    {
                        <div class="action-message waiting">
                            ⏳ Awaiting buyer confirmation...
                        </div>
                    }
                    else if (Model.Status == DeliveryStatus.Completed)
                    {
                        <div class="action-message completed">
                            🎉 Delivery completed successfully!
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        }
    </div>

    <script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
    <script>
        (function() {
            // Coordinates from server
            var sellerLat = @(sellerLat?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            var sellerLng = @(sellerLng?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            var buyerLat = @(buyerLat?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            var buyerLng = @(buyerLng?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            var riderLat = @(riderLat?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            var riderLng = @(riderLng?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            var status = '@Model?.Status';
            
            // DOM elements
            var map = L.map('deliveryMap');
            var routeLayer = null;
            var currentLegLayer = null;
            var straightLineLayer = null;
            var showRoadRouteCheckbox = document.getElementById('showRoadRoute');
            var routeLoading = document.getElementById('routeLoading');
            var routeError = document.getElementById('routeError');
            
            // Distance display elements
            var currentLegLabel = document.getElementById('currentLegLabel');
            var currentLegDistance = document.getElementById('currentLegDistance');
            var currentLegNote = document.getElementById('currentLegNote');
            var totalRouteDistance = document.getElementById('totalRouteDistance');
            var totalRouteNote = document.getElementById('totalRouteNote');
            
            // Add tile layer
            L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
                attribution: '&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors'
            }).addTo(map);
            
            // Store markers
            var markers = [];
            var bounds = L.latLngBounds();
            var sellerMarker = null, buyerMarker = null, riderMarker = null;
            
            // Add seller marker
            if (sellerLat && sellerLng) {
                sellerMarker = L.marker([sellerLat, sellerLng])
                    .bindPopup('📦 Pickup: Seller')
                    .addTo(map);
                markers.push(sellerMarker);
                bounds.extend([sellerLat, sellerLng]);
            }
            
            // Add buyer marker
            if (buyerLat && buyerLng) {
                buyerMarker = L.marker([buyerLat, buyerLng])
                    .bindPopup('🏠 Dropoff: Buyer')
                    .addTo(map);
                markers.push(buyerMarker);
                bounds.extend([buyerLat, buyerLng]);
            }
            
            // Add rider marker
            if (riderLat && riderLng) {
                riderMarker = L.marker([riderLat, riderLng], {
                    icon: L.divIcon({ 
                        className: 'rider-marker', 
                        html: '<div style="background: #2d1b69; color: white; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;">🚴 You</div>', 
                        iconSize: [60, 28] 
                    })
                }).bindPopup('📍 Your Location').addTo(map);
                markers.push(riderMarker);
                bounds.extend([riderLat, riderLng]);
            }
            
            // Fit map to show all markers
            if (bounds.isValid()) {
                map.fitBounds(bounds, { padding: [40, 40] });
            } else {
                map.setView([14.5995, 120.9842], 12);
            }
            
            // Helper: Calculate straight-line distance
            function calculateStraightDistance(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) {
                if (!lat1 || !lon1 || !lat2 || !lon2) return null;
                var R = 6371;
                var dLat = (lat2 - lat1) * Math.PI / 180;
                var dLon = (lon2 - lon1) * Math.PI / 180;
                var a = Math.sin(dLat/2) * Math.sin(dLat/2) +
                        Math.cos(lat1 * Math.PI/180) * Math.cos(lat2 * Math.PI/180) *
                        Math.sin(dLon/2) * Math.sin(dLon/2);
                var c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1-a));
                return R * c;
            }
            
            // Helper: Format distance
            function formatDistance(km) {
                if (km === null || km === undefined) return '--';
                if (km < 1) return (km * 1000).toFixed(0) + ' m';
                return km.toFixed(1) + ' km';
            }
            
            // Helper: Get distance class
            function getDistanceClass(km) {
                if (km === null || km === undefined) return '';
                if (km < 3) return 'near';
                if (km < 10) return 'medium';
                return 'far';
            }
            
            // Calculate straight-line distances
            var straightSellerToBuyer = calculateStraightDistance(sellerLat, sellerLng, buyerLat, buyerLng);
            var straightRiderToSeller = calculateStraightDistance(riderLat, riderLng, sellerLat, sellerLng);
            var straightRiderToBuyer = calculateStraightDistance(riderLat, riderLng, buyerLat, buyerLng);
            
            // Function to update distance display
            function updateDistanceDisplay(currentDist, currentIsRoad, totalDist, totalIsRoad) {
                // Current leg
                if (currentDist) {
                    currentLegDistance.textContent = formatDistance(currentDist);
                    currentLegDistance.className = 'distance-block-value ' + getDistanceClass(currentDist);
                    currentLegNote.textContent = currentIsRoad ? '🚗 Driving distance' : '📏 Straight-line';
                } else {
                    currentLegDistance.textContent = '--';
                    currentLegNote.textContent = '';
                }
                
                // Total route
                if (totalDist) {
                    totalRouteDistance.textContent = formatDistance(totalDist);
                    totalRouteDistance.className = 'distance-block-value ' + getDistanceClass(totalDist);
                    totalRouteNote.textContent = totalIsRoad ? '🚗 Driving distance' : '📏 Straight-line';
                } else {
                    totalRouteDistance.textContent = '--';
                    totalRouteNote.textContent = '';
                }
            }
            
            // Update labels based on status
            if (status === 'Accepted' || status === '0') {
                currentLegLabel.innerHTML = '<span>📍 To Pickup (Seller)</span>';
                updateDistanceDisplay(straightRiderToSeller, false, straightSellerToBuyer, false);
            } else if (status === 'PickedUp' || status === '2') {
                currentLegLabel.innerHTML = '<span>📍 To Dropoff (Buyer)</span>';
                updateDistanceDisplay(straightRiderToBuyer, false, straightSellerToBuyer, false);
            } else {
                updateDistanceDisplay(null, false, straightSellerToBuyer, false);
            }
            
            // Draw straight line between seller and buyer (fallback)
            if (sellerLat && sellerLng && buyerLat && buyerLng) {
                straightLineLayer = L.polyline([[sellerLat, sellerLng], [buyerLat, buyerLng]], {
                    color: '#a39e98',
                    weight: 2,
                    dashArray: '5, 5',
                    opacity: 0.6
                }).addTo(map).bindPopup('Straight-line distance');
            }
            
            // Function to fetch OSRM route
            async function fetchOSRMRoute(startLat, startLng, endLat, endLng) {
                if (!startLat || !startLng || !endLat || !endLng) return null;
                
                var url = `https://router.project-osrm.org/route/v1/driving/${startLng},${startLat};${endLng},${endLat}?overview=full&geometries=geojson`;
                
                try {
                    var response = await fetch(url);
                    if (!response.ok) throw new Error('OSRM request failed');
                    
                    var data = await response.json();
                    if (!data.routes || data.routes.length === 0) throw new Error('No route found');
                    
                    return data.routes[0];
                } catch (error) {
                    console.warn('OSRM routing failed:', error);
                    return null;
                }
            }
            
            // Function to draw route on map
            function drawRoute(routeData, color, weight, dashArray, popupText) {
                if (!routeData || !routeData.geometry) return null;
                
                var coordinates = routeData.geometry.coordinates.map(function(c) {
                    return [c[1], c[0]];
                });
                
                return L.polyline(coordinates, {
                    color: color,
                    weight: weight,
                    opacity: 0.8,
                    dashArray: dashArray
                }).bindPopup(popupText + ': ' + formatDistance(routeData.distance / 1000));
            }
            
            // Function to load and display road routes
            async function loadRoadRoutes() {
                routeLoading.classList.add('show');
                routeError.classList.remove('show');
                
                var roadSellerToBuyer = null;
                var roadCurrentLeg = null;
                
                // Fetch seller to buyer route (total route)
                if (sellerLat && sellerLng && buyerLat && buyerLng) {
                    var route = await fetchOSRMRoute(sellerLat, sellerLng, buyerLat, buyerLng);
                    if (route) {
                        roadSellerToBuyer = {
                            distance: route.distance / 1000,
                            duration: route.duration,
                            geometry: route.geometry
                        };
                    }
                }
                
                // Fetch current leg route based on status
                if (status === 'Accepted' || status === '0') {
                    if (riderLat && riderLng && sellerLat && sellerLng) {
                        var route = await fetchOSRMRoute(riderLat, riderLng, sellerLat, sellerLng);
                        if (route) {
                            roadCurrentLeg = {
                                distance: route.distance / 1000,
                                duration: route.duration,
                                geometry: route.geometry
                            };
                        }
                    }
                } else if (status === 'PickedUp' || status === '2') {
                    if (riderLat && riderLng && buyerLat && buyerLng) {
                        var route = await fetchOSRMRoute(riderLat, riderLng, buyerLat, buyerLng);
                        if (route) {
                            roadCurrentLeg = {
                                distance: route.distance / 1000,
                                duration: route.duration,
                                geometry: route.geometry
                            };
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                // Clear existing route layers
                if (routeLayer) map.removeLayer(routeLayer);
                if (currentLegLayer) map.removeLayer(currentLegLayer);
                
                // Draw new routes
                if (roadSellerToBuyer) {
                    routeLayer = drawRoute(roadSellerToBuyer, '#2d1b69', 4, null, '🚗 Delivery route');
                    if (routeLayer) routeLayer.addTo(map);
                }
                
                if (roadCurrentLeg) {
                    currentLegLayer = drawRoute(roadCurrentLeg, '#b45309', 3, '8, 6', 
                        status === 'Accepted' || status === '0' ? '📍 Route to pickup' : '📍 Route to dropoff');
                    if (currentLegLayer) currentLegLayer.addTo(map);
                }
                
                // Update distance display
                var currentDist = roadCurrentLeg ? roadCurrentLeg.distance : 
                    (status === 'Accepted' || status === '0' ? straightRiderToSeller : straightRiderToBuyer);
                var totalDist = roadSellerToBuyer ? roadSellerToBuyer.distance : straightSellerToBuyer;
                
                updateDistanceDisplay(currentDist, !!roadCurrentLeg, totalDist, !!roadSellerToBuyer);
                
                // Show error if total route failed
                if (!roadSellerToBuyer) {
                    routeError.classList.add('show');
                }
                
                routeLoading.classList.remove('show');
            }
            
            // Toggle between road and straight-line routes
            showRoadRouteCheckbox.addEventListener('change', function() {
                if (this.checked) {
                    if (straightLineLayer) map.removeLayer(straightLineLayer);
                    loadRoadRoutes();
                } else {
                    if (routeLayer) map.removeLayer(routeLayer);
                    if (currentLegLayer) map.removeLayer(currentLegLayer);
                    if (straightLineLayer) straightLineLayer.addTo(map);
                    
                    var currentDist = (status === 'Accepted' || status === '0') ? straightRiderToSeller : straightRiderToBuyer;
                    updateDistanceDisplay(currentDist, false, straightSellerToBuyer, false);
                    routeError.classList.remove('show');
                }
            });
            
            // Load road routes by default
            if (sellerLat && sellerLng && buyerLat && buyerLng) {
                loadRoadRoutes();
                if (straightLineLayer) map.removeLayer(straightLineLayer);
            } else {
                routeError.classList.add('show');
                routeError.textContent = '⚠️ Location coordinates not available. Showing straight-line distance.';
            }
            
        })();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

--- Views\Rider\DeliveryDetails.cshtml ---
﻿@model ThriftLoop.Models.Delivery
@using ThriftLoop.Models
@using ThriftLoop.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Delivery Details";
    var riderName = ViewBag.RiderName as string ?? "Rider";
    var riderLat = ViewBag.RiderLatitude as decimal?;
    var riderLng = ViewBag.RiderLongitude as decimal?;
    Layout = null;

    var order = Model.Order;
    var item = order?.Item;
    var buyer = order?.Buyer;
    
    // Determine seller info
    string sellerName;
    string sellerAddress;
    string sellerContact;
    decimal? sellerLat = null;
    decimal? sellerLng = null;
    
    if (item?.ShopId != null && item?.Shop != null)
    {
        sellerName = item.Shop.ShopName;
        sellerAddress = item.Shop.StoreAddress ?? "Store address not provided";
        sellerContact = item.Shop.User?.Email?.Split('@')[0] ?? "Seller";
        sellerLat = item.Shop.Latitude;
        sellerLng = item.Shop.Longitude;
    }
    else if (order?.Seller != null)
    {
        sellerName = order.Seller.Email?.Split('@')[0] ?? "Seller";
        sellerAddress = order.Seller.Address ?? "Address not provided";
        sellerContact = order.Seller.PhoneNumber ?? order.Seller.Email ?? "No contact";
        sellerLat = order.Seller.Latitude;
        sellerLng = order.Seller.Longitude;
    }
    else
    {
        sellerName = "Unknown Seller";
        sellerAddress = "Address not available";
        sellerContact = "No contact info";
    }
    
    var buyerName = buyer?.Email?.Split('@')[0] ?? "Buyer";
    var buyerAddress = buyer?.Address ?? "Address not provided";
    var buyerContact = buyer?.PhoneNumber ?? buyer?.Email ?? "No contact";
    var buyerLat = buyer?.Latitude;
    var buyerLng = buyer?.Longitude;
    
    var itemPrice = (order?.FinalPrice ?? 0m) - (order?.DeliveryFee ?? 0m);
    var deliveryFee = order?.DeliveryFee ?? 50m;
}

    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/site.css" asp-append-version="true" />
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Navbar.css" asp-append-version="true" />

    <style>
        .details-container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px; }

        .route-loading.show { display: flex; }
        .route-loading-spinner { width: 20px; height: 20px; border: 3px solid #e2ddd6; border-top-color: #2d1b69; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; }
        @@keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
        
        .route-error { position: absolute; bottom: 16px; left: 16px; right: 16px; background: #fee9e9; color: #b91c1c; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.875rem; z-index: 1000; display: none; }
        .route-error.show { display: block; }
        
        .distance-summary { padding: 20px 24px; display: flex; gap: 32px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd6; }
        .distance-block { flex: 1; }
        .distance-block-label { font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b6560; margin-bottom: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
        .distance-block-value { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; }
        .distance-block-value small { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #6b6560; margin-left: 4px; }
        .distance-block-value.near { color: #0e6245; }
        .distance-block-value.medium { color: #b45309; }
        .distance-block-value.far { color: #6b6560; }
        .distance-note { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #a39e98; margin-top: 4px; }
        
        .locations-section { padding: 24px; }
        .location-card { display: flex; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
        .location-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .location-icon.pickup { background: #e8f3ef; color: #0e6245; }
        .location-icon.dropoff { background: #fef3c7; color: #b45309; }
        .location-content { flex: 1; }
        .location-label { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; }
        .location-address { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 4px; }
        .location-contact { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6b6560; }
        
        .earnings-section { padding: 20px 24px; background: #faf8f5; border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd6; }
        .earnings-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 6px 0; }
        .earnings-label { color: #6b6560; }
        .earnings-value { font-weight: 500; }
        .earnings-value.highlight { color: #0e6245; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.25rem; }
        .earnings-divider { height: 1px; background: #e2ddd6; margin: 12px 0; }
        
        .action-section { padding: 20px 24px; display: flex; gap: 16px; border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd6; }
        .accept-btn { flex: 1; padding: 16px 24px; background: #2d1b69; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; }
        .accept-btn:hover { background: #3d2880; }
        .accept-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
        .cancel-btn { padding: 16px 24px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #e2ddd6; border-radius: 12px; color: #6b6560; text-decoration: none; }
        .cancel-btn:hover { background: #f5f3f0; }
        
        .route-toggle { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 0; }
        .route-toggle label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #6b6560; }
        .route-toggle input { accent-color: #2d1b69; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <partial name="_Navbar" />

    <div class="details-container">
        <a href="@Url.Action("Index")" class="back-link">
            ← Back to available deliveries
        </a>

        <div class="details-card">
            <!-- Item Info -->
            <div class="item-section">
                <div class="item-image">
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item?.ImageUrl))
                    {
                        <img src="@item.ImageUrl" alt="@item.Title" />
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #a39e98; font-size: 2rem;">📦</div>
                    }
                </div>
                <div class="item-details">
                    <h1>@(item?.Title ?? $"Item #{order?.ItemId}")</h1>
                    <div class="item-meta">
                        <span>@(item?.Category ?? "General")</span>
                        <span>•</span>
                        <span>@(item?.Condition ?? "N/A")</span>
                        <span>•</span>
                        <span>Seller: @sellerName</span>
                    </div>
                    <span class="payment-badge @(order?.PaymentMethod == PaymentMethod.Wallet ? "wallet" : "cod")">
                        @(order?.PaymentMethod == PaymentMethod.Wallet ? "Wallet Payment" : "Cash on Delivery")
                    </span>
                    <div class="route-toggle" style="margin-top: 12px;">
                        <label>
                            <input type="checkbox" id="showRoadRoute" checked> Show actual road route

                        <span style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #a39e98;">(powered by OSRM)</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Map -->
            <div class="map-section">
                <div id="deliveryMap"></div>
                <div class="route-loading" id="routeLoading">
                    <div class="route-loading-spinner"></div>
                    <span>Calculating road route...</span>
                </div>
                <div class="route-error" id="routeError">
                    ⚠️ Could not calculate road route. Showing straight-line distance instead.
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Distance Summary -->
            <div class="distance-summary">
                <div class="distance-block">
                    <div class="distance-block-label">
                        <span>📍 From You to Pickup</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="distance-block-value" id="riderToSellerDistance">--</div>
                    <div class="distance-note" id="riderToSellerNote"></div>
                </div>

                    <div class="distance-block-label">
                        <span>📏 Delivery Route</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="distance-block-value" id="deliveryRouteDistance">--</div>
                    <div class="distance-note" id="deliveryRouteNote"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Locations -->
            <div class="locations-section">
                <div class="location-card">
                    <div class="location-icon pickup">📦</div>
                    <div class="location-content">
                        <div class="location-label">Pickup from Seller</div>
                        <div class="location-address">@sellerAddress</div>
                        <div class="location-contact">@sellerName • @sellerContact</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="location-card">
                    <div class="location-icon dropoff">🏠</div>
                    <div class="location-content">
                        <div class="location-label">Deliver to Buyer</div>
                        <div class="location-address">@buyerAddress</div>
                        <div class="location-contact">@buyerName • @buyerContact</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Earnings -->
            <div class="earnings-section">
                <div class="earnings-row">
                    <span class="earnings-label">Item Price (goes to seller)</span>
                    <span class="earnings-value">₱@itemPrice.ToString("N2")</span>
                </div>
                <div class="earnings-row">
                    <span class="earnings-label">🚚 Your Delivery Fee</span>
                    <span class="earnings-value highlight">₱@deliveryFee.ToString("N2")</span>
                </div>
                <div class="earnings-divider"></div>
                <div class="earnings-row">
                    <span class="earnings-label">Order Total</span>
                    <span class="earnings-value" style="font-weight: 600;">₱@((order?.FinalPrice ?? 0m).ToString("N2"))</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Actions -->
            <div class="action-section">
                <form asp-action="AcceptJob" method="post" style="flex: 1; display: flex;">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <input type="hidden" name="deliveryId" value="@Model.Id" />
                    <button type="submit" class="accept-btn" onclick="return confirm('Accept this delivery job? You will be committed to completing this delivery.')">
                        Accept Delivery Job

    <script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
    <script>
        (function() {
            // Coordinates from server
            var sellerLat = @(sellerLat?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            var sellerLng = @(sellerLng?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            var buyerLat = @(buyerLat?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            var buyerLng = @(buyerLng?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            var riderLat = @(riderLat?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            var riderLng = @(riderLng?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? "null");
            
            // DOM elements
            var map = L.map('deliveryMap');
            var routeLayer = null;
            var riderToSellerLayer = null;
            var showRoadRouteCheckbox = document.getElementById('showRoadRoute');
            var routeLoading = document.getElementById('routeLoading');
            var routeError = document.getElementById('routeError');
            
            // Distance display elements
            var riderToSellerEl = document.getElementById('riderToSellerDistance');
            var riderToSellerNote = document.getElementById('riderToSellerNote');
            var deliveryRouteEl = document.getElementById('deliveryRouteDistance');
            var deliveryRouteNote = document.getElementById('deliveryRouteNote');
            
            // Add tile layer
            L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
                attribution: '&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors'
            }).addTo(map);
            
            // Store markers
            var markers = [];
            var bounds = L.latLngBounds();
            
            // Add seller marker
            if (sellerLat && sellerLng) {
                var sellerMarker = L.marker([sellerLat, sellerLng])
                    .bindPopup('📦 Pickup: Seller')
                    .addTo(map);
                markers.push(sellerMarker);
                bounds.extend([sellerLat, sellerLng]);
            }
            
            // Add buyer marker
            if (buyerLat && buyerLng) {
                var buyerMarker = L.marker([buyerLat, buyerLng])
                    .bindPopup('🏠 Dropoff: Buyer')
                    .addTo(map);
                markers.push(buyerMarker);
                bounds.extend([buyerLat, buyerLng]);
            }
            
            // Add rider marker
            if (riderLat && riderLng) {
                var riderMarker = L.marker([riderLat, riderLng], {
                    icon: L.divIcon({ 
                        className: 'rider-marker', 
                        html: '<div style="background: #2d1b69; color: white; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;">🚴 You</div>', 
                        iconSize: [60, 28] 
                    })
                }).bindPopup('📍 Your Location').addTo(map);
                markers.push(riderMarker);
                bounds.extend([riderLat, riderLng]);
            }
            
            // Fit map to show all markers
            if (bounds.isValid()) {
                map.fitBounds(bounds, { padding: [40, 40] });
            } else {
                map.setView([14.5995, 120.9842], 12); // Default to Manila
            }
            
            // Helper: Calculate straight-line distance
            function calculateStraightDistance(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) {
                var R = 6371;
                var dLat = (lat2 - lat1) * Math.PI / 180;
                var dLon = (lon2 - lon1) * Math.PI / 180;
                var a = Math.sin(dLat/2) * Math.sin(dLat/2) +
                        Math.cos(lat1 * Math.PI/180) * Math.cos(lat2 * Math.PI/180) *
                        Math.sin(dLon/2) * Math.sin(dLon/2);
                var c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1-a));
                return R * c;
            }
            
            // Helper: Format distance
            function formatDistance(km) {
                if (km < 1) return (km * 1000).toFixed(0) + ' m';
                return km.toFixed(1) + ' km';
            }
            
            // Helper: Get distance class
            function getDistanceClass(km) {
                if (km < 3) return 'near';
                if (km < 10) return 'medium';
                return 'far';
            }
            
            // Calculate and display straight-line distances
            var straightSellerToBuyer = null;
            var straightRiderToSeller = null;
            
            if (sellerLat && sellerLng && buyerLat && buyerLng) {
                straightSellerToBuyer = calculateStraightDistance(sellerLat, sellerLng, buyerLat, buyerLng);
            }
            
            if (riderLat && riderLng && sellerLat && sellerLng) {
                straightRiderToSeller = calculateStraightDistance(riderLat, riderLng, sellerLat, sellerLng);
            }
            
            // Function to update distance display
            function updateDistanceDisplay(riderDist, riderIsRoad, deliveryDist, deliveryIsRoad) {
                // Rider to Seller
                if (riderDist) {
                    riderToSellerEl.textContent = formatDistance(riderDist);
                    riderToSellerEl.className = 'distance-block-value ' + getDistanceClass(riderDist);
                    riderToSellerNote.textContent = riderIsRoad ? '🚗 Driving distance' : '📏 Straight-line distance';
                } else {
                    riderToSellerEl.textContent = '--';
                    riderToSellerNote.textContent = '';
                }
                
                // Delivery Route
                if (deliveryDist) {
                    deliveryRouteEl.textContent = formatDistance(deliveryDist);
                    deliveryRouteEl.className = 'distance-block-value ' + getDistanceClass(deliveryDist);
                    deliveryRouteNote.textContent = deliveryIsRoad ? '🚗 Driving distance' : '📏 Straight-line distance';
                } else {
                    deliveryRouteEl.textContent = '--';
                    deliveryRouteNote.textContent = '';
                }
            }
            
            // Show straight-line distances initially
            updateDistanceDisplay(straightRiderToSeller, false, straightSellerToBuyer, false);
            
            // Draw straight line between seller and buyer (always show as fallback)
            var straightLineLayer = null;
            if (sellerLat && sellerLng && buyerLat && buyerLng) {
                straightLineLayer = L.polyline([[sellerLat, sellerLng], [buyerLat, buyerLng]], {
                    color: '#a39e98',
                    weight: 2,
                    dashArray: '5, 5',
                    opacity: 0.6
                }).addTo(map).bindPopup('Straight-line distance');
            }
            
            // Function to fetch OSRM route
            async function fetchOSRMRoute(startLat, startLng, endLat, endLng) {
                var url = `https://router.project-osrm.org/route/v1/driving/${startLng},${startLat};${endLng},${endLat}?overview=full&geometries=geojson`;
                
                try {
                    var response = await fetch(url);
                    if (!response.ok) throw new Error('OSRM request failed');
                    
                    var data = await response.json();
                    if (!data.routes || data.routes.length === 0) throw new Error('No route found');
                    
                    return data.routes[0];
                } catch (error) {
                    console.warn('OSRM routing failed:', error);
                    return null;
                }
            }
            
            // Function to draw route on map
            function drawRoute(routeData, color, weight, dashArray, popupText) {
                if (!routeData || !routeData.geometry) return null;
                
                var coordinates = routeData.geometry.coordinates.map(function(c) {
                    return [c[1], c[0]]; // GeoJSON [lng, lat] -> Leaflet [lat, lng]
                });
                
                return L.polyline(coordinates, {
                    color: color,
                    weight: weight,
                    opacity: 0.8,
                    dashArray: dashArray
                }).bindPopup(popupText + ': ' + formatDistance(routeData.distance / 1000));
            }
            
            // Function to load and display road routes
            async function loadRoadRoutes() {
                routeLoading.classList.add('show');
                routeError.classList.remove('show');
                
                var roadSellerToBuyer = null;
                var roadRiderToSeller = null;
                
                // Fetch seller to buyer route
                if (sellerLat && sellerLng && buyerLat && buyerLng) {
                    var route = await fetchOSRMRoute(sellerLat, sellerLng, buyerLat, buyerLng);
                    if (route) {
                        roadSellerToBuyer = {
                            distance: route.distance / 1000, // meters to km
                            duration: route.duration,
                            geometry: route.geometry
                        };
                    }
                }
                
                // Fetch rider to seller route
                if (riderLat && riderLng && sellerLat && sellerLng) {
                    var route = await fetchOSRMRoute(riderLat, riderLng, sellerLat, sellerLng);
                    if (route) {
                        roadRiderToSeller = {
                            distance: route.distance / 1000,
                            duration: route.duration,
                            geometry: route.geometry
                        };
                    }
                }
                
                // Clear existing route layers
                if (routeLayer) map.removeLayer(routeLayer);
                if (riderToSellerLayer) map.removeLayer(riderToSellerLayer);
                
                // Draw new routes
                if (roadSellerToBuyer) {
                    routeLayer = drawRoute(roadSellerToBuyer, '#2d1b69', 4, null, '🚗 Delivery route');
                    if (routeLayer) routeLayer.addTo(map);
                }
                
                if (roadRiderToSeller) {
                    riderToSellerLayer = drawRoute(roadRiderToSeller, '#b45309', 3, '8, 6', '📍 Route to pickup');
                    if (riderToSellerLayer) riderToSellerLayer.addTo(map);
                }
                
                // Update distance display
                var riderDist = roadRiderToSeller ? roadRiderToSeller.distance : straightRiderToSeller;
                var deliveryDist = roadSellerToBuyer ? roadSellerToBuyer.distance : straightSellerToBuyer;
                
                updateDistanceDisplay(riderDist, !!roadRiderToSeller, deliveryDist, !!roadSellerToBuyer);
                
                // Show error if any route failed
                if (!roadSellerToBuyer || !roadRiderToSeller) {
                    routeError.classList.add('show');
                }
                
                routeLoading.classList.remove('show');
            }
            
            // Toggle between road and straight-line routes
            showRoadRouteCheckbox.addEventListener('change', function() {
                if (this.checked) {
                    // Show road routes
                    if (straightLineLayer) map.removeLayer(straightLineLayer);
                    loadRoadRoutes();
                } else {
                    // Show straight-line only
                    if (routeLayer) map.removeLayer(routeLayer);
                    if (riderToSellerLayer) map.removeLayer(riderToSellerLayer);
                    if (straightLineLayer) straightLineLayer.addTo(map);
                    
                    updateDistanceDisplay(straightRiderToSeller, false, straightSellerToBuyer, false);
                    routeError.classList.remove('show');
                }
            });
            
            // Load road routes by default (since checkbox is checked)
            if (sellerLat && sellerLng && buyerLat && buyerLng) {
                loadRoadRoutes();
            } else {
                routeError.classList.add('show');
                routeError.textContent = '⚠️ Location coordinates not available. Showing straight-line distance.';
            }
            
            // Hide straight line when road route is shown
            if (straightLineLayer) map.removeLayer(straightLineLayer);
            
        })();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

--- Views\Rider\EditApplication.cshtml ---

        <main class="rider-body">

            @if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] is string errMsg)

                <div class="rider-error-banner" role="alert">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm-.75-4.75a.75.75 0 001.5 0v-4.5a.75.75 0 00-1.5 0v4.5zm.75-7a.75.75 0 110 1.5.75.75 0 010-1.5z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>

            <form asp-action="EditApplication" asp-controller="Rider"

                    <!-- Vehicle & License Details -->
                    <div class="rider-section">
                        <h2 class="rider-section__title">

                            Vehicle &amp; License Details
                        </h2>

                        <div class="field">
                            <label asp-for="DriversLicense" class="field__label"></label>
                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ExistingLicenseUrl))
                            {
                                <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
                                    <img src="@Model.ExistingLicenseUrl" alt="Current license" style="max-width: 200px; border-radius: 0.5rem;" />

                                </div>

                            <label class="file-upload" id="licenseUploadLabel">

                            </label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="DriversLicense" class="field__error"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="field-row">
                            <div class="field">
                                <label asp-for="VehicleType" class="field__label"></label>
                                <div class="field__select-wrapper">
                                    <select asp-for="VehicleType" class="field__input field__select">
                                        <option value="" disabled>Select type...</option>
                                        <option value="Motorcycle">Motorcycle</option>
                                        <option value="E-Bike">E-Bike</option>
                                        <option value="E-Scooter">E-Scooter</option>
                                        <option value="Bicycle">Bicycle</option>
                                        <option value="Car">Car</option>
                                        <option value="Van">Van</option>
                                    </select>
                                    <svg class="field__select-icon" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M5.22 8.22a.75.75 0 011.06 0L10 11.94l3.72-3.72a.75.75 0 111.06 1.06l-4.25 4.25a.75.75 0 01-1.06 0L5.22 9.28a.75.75 0 010-1.06z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>
                                </div>
                                <span asp-validation-for="VehicleType" class="field__error"></span>
                            </div>

                            <div class="field">
                                <label asp-for="VehicleColor" class="field__label"></label>
                                <input asp-for="VehicleColor" class="field__input" type="text" />
                                <span asp-validation-for="VehicleColor" class="field__error"></span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="field">
                            <label asp-for="LicensePlate" class="field__label"></label>
                            <input asp-for="LicensePlate" class="field__input" type="text" style="text-transform:uppercase;" />
                            <span asp-validation-for="LicensePlate" class="field__error"></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Account Security (Optional Password Change) -->
                    <div class="rider-section">
                        <h2 class="rider-section__title">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 1a4.5 4.5 0 00-4.5 4.5V9H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v6a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2v-6a2 2 0 00-2-2h-.5V5.5A4.5 4.5 0 0010 1zm3 8V5.5a3 3 0 10-6 0V9h6z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>
                            Change Password (Optional)
                        </h2>

                        <div class="field">
                            <label asp-for="NewPassword" class="field__label"></label>
                            <div class="field__input-wrapper">
                                <input asp-for="NewPassword" id="passwordInput" class="field__input" type="password" autocomplete="new-password" placeholder="Leave blank to keep current" />
                                <button type="button" class="toggle-password" aria-label="Toggle password visibility" onclick="togglePassword('passwordInput')">
                                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" /></svg>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <span asp-validation-for="NewPassword" class="field__error"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="field">
                            <label asp-for="ConfirmNewPassword" class="field__label"></label>
                            <div class="field__input-wrapper">
                                <input asp-for="ConfirmNewPassword" id="confirmPasswordInput" class="field__input" type="password" autocomplete="new-password" />
                                <button type="button" class="toggle-password" aria-label="Toggle confirm password visibility" onclick="togglePassword('confirmPasswordInput')">
                                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8-11-8-11-8z" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" /></svg>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <span asp-validation-for="ConfirmNewPassword" class="field__error"></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>

                <div class="rider-form-footer">
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn--primary">
                        Resubmit Application
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M3 10a.75.75 0 01.75-.75h10.638L10.23 5.29a.75.75 0 111.04-1.08l5.5 5.25a.75.75 0 010 1.08l-5.5 5.25a.75.75 0 11-1.04-1.08l4.158-3.96H3.75A.75.75 0 013 10z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg>

    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-validate/1.19.5/jquery.validate.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-validation-unobtrusive/3.2.12/jquery.validate.unobtrusive.min.js"></script>
    <script>
        function togglePassword(inputId) {
            const input = document.getElementById(inputId);
            input.type = input.type === 'password' ? 'text' : 'password';
        }

        function previewLicense(input) {
            const preview = document.getElementById('licensePreview');
            const body = document.getElementById('licenseUploadBody');
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                if (input.files[0].size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
                    alert('File exceeds 5 MB. Please choose a smaller image.');
                    input.value = '';
                    return;
                }
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function(e) {
                    preview.src = e.target.result;
                    preview.style.display = 'block';
                    body.style.display = 'none';
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            } else {
                preview.style.display = 'none';
                body.style.display = 'flex';
            }
        }

        document.querySelector('[name="LicensePlate"]')
            ?.addEventListener('blur', function() { this.value = this.value.toUpperCase(); });
    </script>
</body>
</html>

--- Views\Rider\History.cshtml ---
﻿@model IReadOnlyList<ThriftLoop.Models.Delivery>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Delivery History";
    Layout = null;
}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>@ViewData["Title"] - ThriftLoop</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/site.css" asp-append-version="true" />
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Navbar.css" asp-append-version="true" />
</head>
<body>
    <partial name="_Navbar" />

    <main class="container" style="max-width: 1280px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 0 1rem;">
        
        <div style="margin-bottom: 2rem;">
            <h1 style="font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700;">Delivery History</h1>
            <p style="color: #6b7280; margin-top: 0.5rem;">All deliveries you've completed or participated in.</p>
        </div>

        @if (!Model.Any())
        {
            <div style="text-align: center; padding: 4rem 2rem; background: #f9fafb; border-radius: 1rem;">
                <p style="font-size: 1.125rem; color: #6b7280;">No delivery history found.</p>
                <a asp-action="Index" asp-controller="Rider" style="color: #3b82f6; text-decoration: none; margin-top: 1rem; display: inline-block;">Browse available jobs</a>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem;">
                @foreach (var delivery in Model)
                {
                    var order = delivery.Order;
                    var item = order?.Item;
                    
                    // Determine completion time (prefer buyer confirmation, then rider delivery, then pickup)
                    DateTime? completionTime = delivery.ConfirmedByBuyerAt ?? delivery.DeliveredAt ?? delivery.PickedUpAt;
                    
                    <div style="background: white; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1.5rem;">
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start;">
                            <div>
                                <h3 style="font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
                                    @(item?.Title ?? "Item #" + order?.ItemId)
                                </h3>
                                <p style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.875rem;">
                                    Status: @delivery.Status
                                </p>
                                <p style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.875rem;">
                                    Accepted: @(delivery.AcceptedAt?.ToString("MMM d, yyyy") ?? "N/A")
                                </p>
                                <p style="color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.875rem;">
                                    Completed: @(completionTime?.ToString("MMM d, yyyy") ?? "In Progress")
                                </p>
                                @if (delivery.Status == ThriftLoop.Enums.DeliveryStatus.Completed)
                                {
                                    <p style="color: #059669; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500;">
                                        ✓ Buyer confirmed receipt
                                    </p>
                                }
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <span style="font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #059669;">
                                    ₱@(order?.FinalPrice.ToString("N2") ?? "0.00")
                                </span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>
        }
        
        <div style="margin-top: 2rem;">
            <a asp-action="Index" asp-controller="Rider" style="color: #3b82f6; text-decoration: none;">← Back to Dashboard</a>
        </div>
    </main>
</body>
</html>
