<body>
    <partial name="_Navbar" />

    @{
        var availableDeliveries = Model?.Where(d => d.Status == DeliveryStatus.Available).ToList() ?? new List<Delivery>();
    }

    <div class="rider-dashboard">
        <div class="rider-header">
            <div class="jobs-counter">📦 @availableDeliveries.Count available</div>
            <h1>Welcome back, @riderName!</h1>
            <p>Available deliveries near you</p>
        </div>

        @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] is string successMsg)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-success">✅ @successMsg</div>
        }
        @if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] is string errMsg)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-error">❌ @errMsg</div>
        }

        @if (!availableDeliveries.Any())
        {
            <div class="empty-state">
                <h3>No deliveries available</h3>
                <p>Check back later for new delivery requests.</p>
                <a asp-action="History">View History →</a>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="rider-jobs-grid">
                @foreach (var delivery in availableDeliveries)
                {
                    var order = delivery.Order;
                    var item = order?.Item;
                    var buyer = order?.Buyer;
                    
                    // Determine seller info
                    string sellerName;
                    decimal? sellerLat = null;
                    decimal? sellerLng = null;
                    
                    if (item?.ShopId != null && item?.Shop != null)
                    {
                        sellerName = item.Shop.ShopName;
                        sellerLat = item.Shop.Latitude;
                        sellerLng = item.Shop.Longitude;
                    }
                    else if (order?.Seller != null)
                    {
                        sellerName = order.Seller.Email?.Split('@')[0] ?? "Seller";
                        sellerLat = order.Seller.Latitude;
                        sellerLng = order.Seller.Longitude;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        sellerName = "Unknown Seller";
                    }
                    
                    var buyerLat = buyer?.Latitude;
                    var buyerLng = buyer?.Longitude;
                    var deliveryFee = order?.DeliveryFee ?? 50m;
                    
                    // Calculate distances
                    string deliveryDistanceText = "--";
                    string deliveryDistanceClass = "medium";
                    string riderDistanceText = "--";
                    string riderDistanceClass = "medium";
                    int deliveryBarWidth = 50;
                    int riderBarWidth = 50;
                    
                    if (sellerLat.HasValue && sellerLng.HasValue && buyerLat.HasValue && buyerLng.HasValue)
                    {
                        var deliveryDist = CalculateDistance((double)sellerLat.Value, (double)sellerLng.Value, (double)buyerLat.Value, (double)buyerLng.Value);
                        deliveryDistanceText = FormatDistance(deliveryDist);
                        deliveryDistanceClass = GetDistanceClass(deliveryDist);
                        deliveryBarWidth = Math.Min(100, (int)(deliveryDist / 15 * 100));
                    }
                    
                    if (riderLat.HasValue && riderLng.HasValue && sellerLat.HasValue && sellerLng.HasValue)
                    {
                        var riderDist = CalculateDistance((double)riderLat.Value, (double)riderLng.Value, (double)sellerLat.Value, (double)sellerLng.Value);
                        riderDistanceText = FormatDistance(riderDist);
                        riderDistanceClass = GetDistanceClass(riderDist);
                        riderBarWidth = Math.Min(100, (int)(riderDist / 15 * 100));
                    }

                    <a href="@Url.Action("DeliveryDetails", "Rider", new { id = delivery.Id })" class="job-card">
                        <div class="job-header">
                            <div class="job-image">
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item?.ImageUrl))
                                {
                                    <img src="@item.ImageUrl" alt="@item.Title" />
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #a39e98;">📦</div>
                                }
                            </div>
                            <div class="job-info">
                                <h3>@(item?.Title ?? $"Item #{order?.ItemId}")</h3>
                                <div class="job-meta">
                                    <span>@(item?.Category ?? "General")</span>
                                    <span>•</span>
                                    <span>@sellerName</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="distance-section">
                            <div class="distance-item">
                                <div class="distance-label">📏 Delivery Route</div>
                                <div class="distance-value @deliveryDistanceClass">@deliveryDistanceText</div>
                                <div class="distance-bar">
                                    <div class="distance-bar-fill @deliveryDistanceClass" style="width: @deliveryBarWidth%"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="distance-item">
                                <div class="distance-label">📍 From You</div>
                                <div class="distance-value @riderDistanceClass">@riderDistanceText</div>
                                <div class="distance-bar">
                                    <div class="distance-bar-fill @riderDistanceClass" style="width: @riderBarWidth%"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="earnings-footer">
                            <span class="payment-badge @(order?.PaymentMethod == PaymentMethod.Wallet ? "wallet" : "cod")">
                                @(order?.PaymentMethod == PaymentMethod.Wallet ? "Wallet" : "COD")
                            </span>
                            <span class="earnings">Earn ₱@deliveryFee.ToString("N2")</span>
                        </div>
                    </a>
                }
            </div>
        }
    </div>

    @functions {
        private double CalculateDistance(double lat1, double lon1, double lat2, double lon2)
        {
            const double R = 6371;
            var dLat = (lat2 - lat1) * Math.PI / 180.0;
            var dLon = (lon2 - lon1) * Math.PI / 180.0;
            var a = Math.Sin(dLat / 2) * Math.Sin(dLat / 2) +
                    Math.Cos(lat1 * Math.PI / 180.0) * Math.Cos(lat2 * Math.PI / 180.0) *
                    Math.Sin(dLon / 2) * Math.Sin(dLon / 2);
            var c = 2 * Math.Atan2(Math.Sqrt(a), Math.Sqrt(1 - a));
            return R * c;
        }
        
        private string FormatDistance(double km)
        {
            if (km < 1) return $"{(km * 1000):F0} m";
            return $"{km:F1} km";
        }
        
        private string GetDistanceClass(double km)
        {
            if (km < 3) return "near";
            if (km < 10) return "medium";
            return "far";
        }
    }
</body>
</html>

                            <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="18" />
                            <path d="M42 42l14 14" stroke-linecap="round" />
                            <path d="M22 28h12M28 22v16" stroke-linecap="round" />

                    </div>
                    <h2 class="fy-empty__title">No matches</h2>

    <script>
            (function() {
                var grid = document.getElementById('itemGrid');
                var shopsRow = document.getElementById('shopsRow');
                var filterEmpty = document.getElementById('filterEmpty');
                var visibleCount = document.getElementById('visibleCount');

                if (!grid) return;

                var cards = Array.prototype.slice.call(grid.querySelectorAll('.fy-card'));
                var shopCards = shopsRow ? Array.prototype.slice.call(shopsRow.querySelectorAll('.sl-shop-card')) : [];

                // Multi-image hover cycling
                cards.forEach(function(card) {
                    var wrap = card.querySelector('.fy-card__img-wrap');
                    var img = card.querySelector('.fy-card__img');
                    var dotsEl = card.querySelector('.fy-card__dots');

                    if (!wrap || !img) return;

                    var raw = wrap.getAttribute('data-images');
                    var images = [];
                    try { images = JSON.parse(raw); } catch (e) { }
                    if (images.length < 2) return;

                    var dots = dotsEl ? Array.prototype.slice.call(dotsEl.querySelectorAll('.fy-card__dot')) : [];
                    var current = 0;
                    var timer = null;

                    function goTo(idx) {
                        img.classList.add('fy-img--fading');
                        setTimeout(function() {
                            img.src = images[idx];
                            img.classList.remove('fy-img--fading');
                        }, 220);
                        dots.forEach(function(d, i) {
                            d.classList.toggle('fy-card__dot--active', i === idx);
                        });
                        current = idx;
                    }

                    card.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
                        if (timer) return;
                        timer = setInterval(function() { goTo((current + 1) % images.length); }, 900);
                    });
                    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
                        if (timer) { clearInterval(timer); timer = null; }
                        if (current !== 0) goTo(0);
                    });
                });

                // Filter callback
                window.applyFiltersCallback = function(state) {
                    var query = state.search.toLowerCase();
                    var minVal = state.priceMin;
                    var maxVal = state.priceMax;
                    var activeCats = state.categories;
                    var activeConds = state.conditions;

                    var shown = 0;

                    cards.forEach(function(card) {
                        var cat = card.dataset.category;
                        var cond = card.dataset.condition;
                        var price = parseFloat(card.dataset.price);
                        var title = card.dataset.title || '';
                        var desc = card.dataset.desc || '';
                        var shop = card.dataset.shop || '';

                        var catOk = activeCats.length === 0 || activeCats.indexOf(cat) !== -1;
                        var condOk = activeConds.length === 0 || activeConds.indexOf(cond) !== -1;
                        var priceOk = price >= minVal && price <= maxVal;
                        var textOk = !query || title.indexOf(query) !== -1 || desc.indexOf(query) !== -1 || shop.indexOf(query) !== -1;

                        var visible = catOk && condOk && priceOk && textOk;
                        card.classList.toggle('fy-card--hidden', !visible);
                        if (visible) shown++;
                    });

                    // Filter shop cards
                    shopCards.forEach(function(sc) {
                        var name = sc.dataset.shopName || '';
                        sc.classList.toggle('sl-shop-card--hidden',
                            query.length > 0 && name.indexOf(query) === -1);
                    });

                    if (visibleCount) visibleCount.textContent = shown;
                    if (filterEmpty) filterEmpty.classList.toggle('fy-empty--hidden', shown > 0);
                };

                // Reset button inside empty state
                var resetBtn2 = document.getElementById('resetFilters2');
                if (resetBtn2) {
                    resetBtn2.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        if (window.resetFiltersFromPartial) {
                            window.resetFiltersFromPartial();
                        }
                    });
                }

                // Like button click handler
                document.querySelectorAll('.fy-like-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        e.stopPropagation();

                        var btn = this;
                        var itemId = btn.dataset.itemId;
                        var token = document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value;

                        fetch('/Likes/Toggle', {
                            method: 'POST',
                            headers: {
                                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                                'RequestVerificationToken': token
                            },
                            body: JSON.stringify({ itemId: parseInt(itemId) })
                        })
                        .then(function(res) { return res.json(); })
                        .then(function(data) {
                            if (data.success) {
                                btn.classList.toggle('fy-like-btn--liked', data.isLiked);
                                var countEl = btn.querySelector('.fy-like-btn__count');
                                if (data.likeCount > 0) {
                                    if (countEl) {
                                        countEl.textContent = data.likeCount;
                                    } else {
                                        var newCount = document.createElement('span');
                                        newCount.className = 'fy-like-btn__count';
                                        newCount.textContent = data.likeCount;
                                        btn.appendChild(newCount);
                                    }
                                } else if (countEl) {
                                    countEl.remove();
                                }
                            }
                        })
                        .catch(function(err) {
                            console.error('Like failed:', err);
                        });
                    });
                });
            }());
    </script>
</body>
</html>

--- Views\Shared\_AddressInputWithMap.cshtml ---
﻿@* Views/Shared/_AddressInputWithMap.cshtml
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Reusable address field that includes a "Pick on Map" button.
   Drop this partial wherever you have an address <textarea>.

   REQUIRED ViewData keys
   ───────────────────────
   FieldId       (string)  — id & name attr of the <textarea>, e.g. "Address"
   FieldName     (string)  — form field name (usually same as FieldId)
   Label         (string)  — visible label text, e.g. "Address"
   CurrentValue  (string)  — pre-populated value (Model.Address, dto.StoreAddress, …)

   OPTIONAL ViewData keys
   ───────────────────────
   Placeholder   (string)  — textarea placeholder
   HintText      (string)  — small hint rendered below the field
   HasError      (bool)    — whether to apply error styling
   ErrorMessage  (string)  — validation error message to display

   EXAMPLE (User profile page)
   ────────────────────────────
   @{
       var addrError = ViewData.ModelState.ContainsKey("Address")
                       && ViewData.ModelState["Address"]!.Errors.Count > 0;
   }
@using System.Globalization
@using System
   @await Html.PartialAsync("_AddressInputWithMap", (object?)null,
       new ViewDataDictionary(ViewData)
       {
           { "FieldId",      "Address" },
           { "FieldName",    "Address" },
           { "Label",        "Address" },
           { "CurrentValue", Model?.Address ?? string.Empty },
           { "Placeholder",  "Street, Barangay, City/Municipality, Province" },
           { "HintText",     "Your delivery address for purchases" },
           { "HasError",     addrError },
           { "ErrorMessage", addrError
                             ? ViewData.ModelState["Address"]!.Errors[0].ErrorMessage
                             : string.Empty }
       })

   EXAMPLE (Seller application — StoreAddress)
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   @await Html.PartialAsync("_AddressInputWithMap", (object?)null,
       new ViewDataDictionary(ViewData)
       {
           { "FieldId",      "StoreAddress" },
           { "FieldName",    "StoreAddress" },
           { "Label",        "Store / Pickup Address" },
           { "CurrentValue", Model?.StoreAddress ?? string.Empty },
           { "Placeholder",  "Full store address visible to buyers" },
           { "HintText",     "This address will be shown on your shop page" },
           { "HasError",     false },
           { "ErrorMessage", string.Empty }
       })

   PREREQUISITES (add to the host page's <head> / end-of-body)
   ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   In <head>:
       <link rel="stylesheet"
             href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
       <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/map-picker.css" asp-append-version="true" />

   Before </body>:
       @await Html.PartialAsync("_AddressMapModal")
       <script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
       <script src="~/js/map-picker.js" asp-append-version="true"></script>
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
*@
@{
    var fieldId = ViewData["FieldId"] as string ?? "Address";
    var fieldName = ViewData["FieldName"] as string ?? "Address";
    var label = ViewData["Label"] as string ?? "Address";
    var currentValue = ViewData["CurrentValue"] as string ?? string.Empty;
    var placeholder = ViewData["Placeholder"] as string ?? string.Empty;
    var hintText = ViewData["HintText"] as string ?? string.Empty;
    var hasError = ViewData["HasError"] is bool b && b;
    var errorMessage = ViewData["ErrorMessage"] as string ?? string.Empty;

    var inputCss = "up-form-input up-form-textarea" + (hasError ? " up-form-input--error" : "");
}

<div class="up-form-group">
    <label for="@fieldId" class="up-form-label">@label</label>

    <div class="map-input-wrapper">
        <textarea id="@fieldId"
                  name="@fieldName"
                  class="@inputCss"
                  rows="3"
                  placeholder="@placeholder"
                  aria-describedby="@(fieldId)-hint @(fieldId)-error">@currentValue</textarea>

        @* Hidden fields to store the selected coordinates from the map picker *@
        @{ 
            var latKey = $"{fieldId}-Latitude";
            var lngKey = $"{fieldId}-Longitude";

            string? viewDataLat = null;
            if (ViewData[latKey] is not null)
                viewDataLat = ViewData[latKey].ToString();
            else if (ViewData["Latitude"] is not null)
                viewDataLat = ViewData["Latitude"].ToString();

            string? viewDataLng = null;
            if (ViewData[lngKey] is not null)
                viewDataLng = ViewData[lngKey].ToString();
            else if (ViewData["Longitude"] is not null)
                viewDataLng = ViewData["Longitude"].ToString();

            var latVal = viewDataLat
                         ?? (ViewBag.Profile?.Latitude is decimal lat ? lat.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) : ViewBag.Profile?.Latitude?.ToString())
                         ?? string.Empty;
            var lngVal = viewDataLng
                         ?? (ViewBag.Profile?.Longitude is decimal lng ? lng.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) : ViewBag.Profile?.Longitude?.ToString())
                         ?? string.Empty;
        }

        <input type="hidden" id="@(fieldId)-latitude" name="Latitude" value="@latVal" />
        <input type="hidden" id="@(fieldId)-longitude" name="Longitude" value="@lngVal" />

        <button type="button"
                class="map-pick-btn"
                onclick="openMapPicker('@fieldId')"
                title="Pick location on map"
                aria-label="Pick @label on map">
            <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                 stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"
                 stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
                <path d="M21 10c0 7-9 13-9 13S3 17 3 10a9 9 0 0 1 18 0z" />
                <circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3" />
            </svg>
            <span>Map</span>
        </button>
    </div>

    @if (hasError && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(errorMessage))
    {
        <span id="@(fieldId)-error" class="up-form-error">@errorMessage</span>
    }

    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(hintText))
    {
        <span id="@(fieldId)-hint" class="up-form-hint">@hintText</span>
    }
</div>

--- Views\Shared\_AddressMapModal.cshtml ---
﻿@* Views/Shared/_AddressMapModal.cshtml
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Reusable Leaflet address-picker modal.

   USAGE — render ONCE per page, anywhere inside <body>:
       @await Html.PartialAsync("_AddressMapModal")

   The modal is controlled entirely by map-picker.js:
     openMapPicker(inputId)  — opens and targets a <textarea>
     closeMapPicker()        — closes without saving
     confirmMapAddress()     — copies geocoded address and closes
     searchMapAddress()      — forward-geocodes the search query
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
*@

<div id="map-picker-modal" class="map-modal-overlay" role="dialog"
     aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="map-modal-title">

    <div class="map-modal">

        @* ── Header ──────────────────────────────────────────────── *@
        <div class="map-modal__header">
            <span id="map-modal-title" class="map-modal__title">
                <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                     stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"
                     stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
                    <path d="M21 10c0 7-9 13-9 13S3 17 3 10a9 9 0 0 1 18 0z" />
                    <circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3" />
                </svg>
                Pick Address on Map
            </span>
            <button type="button" class="map-modal__close"
                    onclick="closeMapPicker()" aria-label="Close map picker">
                <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                     stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"
                     stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
                    <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18" />
                    <line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18" />
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>

        @* ── Search bar ───────────────────────────────────────────── *@
        <div id="map-picker-search-wrapper" class="map-modal__search">
            <div class="map-search-wrapper">
                <svg class="map-search-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                     fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"
                     stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
                    <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8" />
                    <line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65" />
                </svg>
                <input id="map-picker-search"
                       type="text"
                       class="map-search-input"
                       placeholder="Search for an address or place…"
                       autocomplete="off"
                       aria-label="Search address" />
                <button type="button" class="map-search-btn" onclick="searchMapAddress()">

--- Views\Shared\_Filter.cshtml ---
﻿@using ThriftLoop.ViewModels
@using ThriftLoop.Enums
@{
    var categories = ItemCreateViewModel.Categories;
    var conditions = ItemCreateViewModel.Conditions;
    var maxPrice = ViewBag.MaxPrice ?? 100000;
}

<aside class="floating-filter" id="floatingFilter" aria-label="Filter listings">
    <div class="floating-filter__header">
        <span class="floating-filter__title">Filters</span>
        <button type="button" class="floating-filter__reset" id="resetFilters">Clear all</button>
        <button type="button" class="floating-filter__close" id="closeFilter" aria-label="Close filters">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="18" height="18">
                <path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12" stroke-linecap="round" />
            </svg>
        </button>
    </div>

    <div class="floating-filter__content">
        <!-- Search -->
        <div class="floating-filter__group">
            <label class="floating-filter__label" for="searchInput">Search</label>
            <div class="floating-filter__search-wrap">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" aria-hidden="true">
                    <circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="5.5" />
                    <path d="M13.5 13.5L18 18" stroke-linecap="round" />
                </svg>
                <input type="search" id="searchInput" class="floating-filter__search-input"
                       placeholder="Title, description or shop…" autocomplete="off" />
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Price Range -->
        <div class="floating-filter__group">
            <label class="floating-filter__label">Price</label>
            <div class="floating-filter__price-row">
                <div class="floating-filter__price-field">
                    <span class="floating-filter__price-sym">₱</span>
                    <input type="number" id="priceMin" class="floating-filter__price-input"
                           placeholder="0" min="0" max="@maxPrice" value="0" />
                </div>
                <span class="floating-filter__price-sep">–</span>
                <div class="floating-filter__price-field">
                    <span class="floating-filter__price-sym">₱</span>
                    <input type="number" id="priceMax" class="floating-filter__price-input"
                           placeholder="@maxPrice" min="0" max="@maxPrice" value="@maxPrice" />
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Categories -->
        <div class="floating-filter__group">
            <p class="floating-filter__label">Category</p>
            <ul class="floating-filter__check-list" id="catFilters">
                @foreach (var cat in categories)
                {
                    <li>
                        <label class="floating-filter__check-label">
                            <input type="checkbox" class="floating-filter__check" value="@cat" />
                            <span class="floating-filter__check-box"></span>
                            <span class="floating-filter__check-text">@cat</span>
                        </label>
                    </li>
                }
            </ul>
        </div>

        <!-- Conditions -->
        <div class="floating-filter__group">
            <p class="floating-filter__label">Condition</p>
            <ul class="floating-filter__check-list" id="condFilters">
                @foreach (var cond in conditions)
                {
                    <li>
                        <label class="floating-filter__check-label">
                            <input type="checkbox" class="floating-filter__check" value="@cond" />
                            <span class="floating-filter__check-box"></span>
                            <span class="floating-filter__check-text">@cond</span>
                        </label>
                    </li>
                }
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="floating-filter__footer">
        <button type="button" class="floating-filter__apply" id="applyFilters">Apply Filters</button>
    </div>
</aside>

<!-- Mobile filter toggle button -->
<button type="button" class="floating-filter__toggle" id="filterToggle" aria-label="Open filters">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" width="20" height="20">
        <path d="M4 6h16M6 12h12M8 18h8" stroke-linecap="round" />
        <circle cx="8" cy="6" r="2" />
        <circle cx="16" cy="12" r="2" />
        <circle cx="12" cy="18" r="2" />
    </svg>
    <span>Filters</span>
</button>

<script>
    (function() {
        // Initialize filter values from ViewBag
        var maxPriceValue = @maxPrice;
        
        // Store filter state
        var filterState = {
            search: '',
            priceMin: 0,
            priceMax: maxPriceValue,
            categories: [],
            conditions: []
        };
        
        // Get DOM elements
        var searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput');
        var priceMinInput = document.getElementById('priceMin');
        var priceMaxInput = document.getElementById('priceMax');
        var catChecks = document.querySelectorAll('#catFilters .floating-filter__check');
        var condChecks = document.querySelectorAll('#condFilters .floating-filter__check');
        var applyBtn = document.getElementById('applyFilters');
        var resetBtns = document.querySelectorAll('#resetFilters');
        var filterToggle = document.getElementById('filterToggle');
        var closeFilter = document.getElementById('closeFilter');
        var filterPanel = document.getElementById('floatingFilter');
        
        // Function to capture current filter state
        function captureFilterState() {
            filterState.search = searchInput ? searchInput.value.trim() : '';
            filterState.priceMin = priceMinInput ? parseFloat(priceMinInput.value) || 0 : 0;
            filterState.priceMax = priceMaxInput ? parseFloat(priceMaxInput.value) || maxPriceValue : maxPriceValue;
            filterState.categories = Array.from(catChecks).filter(cb => cb.checked).map(cb => cb.value);
            filterState.conditions = Array.from(condChecks).filter(cb => cb.checked).map(cb => cb.value);
        }
        
        // Function to apply filters to the page (to be overridden by parent page)
        window.applyFiltersFromPartial = function() {
            captureFilterState();
            if (window.applyFiltersCallback) {
                window.applyFiltersCallback(filterState);
            }
        };
        
        // Function to reset filters
        window.resetFiltersFromPartial = function() {
            if (searchInput) searchInput.value = '';
            if (priceMinInput) priceMinInput.value = 0;
            if (priceMaxInput) priceMaxInput.value = maxPriceValue;
            catChecks.forEach(cb => cb.checked = false);
            condChecks.forEach(cb => cb.checked = false);
            applyFiltersFromPartial();
        };
        
        // Event listeners
        if (applyBtn) {
            applyBtn.addEventListener('click', applyFiltersFromPartial);
        }
        
        resetBtns.forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                window.resetFiltersFromPartial();
            });
        });
        
        // Mobile toggle
        if (filterToggle && filterPanel) {
            filterToggle.addEventListener('click', function() {
                filterPanel.classList.add('floating-filter--open');
                document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
            });
        }
        
        if (closeFilter && filterPanel) {
            closeFilter.addEventListener('click', function() {
                filterPanel.classList.remove('floating-filter--open');
                document.body.style.overflow = '';
            });
        }
        
        // Close filter when clicking outside on mobile
        if (filterPanel) {
            document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (window.innerWidth <= 768 && filterPanel.classList.contains('floating-filter--open')) {
                    if (!filterPanel.contains(e.target) && !filterToggle.contains(e.target)) {
                        filterPanel.classList.remove('floating-filter--open');
                        document.body.style.overflow = '';
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    })();
</script>

--- Views\Shared\_Navbar.cshtml ---
@using System.Security.Claims
@using ThriftLoop.Repositories.Interface
@using ThriftLoop.Services.Interface
@inject IShopRepository ShopRepo
@inject ICartRepository CartRepo
@inject IItemLikeRepository LikeRepo
@inject IChatService ChatService

@{
    var userEmail = User.FindFirst(ClaimTypes.Email)?.Value
                        ?? User.Identity?.Name
                        ?? string.Empty;
    var displayName = userEmail.Contains('@') ? userEmail.Split('@')[0] : userEmail;
    var currentPath = Context.Request.Path.Value ?? string.Empty;

    // Check if current user is a Rider
    var isRider = User.HasClaim(c => c.Type == "IsRider" && c.Value == "true");

    // Resolve live shop name for the navbar pill (only for Sellers)
    var shopLabel = "My Shop";

    // Get cart count, likes count, and unread message count for authenticated users
    int cartCount = 0;
    int likesCount = 0;
    int unreadMessageCount = 0;

    var rawId = User.FindFirst(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value;
    if (int.TryParse(rawId, out var navUserId))
    {
        if (!isRider && User.IsInRole("Seller"))
        {
            var shop = await ShopRepo.GetByUserIdAsync(navUserId);
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shop?.ShopName))
                shopLabel = shop.ShopName;
        }

        if (User.Identity?.IsAuthenticated == true && !isRider)
        {
            cartCount = await CartRepo.GetCountByUserIdAsync(navUserId);
            var likes = await LikeRepo.GetByUserIdAsync(navUserId);
            likesCount = likes.Count;
            unreadMessageCount = await ChatService.GetTotalUnreadCountAsync(navUserId);
        }
    }
}

<nav class="tl-nav">
    <div class="tl-nav__inner">

        @* Logo - Redirects based on user type *@
        @if (isRider)
        {
            <a asp-controller="Rider" asp-action="Index" class="tl-nav__logo">
                <svg class="tl-nav__infinity" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true">
                    <path fill="currentColor" d="M382,136c-40.87,0-73.46,20.53-93.6,37.76l-.71.61-11.47,12.47,25.32,41.61,18.74-18.79C339.89,193.1,361.78,184,382,184c40.8,0,74,32.3,74,72s-33.2,72-74,72c-62,0-104.14-81.95-104.56-82.78h0C275,240.29,221.56,136,130,136,62.73,136,8,189.83,8,256S62.73,376,130,376c32.95,0,65.38-13.11,93.79-37.92l.61-.54,11.38-12.38-25.33-41.61-18.83,18.88C172,319.4,151.26,328,130,328c-40.8,0-74-32.3-74-72s33.2-72,74-72c62,0,104.14,81.95,104.56,82.78h0C237,271.71,290.44,376,382,376c67.27,0,122-53.83,122-120S449.27,136,382,136Z" />
                </svg>
                ThriftLoop Rider
            </a>
        }
        else
        {
            <a asp-controller="Home" asp-action="Index" class="tl-nav__logo">
                <svg class="tl-nav__infinity" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true">

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        const dropdownToggle = document.getElementById('userDropdown');
        const dropdownMenu = document.getElementById('userDropdownMenu');

        if (dropdownToggle && dropdownMenu) {
            dropdownToggle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                const isExpanded = this.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
                this.setAttribute('aria-expanded', !isExpanded);
                dropdownMenu.classList.toggle('show');
            });

            document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (!dropdownToggle.contains(e.target) && !dropdownMenu.contains(e.target)) {
                    dropdownToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                    dropdownMenu.classList.remove('show');
                }
            });
        }

        // Poll for unread message count updates
        function updateUnreadCount() {
            fetch('/Chat/UnreadCount')
                .then(response => response.json())
                .then(data => {
                    const badge = document.getElementById('chatUnreadBadge');
                    if (badge) {
                        if (data.unreadCount > 0) {
                            badge.textContent = data.unreadCount > 99 ? '99+' : data.unreadCount;
                            badge.style.display = 'flex';
                        } else {
                            badge.style.display = 'none';
                        }
                    }
                })
                .catch(() => {});
        }

        // Only poll if user is authenticated and not a rider
        @if (User.Identity?.IsAuthenticated == true && !isRider)
        {
                <text>
                    setInterval(updateUnreadCount, 30000); // Poll every 30 seconds
                </text>
        }
    });
</script>

--- Views\Shared\Error.cshtml ---
﻿@model ErrorViewModel
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Error";
}

<h1 class="text-danger">Error.</h1>
<h2 class="text-danger">An error occurred while processing your request.</h2>

@if (Model.ShowRequestId)
{
    <p>
        <strong>Request ID:</strong> <code>@Model.RequestId</code>
    </p>
}

<h3>Development Mode</h3>
<p>
    Swapping to <strong>Development</strong> environment will display more detailed information about the error that occurred.
</p>
<p>
    <strong>The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.</strong>
    It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users.
    For local debugging, enable the <strong>Development</strong> environment by setting the <strong>ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT</strong> environment variable to <strong>Development</strong>
    and restarting the app.
</p>

                </div>

                <div class="ic-field ic-field--full">
                    <label class="ic-field__label" for="itemDesc">Description</label>
                    <textarea id="itemDesc" class="ic-field__textarea" rows="4"
                              placeholder="Describe the item — material, fit, notable features, measurements…"
                              maxlength="1000"></textarea>
                    <p class="ic-field__error" id="errDesc" hidden></p>
                </div>

                <div class="ic-field">
                    <label class="ic-field__label" for="itemCategory">Category</label>
                    <select id="itemCategory" class="ic-field__select">
                        <option value="">Select category…</option>
                        @foreach (var cat in ItemConstants.Categories)
                        {
                            <option value="@cat">@cat</option>
                        }
                    </select>
                    <p class="ic-field__error" id="errCategory" hidden></p>
                </div>

                <div class="ic-field">
                    <label class="ic-field__label" for="itemCondition">Condition</label>
                    <select id="itemCondition" class="ic-field__select">
                        <option value="">Select condition…</option>
                        @foreach (var cond in ItemConstants.Conditions)
                        {
                            <option value="@cond">@cond</option>
                        }
                    </select>
                    <p class="ic-field__error" id="errCondition" hidden></p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        @* ── SECTION 2: Images ───────────────────────────────────────────────── *@
        <div class="ic-card">
            <div class="ic-card__label">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="13" height="13" aria-hidden="true">
                    <path d="M1.75 2.5a.25.25 0 00-.25.25v10.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h.94a.76.76 0 01.06-.25l1.5-3.25a.75.75 0 011.36 0l1.223 2.652 2.152-3.586a.75.75 0 011.313.03L11.91 13H14.25a.25.25 0 00.25-.25V2.75a.25.25 0 00-.25-.25H1.75zM0 2.75C0 1.784.784 1 1.75 1h12.5c.966 0 1.75.784 1.75 1.75v10.5A1.75 1.75 0 0114.25 15H1.75A1.75 1.75 0 010 13.25V2.75zm6 3a1 1 0 11-2 0 1 1 0 012 0z" />
                </svg>
                Images
                <span class="ic-card__label-hint">Up to @ItemConstants.MaxImagesPerListing photos · First is the cover</span>
            </div>

            <div class="ic-images" id="imageGrid"></div>
            <p class="ic-field__error" id="errImages" hidden></p>
        </div>

        @* ── SECTION 3: Variants ─────────────────────────────────────────────── *@
        <div class="ic-card">
            <div class="ic-card__label-row">
                <div>
                    <div class="ic-card__label" style="margin-bottom:4px">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="13" height="13" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path d="M11.28 3.22a.75.75 0 010 1.06L9.56 6l1.72 1.72a.75.75 0 11-1.06 1.06L8.5 7.06 6.78 8.78a.75.75 0 01-1.06-1.06L7.44 6 5.72 4.28a.75.75 0 011.06-1.06L8.5 4.94l1.72-1.72a.75.75 0 011.06 0zM2.5 6a.5.5 0 00-.5.5v3a.5.5 0 001 0v-3a.5.5 0 00-.5-.5zm11 0a.5.5 0 00-.5.5v3a.5.5 0 001 0v-3a.5.5 0 00-.5-.5z" />
                        </svg>
                        Variants &amp; Inventory
                    </div>
                    <p class="ic-card__label-hint ic-card__label-hint--block">
                        Each variant is a colour, style, or option. Add sizes and stock quantities under each.
                    </p>
                </div>
                <button type="button" class="tl-btn tl-btn--ghost" id="addVariantBtn" style="flex-shrink:0">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12" aria-hidden="true">
                        <path d="M7.75 2a.75.75 0 01.75.75V7h4.25a.75.75 0 010 1.5H8.5v4.25a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0V8.5H2.75a.75.75 0 010-1.5H7V2.75A.75.75 0 017.75 2z" />
                    </svg>
                    Add Variant
                </button>
            </div>

            <div id="variantList" class="ic-variant-list"></div>
            <p class="ic-field__error" id="errVariants" hidden></p>
        </div>

        @* ── Footer ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── *@
        <div class="ic-footer">
            <a asp-controller="Shop" asp-action="Mine" class="tl-btn tl-btn--ghost">Cancel</a>
            <button type="button" class="tl-btn tl-btn--primary" id="publishBtn">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="13" height="13" aria-hidden="true">
                    <path d="M8.75 1.75a.75.75 0 00-1.5 0V8H3.75a.75.75 0 000 1.5h3.5V13a.75.75 0 001.5 0V9.5h3.5a.75.75 0 000-1.5H8.75V1.75z" />
                </svg>
                Publish Item
            </button>
        </div>

    </div>

    @* SKU row template ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── *@
    <template id="skuTemplate">
        <div class="ic-sku-row">
            <select class="ic-field__select ic-sku__size">
                <option value="">No size</option>
                @foreach (var sz in ItemConstants.Sizes)
                {
                    <option value="@sz">@sz</option>
                }
            </select>
            <div class="ic-sku__price-wrap">
                <span class="ic-sku__currency">₱</span>
                <input type="number" class="ic-field__input ic-sku__price"
                       placeholder="0.00" min="0.01" step="0.01" />
            </div>
            <input type="number" class="ic-field__input ic-sku__qty"
                   placeholder="Qty" min="1" max="9999" step="1" />
            <button type="button" class="ic-sku__remove" aria-label="Remove row">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12">
                    <path d="M3.72 3.72a.75.75 0 011.06 0L8 6.94l3.22-3.22a.75.75 0 111.06 1.06L9.06 8l3.22 3.22a.75.75 0 11-1.06 1.06L8 9.06l-3.22 3.22a.75.75 0 01-1.06-1.06L6.94 8 3.72 4.78a.75.75 0 010-1.06z" />
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </template>

    <script>
            (function () {
                'use strict';

                const AF_TOKEN      = document.getElementById('afToken').value;
                const SHOP_ID       = parseInt(document.getElementById('shopId').value);
                const MAX_IMAGES    = @ItemConstants.MaxImagesPerListing;
                const MAX_VARIANTS  = 10;
                const CREATE_URL     = '/Shop/Create';
                const IMG_UPLOAD_URL = '/Shop/SaveListingImage';

                // ── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                const imageFiles = new Array(MAX_IMAGES).fill(null);
                let variantCount = 0;

                // ── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                function showError(elId, msg) {
                    const el = document.getElementById(elId);
                    if (!el) return;
                    el.textContent = msg;
                    el.hidden = !msg;
                }
                function showGlobal(msg) {
                    const banner = document.getElementById('globalError');
                    document.getElementById('globalErrorText').textContent = msg;
                    banner.hidden = !msg;
                    if (msg) banner.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
                }
                async function postJson(url, body) {
                    const res = await fetch(url, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'RequestVerificationToken': AF_TOKEN },
                        body: JSON.stringify(body)
                    });
                    return res.json();
                }
                async function uploadFile(url, formData) {
                    const res = await fetch(url, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: { 'RequestVerificationToken': AF_TOKEN },
                        body: formData
                    });
                    return res.json();
                }

                // ── Image slots ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                const imageGrid = document.getElementById('imageGrid');

                function renderImageSlots() {
                    imageGrid.innerHTML = '';
                    for (let i = 0; i < MAX_IMAGES; i++) {
                        const slot = document.createElement('label');
                        slot.className = 'ic-image-slot' + (i === 0 ? ' ic-image-slot--cover' : '');
                        slot.title = i === 0 ? 'Cover image' : `Image ${i + 1}`;

                        const input = document.createElement('input');
                        input.type = 'file';
                        input.accept = 'image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp,image/gif';
                        input.className = 'ic-image-slot__input';
                        input.dataset.slot = i;

                        if (imageFiles[i]) {
                            const img = document.createElement('img');
                            img.src = URL.createObjectURL(imageFiles[i]);
                            img.className = 'ic-image-slot__preview';
                            slot.appendChild(img);
                            if (i === 0) {
                                const badge = document.createElement('span');
                                badge.className = 'ic-image-slot__badge';
                                badge.textContent = 'Cover';
                                slot.appendChild(badge);
                            }
                        } else {
                            const icon = document.createElement('div');
                            icon.className = 'ic-image-slot__empty';
                            icon.innerHTML = `
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"
                                     width="22" height="22" aria-hidden="true">
                                    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
                                          d="M12 16.5V9.75m0 0l3 3m-3-3l-3 3M6.75 19.5a4.5 4.5 0
                                             01-1.41-8.775 5.25 5.25 0 0110.233-2.33 3 3 0
                                             013.758 3.848A3.752 3.752 0 0118 19.5H6.75z"/>
                                </svg>
                                <span>${i === 0 ? 'Cover' : '+'}</span>`;
                            slot.appendChild(icon);
                        }

                        input.addEventListener('change', () => {
                            const file = input.files[0];
                            if (!file) return;
                            if (file.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) { showError('errImages', `Image ${i + 1} exceeds 5 MB.`); return; }
                            showError('errImages', '');
                            imageFiles[i] = file;
                            renderImageSlots();
                        });

                        slot.appendChild(input);
                        imageGrid.appendChild(slot);
                    }
                }
                renderImageSlots();

                // ── Variant builder ────────────────────────────────────────────────
                const variantList   = document.getElementById('variantList');
                const addVariantBtn = document.getElementById('addVariantBtn');
                const skuTemplate   = document.getElementById('skuTemplate');

                function addVariant() {
                    if (variantCount >= MAX_VARIANTS) {
                        showError('errVariants', `Maximum ${MAX_VARIANTS} variants allowed.`);
                        return;
                    }
                    const vid  = ++variantCount;
                    const card = document.createElement('div');
                    card.className   = 'ic-variant-card';
                    card.dataset.vid = vid;

                    card.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="ic-variant-header">
                            <div class="ic-field" style="flex:1">
                                <label class="ic-field__label" for="vname-${vid}">Variant Name</label>
                                <input id="vname-${vid}" type="text" class="ic-field__input ic-variant__name"
                                       placeholder="e.g. Red, Navy, Classic Fit" maxlength="50" autocomplete="off" />
                                <p class="ic-field__error ic-variant__name-error" hidden></p>
                            </div>
                            <button type="button" class="ic-variant__remove" aria-label="Remove variant">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="13" height="13">
                                    <path d="M11 1.75V3h2.25a.75.75 0 010 1.5H2.75a.75.75 0 010-1.5H5V1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h2.5C10.216 0 11 .784 11 1.75zM4.496 6.675a.75.75 0 10-1.492.15l.66 6.6A1.75 1.75 0 005.405 15h5.19a1.75 1.75 0 001.741-1.575l.66-6.6a.75.75 0 10-1.492-.15l-.66 6.6a.25.25 0 01-.249.225H5.405a.25.25 0 01-.249-.225l-.66-6.6z"/>
                                </svg>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ic-sku-list">
                            <div class="ic-sku-header">
                                <span>Size</span><span>Price</span><span>Qty</span><span></span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <button type="button" class="tl-btn tl-btn--ghost ic-add-sku" style="margin-top:10px;font-size:.75rem;padding:6px 12px">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="11" height="11">
                                <path d="M7.75 2a.75.75 0 01.75.75V7h4.25a.75.75 0 010 1.5H8.5v4.25a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0V8.5H2.75a.75.75 0 010-1.5H7V2.75A.75.75 0 017.75 2z"/>
                            </svg>
                            Add Size / SKU
                        </button>
                        <p class="ic-field__error ic-variant__sku-error" hidden></p>`;

                    card.querySelector('.ic-variant__remove').addEventListener('click', () => {
                        card.remove();
                        showError('errVariants', '');
                    });
                    card.querySelector('.ic-add-sku').addEventListener('click', () => {
                        addSku(card.querySelector('.ic-sku-list'));
                    });

                    variantList.appendChild(card);
                    showError('errVariants', '');
                    addSku(card.querySelector('.ic-sku-list'));
                    card.querySelector('.ic-variant__name').focus();
                }

                function addSku(skuList) {
                    const row = skuTemplate.content.cloneNode(true).querySelector('.ic-sku-row');
                    row.querySelector('.ic-sku__remove').addEventListener('click', () => row.remove());
                    skuList.appendChild(row);
                }

                addVariantBtn.addEventListener('click', addVariant);
                addVariant();

                // ── Validation ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                function validateAndBuild() {
                    let valid = true;
                    const title     = document.getElementById('itemTitle').value.trim();
                    const desc      = document.getElementById('itemDesc').value.trim();
                    const category  = document.getElementById('itemCategory').value;
                    const condition = document.getElementById('itemCondition').value;

                    ['errTitle','errDesc','errCategory','errCondition','errVariants','errImages'].forEach(id => showError(id, ''));
                    showGlobal('');

                    if (!title)     { showError('errTitle',     'Title is required.');             valid = false; }
                    if (!desc)      { showError('errDesc',      'Description is required.');       valid = false; }
                    if (!category)  { showError('errCategory',  'Please select a category.');      valid = false; }
                    if (!condition) { showError('errCondition', 'Please select a condition.');     valid = false; }
                    if (imageFiles.filter(Boolean).length === 0) { showError('errImages', 'Add at least one image.'); valid = false; }

                    const variantCards = variantList.querySelectorAll('.ic-variant-card');
                    if (variantCards.length === 0) { showError('errVariants', 'Add at least one variant.'); valid = false; }

                    const variants = [];
                    variantCards.forEach(card => {
                        const name    = card.querySelector('.ic-variant__name').value.trim();
                        const nameErr = card.querySelector('.ic-variant__name-error');
                        const skuErr  = card.querySelector('.ic-variant__sku-error');
                        nameErr.hidden = skuErr.hidden = true;

                        if (!name) { nameErr.textContent = 'Variant name is required.'; nameErr.hidden = false; valid = false; }

                        const skus = [];
                        card.querySelectorAll('.ic-sku-row').forEach(row => {
                            const size  = row.querySelector('.ic-sku__size').value;
                            const price = parseFloat(row.querySelector('.ic-sku__price').value);
                            const qty   = parseInt(row.querySelector('.ic-sku__qty').value, 10);
                            if (isNaN(price) || price <= 0) { skuErr.textContent = 'All SKUs need a valid price.'; skuErr.hidden = false; valid = false; return; }
                            if (isNaN(qty)   || qty < 1)   { skuErr.textContent = 'All SKUs need a valid quantity.'; skuErr.hidden = false; valid = false; return; }
                            skus.push({ size: size || null, price, quantity: qty });
                        });
                        if (skus.length === 0) { skuErr.textContent = 'Add at least one SKU.'; skuErr.hidden = false; valid = false; }
                        variants.push({ name, skus });
                    });

                    if (!valid) return null;
                    return { shopId: SHOP_ID, title, description: desc, category, condition, variants };
                }

                // ── Publish ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                document.getElementById('publishBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
                    const payload = validateAndBuild();
                    if (!payload) return;

                    const btn = document.getElementById('publishBtn');
                    btn.disabled    = true;
                    btn.textContent = 'Publishing…';

                    const createRes = await postJson(CREATE_URL, payload);
                    if (!createRes.ok) {
                        showGlobal(createRes.error ?? 'Failed to create item.');
                        btn.disabled    = false;
                        btn.innerHTML   = `<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="13" height="13"><path d="M8.75 1.75a.75.75 0 00-1.5 0V8H3.75a.75.75 0 000 1.5h3.5V13a.75.75 0 001.5 0V9.5h3.5a.75.75 0 000-1.5H8.75V1.75z"/></svg> Publish Item`;
                        return;
                    }

                    const itemId = createRes.itemId;
                    const selectedFiles = imageFiles.map((f, i) => ({ file: f, slot: i })).filter(x => x.file !== null);

                    for (const { file, slot } of selectedFiles) {
                        btn.textContent = `Uploading image ${slot + 1}…`;
                        const fd = new FormData();
                        fd.append('itemId', itemId);
                        fd.append('slot',   slot);
                        fd.append('file',   file);
                        const imgRes = await uploadFile(IMG_UPLOAD_URL, fd);
                        if (!imgRes.ok) {
                            showGlobal(`Item created but image ${slot + 1} failed: ${imgRes.error}`);
                            btn.disabled    = false;
                            btn.textContent = 'Publish Item';
                            return;
                        }
                    }

                    window.location.href = `/Shop/Mine`;
                });

            }());
    </script>
</body>
</html>

--- Views\Shop\Delete.cshtml ---
﻿@model ThriftLoop.Models.Item
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Delete Listing";
    Layout = null;
}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>@ViewData["Title"] - ThriftLoop</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;0,9..40,600;0,9..40,700;1,9..40,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Shop.css" asp-append-version="true" />
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Navbar.css" asp-append-version="true" />
    <style>
        /* Shake animation for the icon on hover */
        .confirm-card__icon svg {
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }
        .confirm-card__icon:hover svg {
            animation: icon-shake 0.5s ease;
        }
        @@keyframes icon-shake {
            0%,100% { transform: rotate(0); }
            20%      { transform: rotate(-8deg); }
            40%      { transform: rotate(8deg); }
            60%      { transform: rotate(-5deg); }
            80%      { transform: rotate(5deg); }
        }
        /* Danger pulse on the delete button */
        #deleteBtn {
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        #deleteBtn::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,.18);
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.15s ease;
        }
        #deleteBtn:hover::after { opacity: 1; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    @await Html.PartialAsync("_Navbar")

    <div class="container">
        <div class="confirm-shell">
            <div class="confirm-card">

                <div class="confirm-card__icon">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"
                         width="28" height="28">
                        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
                              d="M12 9v3.75m-9.303 3.376c-.866 1.5.217 3.374 1.948 3.374h14.71c1.73 0 2.813-1.874 1.948-3.374L13.949 3.378c-.866-1.5-3.032-1.5-3.898 0L2.697 16.126zM12 15.75h.007v.008H12v-.008z" />
                    </svg>
                </div>

                <h1 class="confirm-card__title">Delete this listing?</h1>
                <p class="confirm-card__body">
                    This action is <strong>permanent</strong> and cannot be undone.<br>
                    All variants, SKUs, and images will be removed.
                </p>

                <div class="confirm-item">
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ImageUrl))
                    {
                        <img src="@Model.ImageUrl" alt="@Model.Title" class="confirm-item__img" />
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="confirm-item__img confirm-item__img--placeholder">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"
                                 width="26" height="26">
                                <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="3" />
                                <circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5" />
                                <path d="M21 15l-5-5L5 21" />
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                    }
                    <div style="flex:1; min-width:0">
                        <p class="confirm-item__title" style="overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap">@Model.Title</p>
                        <p class="confirm-item__price">From ₱@Model.Price.ToString("N2")</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="confirm-actions">
                    <a asp-controller="Shop" asp-action="Details"
                       asp-route-id="@Model.Id" class="tl-btn tl-btn--ghost">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="13" height="13" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path d="M7.78 12.53a.75.75 0 01-1.06 0L2.47 8.28a.75.75 0 010-1.06l4.25-4.25a.75.75 0 011.06 1.06L4.81 7h7.44a.75.75 0 010 1.5H4.81l2.97 2.97a.75.75 0 010 1.06z"/>
                        </svg>
                        Keep Listing
                    </a>
                    <form asp-action="Delete" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" method="post" id="deleteForm" style="flex:1">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <button type="submit" class="tl-btn tl-btn--danger" id="deleteBtn" style="width:100%">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="13" height="13" aria-hidden="true">
                                <path d="M11 1.75V3h2.25a.75.75 0 010 1.5H2.75a.75.75 0 010-1.5H5V1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h2.5C10.216 0 11 .784 11 1.75zM4.496 6.675a.75.75 0 10-1.492.15l.66 6.6A1.75 1.75 0 005.405 15h5.19a1.75 1.75 0 001.741-1.575l.66-6.6a.75.75 0 10-1.492-.15l-.66 6.6a.25.25 0 01-.249.225H5.405a.25.25 0 01-.249-.225l-.66-6.6z"/>
                            </svg>
                            Yes, Delete
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        document.getElementById('deleteForm')?.addEventListener('submit', function () {
            const btn = document.getElementById('deleteBtn');
            btn.disabled    = true;
            btn.innerHTML   = `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"
                                     width="14" height="14" style="animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite">
                                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke-opacity=".25"/>
                                    <path stroke-linecap="round" d="M12 2a10 10 0 0110 10"/>
                                </svg> Deleting…`;
        });
    </script>
    <style>
        @@keyframes spin { to { transform:rotate(360deg); } }
    </style>
</body>

--- Views\Shop\Details.cshtml ---
﻿@model ThriftLoop.ViewModels.ShopItemDetailsViewModel
@using ThriftLoop.Constants
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = Model.Title;
    Layout = null;

    bool hasImages = Model.ImageUrls.Count > 0;
    bool hasDiscount = Model.HasActiveDiscount;

    string condClass = Model.Condition switch
    {
        "New" => "detail-condition--new",
        "Like New" => "detail-condition--like-new",
        "Good" => "detail-condition--good",
        "Fair" => "detail-condition--fair",
        _ => "detail-condition--poor"
    };

    // Calculate expiry text for discount
    string? discountExpiryText = null;
    if (hasDiscount && Model.DiscountExpiresAt.HasValue)
    {
        var timeLeft = Model.DiscountExpiresAt.Value - DateTime.UtcNow;
        if (timeLeft.TotalDays >= 1)
        {
            var days = (int)timeLeft.TotalDays;
            discountExpiryText = $"{days} day{(days != 1 ? "s" : "")} left";
        }
        else if (timeLeft.TotalHours >= 1)
        {
            var hours = (int)timeLeft.TotalHours;
            discountExpiryText = $"{hours} hour{(hours != 1 ? "s" : "")} left";
        }
        else if (timeLeft.TotalMinutes > 0)
        {
            var mins = (int)timeLeft.TotalMinutes;
            discountExpiryText = $"{mins} min{(mins != 1 ? "s" : "")} left";
        }
        else
        {
            discountExpiryText = "Ending soon";
        }
    }
}

                                    {

                             class="detail-shop-pill__logo" />

                            @char.ToUpper(Model.ShopName.FirstOrDefault())

                        <span class="detail-shop-pill__label">Sold by</span>

                    <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12"
                         class="detail-shop-pill__chevron" aria-hidden="true">
                        <path d="M6.22 3.22a.75.75 0 011.06 0l4.25 4.25a.75.75 0 010 1.06l-4.25 4.25a.75.75 0 01-1.06-1.06L9.94 8 6.22 4.28a.75.75 0 010-1.06z" />
                    </svg>
                </a>

            <section class="detail-info-col">

                    <span class="detail-category">@Model.Category</span>
                    <span class="detail-condition @condClass">@Model.Condition</span>
                    <span class="detail-listing-type-badge">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="10" height="10" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path d="M9.504.43a1.516 1.516 0 012.437 1.713L10.5 6h3.798a1.516 1.516 0 011.149 2.506l-6 7a1.516 1.516 0 01-2.631-1.275L7.5 10H4.701a1.516 1.516 0 01-1.149-2.506l6-7z" />
                        </svg>
                        Shop
                    </span>
                    @if (hasDiscount)
                    {

                        </span>

                <div class="detail-price-block" id="priceBlock">

                    {

                        <span class="detail-price-current" id="selectedPrice">

                    @if (hasDiscount && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(discountExpiryText))
                    {
                        <div class="detail-discount-expiry" id="discountExpiry">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12">
                                <path d="M8 15A7 7 0 108 1a7 7 0 000 14zm.75-10.25a.75.75 0 00-1.5 0v4a.75.75 0 001.5 0v-4zM8 13a1 1 0 100-2 1 1 0 000 2z" />
                            </svg>
                            @discountExpiryText
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="detail-discount-expiry" id="discountExpiry" style="display:none;">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12">
                                <path d="M8 15A7 7 0 108 1a7 7 0 000 14zm.75-10.25a.75.75 0 00-1.5 0v4a.75.75 0 001.5 0v-4zM8 13a1 1 0 100-2 1 1 0 000 2z" />
                            </svg>
                            <span id="discountExpiryText"></span>
                        </div>
                    }
                    <span class="detail-price-label" id="priceLabel">Starting price</span>
                </div>

                <p class="detail-description">@Model.Description</p>

                @* ── Variant picker ────────────────────────────────────────── *@
                @if (Model.Variants.Count > 0)
                {
                    <div class="vp-shell">

                        @* Step 1 — Variant *@
                        <div class="vp-section">
                            <p class="vp-section__label">
                                Variant
                                <span class="vp-section__required" id="variantRequired" hidden>
