                            </svg>
                        </span>
                    }
                </h1>
                @if (isOwner)
                {
                    <div class="sp-inline__editor" hidden>
                        <input type="text" class="sp-field__input sp-inline__input"
                               value="@Model.ShopName" maxlength="100" />
                        <div class="sp-inline__actions">
                            <button type="button" class="tl-btn tl-btn--primary sp-inline__save">Save</button>
                            <button type="button" class="tl-btn tl-btn--ghost sp-inline__cancel">Cancel</button>
                        </div>
                        <p class="sp-field__error sp-inline__error" hidden></p>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>

            <div class="sp-inline @(isOwner ? "sp-inline--editable" : "")"
                 data-field="Bio" data-maxlength="500">
                <p class="sp-identity__bio sp-inline__display @(!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Bio) ? "" : "sp-identity__bio--empty")">
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Bio))
                    {
                        @Model.Bio
                        @if (isOwner)
                        {
                            <span class="sp-inline__edit-hint" aria-hidden="true">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="11" height="11">
                                    <path d="M11.013 1.427a1.75 1.75 0 012.474 0l1.086 1.086a1.75 1.75 0 010 2.474l-8.61 8.61c-.21.21-.47.364-.756.445l-3.251.93a.75.75 0 01-.927-.928l.929-3.25c.081-.286.235-.547.445-.758l8.61-8.61z" />
                                </svg>
                            </span>
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        @(isOwner ? "Click to add a bio…" : "")
                    }
                </p>
                @if (isOwner)
                {
                    <div class="sp-inline__editor" hidden>
                        <textarea class="sp-field__textarea sp-inline__input"
                                  maxlength="500" rows="3">@Model.Bio</textarea>
                        <div class="sp-inline__actions">
                            <button type="button" class="tl-btn tl-btn--primary sp-inline__save">Save</button>
                            <button type="button" class="tl-btn tl-btn--ghost sp-inline__cancel">Cancel</button>
                        </div>
                        <p class="sp-field__error sp-inline__error" hidden></p>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>

            <div class="sp-address @(isOwner ? "sp-inline sp-inline--editable" : "")" data-field="StoreAddress">
                <div class="sp-address__line-wrapper">
                    <p id="shopAddressDisplay" class="sp-address__line sp-inline__display">
                        @(!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.StoreAddress) ? Model.StoreAddress : "No address set")
                        @if (isOwner)
                        {
                            <span class="sp-inline__edit-hint" aria-hidden="true">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="11" height="11">
                                    <path d="M11.013 1.427a1.75 1.75 0 012.474 0l1.086 1.086a1.75 1.75 0 010 2.474l-8.61 8.61c-.21.21-.47.364-.756.445l-3.251.93a.75.75 0 01-.927-.928l.929-3.25c.081-.286.235-.547.445-.758l8.61-8.61z" />
                                </svg>
                            </span>
                        }
                    </p>
                </div>

                @if (isOwner)
                {
                    <div class="sp-address__editor" hidden>
                        <div class="sp-address__editor-field">
                            <input type="text" id="addressTextInput" class="sp-field__input" placeholder="Street address, city, postal code" value="@Model.StoreAddress" />
                            <button type="button" id="openMapPickerBtn" class="tl-btn tl-btn--outline sp-address__map-btn">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                                    <path d="M21 10c0 7-9 13-9 13S3 17 3 10a9 9 0 0 1 18 0z" />
                                    <circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3" />
                                </svg>
                                Pick on map
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <div class="sp-inline__actions">
                            <button type="button" class="tl-btn tl-btn--primary sp-address__save">Save</button>
                            <button type="button" class="tl-btn tl-btn--ghost sp-address__cancel">Cancel</button>
                        </div>
                        <p class="sp-field__error sp-address__error" hidden></p>
                    </div>
                    <input type="hidden" id="ShopLocation-latitude" value="@(Model.Latitude?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? string.Empty)" />
                    <input type="hidden" id="ShopLocation-longitude" value="@(Model.Longitude?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? string.Empty)" />
                }
                else
                {
                    <input type="hidden" id="ShopLocation-latitude" value="@(Model.Latitude?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? string.Empty)" />
                    <input type="hidden" id="ShopLocation-longitude" value="@(Model.Longitude?.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? string.Empty)" />
                }
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    @* Listings section *@
    <div class="sp-listings-header">
        <span class="sp-listings-header__label">
            Listings
            @if (Model.Items.Any())
            {
                <span style="margin-left:8px; font-size:.78rem; color:var(--c-muted-light); font-weight:400">
                    @Model.Items.Count item@(Model.Items.Count != 1 ? "s" : "")
                </span>
            }
        </span>
        @if (isOwner)
        {
            <a asp-controller="Shop" asp-action="Create"
                   class="tl-btn tl-btn--primary sp-listings-header__add">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="13" height="13" aria-hidden="true">
                    <path d="M7.75 2a.75.75 0 01.75.75V7h4.25a.75.75 0 010 1.5H8.5v4.25a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0V8.5H2.75a.75.75 0 010-1.5H7V2.75A.75.75 0 017.75 2z" />
                </svg>
                Add Item
            </a>
        }
    </div>

    @if (!Model.Items.Any())
    {
        <div class="sp-listings-empty">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"
                 width="48" height="48" aria-hidden="true">
                <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
                      d="M15.75 10.5V6a3.75 3.75 0 10-7.5 0v4.5m11.356-1.993l1.263 12c.07.665-.45 1.243-1.119 1.243H4.25a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.12-1.243l1.264-12A1.125 1.125 0 015.513 7.5h12.974c.576 0 1.059.435 1.119 1.007z" />
            </svg>
            <p>No listings yet.@(isOwner ? " Click \"Add Item\" to get started." : "")</p>
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        @if (isOwner)
        {
            <div class="sp-bulk-actions" id="bulkActionsBar" style="display: none;">
                <label class="sp-bulk-actions__select-all">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="selectAllItems" />
                    <span>Select All</span>
                </label>
                <span class="sp-bulk-actions__selected-count" id="selectedCount">0 selected</span>
                <button type="button" class="sp-bulk-actions__btn" id="bulkDiscountBtn" disabled>
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="11" height="11">
                        <path d="M14 4.5L9 1.5v6l5-3zM7 2.5L2 5.5v5l5 3 5-3v-5L7 2.5z" />
                    </svg>
                    Bulk Discount
                </button>
                <button type="button" class="sp-bulk-actions__btn" id="bulkEnableBtn" disabled>Enable</button>
                <button type="button" class="sp-bulk-actions__btn" id="bulkDisableBtn" disabled>Disable</button>
            </div>
        }

        <div class="sp-items-grid">
            @foreach (var item in Model.Items)
            {
                var isDisabled = item.Status == ItemStatus.Disabled;
                var hasDiscount = item.HasActiveDiscount;
                var soldCount = Model.ItemSoldCounts.GetValueOrDefault(item.Id, 0);
                        
                string? expiryText = null;
                if (hasDiscount && item.DiscountExpiresAt.HasValue)
                {
                    var timeLeft = item.DiscountExpiresAt.Value - DateTime.UtcNow;
                    if (timeLeft.TotalDays >= 1)
                    {
                        var days = (int)timeLeft.TotalDays;
                        expiryText = $"{days}d left";
                    }
                    else if (timeLeft.TotalHours >= 1)
                    {
                        var hours = (int)timeLeft.TotalHours;
                        expiryText = $"{hours}h left";
                    }
                    else if (timeLeft.TotalMinutes > 0)
                    {
                        var mins = (int)timeLeft.TotalMinutes;
                        expiryText = $"{mins}m left";
                    }
                }

                <div class="sp-item-card @(isDisabled ? "sp-item-card--disabled" : "")" data-item-id="@item.Id">
                    @if (isOwner)
                    {
                        <input type="checkbox" class="sp-item-checkbox item-selector" data-item-id="@item.Id" data-status="@item.Status" />
                    }
                    
                    <a asp-controller="Shop" asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@item.Id" class="sp-item-card__link">
                        <div class="sp-item-card__img-wrap">
                            @if (item.ImageUrls.Count > 0)
                            {
                                <img src="@item.ImageUrls[0]" alt="@item.Title"
                                     class="sp-item-card__img" loading="lazy" />
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="sp-item-card__img sp-item-card__img--placeholder" aria-hidden="true">
                                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                         stroke-width="1.2" width="30" height="30">
                                        <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="3" />
                                        <circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5" />
                                        <path d="M21 15l-5-5L5 21" />
                                    </svg>
                                </div>
                            }
                            <span class="sp-item-card__condition">@item.Condition</span>
                            @if (isDisabled)
                            {
                                <span class="sp-item-disabled-badge">Disabled</span>
                            }
                        </div>

                        <div class="sp-item-card__body">
                            <p class="sp-item-card__title">@item.Title</p>
                            
                            <div class="sp-item-card__price-section">
                                @if (hasDiscount)
                                {
                                    <div class="sp-item-card__original-price">
                                        From ₱@(item.OriginalPrice?.ToString("N2"))
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="sp-item-card__current-price-row">
                                        <span class="sp-item-card__current-price">From ₱@item.Price.ToString("N2")</span>
                                        <span class="sp-item-card__discount-badge">-@(item.DiscountPercentage?.ToString("F0"))%</span>
                                    </div>
                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(expiryText))
                                    {
                                        <div class="sp-item-card__discount-expiry">
                                            <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="10" height="10">
                                                <path d="M8 15A7 7 0 108 1a7 7 0 000 14zm.75-10.25a.75.75 0 00-1.5 0v4a.75.75 0 001.5 0v-4zM8 13a1 1 0 100-2 1 1 0 000 2z" />
                                            </svg>
                                            @expiryText
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <div class="sp-item-card__current-price-row">
                                        <span class="sp-item-card__current-price">From ₱@item.Price.ToString("N2")</span>
                                    </div>
                                }
                            </div>
                            
                            <p class="sp-item-card__category">@item.Category</p>
                            
                            @if (soldCount > 0)
                            {
                                <div class="sp-item-card__sold-count">
                                    <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="10" height="10">
                                        <path d="M0 1.75A.75.75 0 01.75 1h1.628a1.75 1.75 0 011.734 1.51L4.358 4h9.109a.75.75 0 01.72.96l-1.5 5.25a.75.75 0 01-.72.54H5.744l.239 1.185A.25.25 0 006.22 12h7.28a.75.75 0 010 1.5H6.22a1.75 1.75 0 01-1.717-1.424L2.637 2.773A.25.25 0 002.395 2.5H.75A.75.75 0 010 1.75z" />
                                    </svg>
                                    @soldCount sold
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </a>

                    @if (isOwner)
                    {
                        <div class="sp-item-card__owner-actions">
                            <a href="/Shop/Edit/@item.Id"
                                   class="sp-item-card__action sp-item-card__action--edit"
                                   onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="11" height="11" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:3px">
                                    <path d="M11.013 1.427a1.75 1.75 0 012.474 0l1.086 1.086a1.75 1.75 0 010 2.474l-8.61 8.61c-.21.21-.47.364-.756.445l-3.251.93a.75.75 0 01-.927-.928l.929-3.25c.081-.286.235-.547.445-.758l8.61-8.61z" />
                                </svg>
                                Edit
                            </a>
                            <a href="/Shop/Delete/@item.Id"
                                   class="sp-item-card__action sp-item-card__action--delete"
                                   onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
                                Delete
                            </a>
                            @if (item.Status == ItemStatus.Available || item.Status == ItemStatus.Disabled)
                            {
                                var canDiscount = !hasDiscount;
                                if (canDiscount)
                                {
                                    <button type="button"
                                            class="sp-item-card__action sp-item-card__action--discount discount-item-btn"
                                            data-item-id="@item.Id"
                                            data-item-title="@item.Title"
                                            data-item-price="@item.Price"
                                            data-item-image="@(item.ImageUrls.FirstOrDefault())"
                                            onclick="event.stopPropagation(); openDiscountModal(this)">
                                        Discount
                                    </button>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <button type="button"
                                            class="sp-item-card__action"
                                            onclick="event.stopPropagation(); removeDiscount(@item.Id)">
                                        Remove Discount
                                    </button>
                                }
                                
                                var toggleText = item.Status == ItemStatus.Available ? "Disable" : "Enable";
                                var toggleClass = item.Status == ItemStatus.Available ? "disable" : "enable";
                                <button type="button"
                                        class="sp-item-card__action sp-item-card__action--toggle @toggleClass toggle-item-btn"
                                        data-item-id="@item.Id"
                                        data-current-status="@item.Status"
                                        onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
                                    @toggleText
                                </button>
                            }
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    }

</div>

@* Discount Modal *@
<div id="discountModal" class="discount-modal-backdrop" style="display:none;">
    <div class="discount-modal">
        <h2 class="discount-modal__title">Apply Discount</h2>
        <p class="discount-modal__subtitle" id="modalSubtitle">Set a discount for this listing</p>

        <input type="hidden" id="modalItemId" />
        <input type="hidden" id="modalIsBulk" value="false" />

        <div class="discount-presets">
            <button type="button" class="discount-preset" data-percent="5">5%</button>
            <button type="button" class="discount-preset" data-percent="10">10%</button>
            <button type="button" class="discount-preset" data-percent="20">20%</button>
        </div>

        <div class="discount-field">
            <label class="discount-field__label">Custom Percentage</label>
            <div class="discount-field__input-wrapper">
                <input type="number" id="discountPercent" class="discount-field__input"
                       min="1" max="99" step="1" value="10" />
                <span class="discount-field__suffix">%</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        <label class="discount-field__label">Discount Duration</label>
        <div class="discount-expiry-options">
            <button type="button" class="discount-expiry-option discount-expiry-option--active" data-duration="indefinite">Indefinite</button>
            <button type="button" class="discount-expiry-option" data-duration="24">24h</button>
            <button type="button" class="discount-expiry-option" data-duration="72">3d</button>
            <button type="button" class="discount-expiry-option" data-duration="168">7d</button>
        </div>

        <div id="modalError" class="discount-modal__error" style="display:none;"></div>

        <div class="discount-modal__actions">
            <button type="button" class="tl-btn tl-btn--ghost" onclick="closeDiscountModal()" style="flex:1">Cancel</button>
            <button type="button" class="tl-btn tl-btn--primary" onclick="applyDiscount()" style="flex:1">Apply</button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@await Html.PartialAsync("_AddressMapModal")
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="~/js/map-picker.js" asp-append-version="true"></script>

@if (isOwner)
{
    <input type="hidden" id="afToken" value="@afToken" />
    <script>
        const SHOP_ID = @Model.ShopId;
        const AF_TOKEN = document.getElementById('afToken').value;
        const FIELD_URL = '/Shop/SaveField';
        const IMAGE_URL = '/Shop/SaveImage';
        const TOGGLE_URL = '/Shop/ToggleItemStatus';
        const DISCOUNT_URL = '/Shop/ApplyShopDiscount';
        const REMOVE_DISCOUNT_URL = '/Shop/RemoveShopDiscount';
        const BULK_DISCOUNT_URL = '/Shop/BulkApplyDiscount';

        let currentItemId = 0;
        let selectedDuration = null;
        let selectedItems = new Set();

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        //  ITEM SELECTION & BULK ACTIONS
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        
        const bulkBar = document.getElementById('bulkActionsBar');
        const selectAllCb = document.getElementById('selectAllItems');
        const selectedCountEl = document.getElementById('selectedCount');
        const bulkDiscountBtn = document.getElementById('bulkDiscountBtn');
        const bulkEnableBtn = document.getElementById('bulkEnableBtn');
        const bulkDisableBtn = document.getElementById('bulkDisableBtn');

        function updateBulkUI() {
        const count = selectedItems.size;
        selectedCountEl.textContent = count + ' selected';
            
        const hasSelected = count > 0;
        bulkDiscountBtn.disabled = !hasSelected;
        bulkEnableBtn.disabled = !hasSelected;
        bulkDisableBtn.disabled = !hasSelected;
            
        if (count > 0) {
        bulkBar.style.display = 'flex';
        } else {
        bulkBar.style.display = 'none';
        }
        }

        document.querySelectorAll('.item-selector').forEach(cb => {
        cb.addEventListener('change', function() {
        const itemId = parseInt(this.dataset.itemId);
        if (this.checked) {
        selectedItems.add(itemId);
        } else {
        selectedItems.delete(itemId);
        }
        updateBulkUI();
                
        const allCbs = document.querySelectorAll('.item-selector');
        const checkedCbs = document.querySelectorAll('.item-selector:checked');
        if (selectAllCb) {
        selectAllCb.checked = allCbs.length === checkedCbs.length;
        selectAllCb.indeterminate = checkedCbs.length > 0 && checkedCbs.length < allCbs.length;
        }
        });
        });

        if (selectAllCb) {
        selectAllCb.addEventListener('change', function() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.item-selector').forEach(cb => {
        cb.checked = this.checked;
        const itemId = parseInt(cb.dataset.itemId);
        if (this.checked) {
        selectedItems.add(itemId);
        } else {
        selectedItems.delete(itemId);
        }
        });
        updateBulkUI();
        });
        }

        bulkDiscountBtn?.addEventListener('click', function() {
        if (selectedItems.size === 0) return;
            
        document.getElementById('modalIsBulk').value = 'true';
        document.getElementById('modalSubtitle').textContent = `Apply discount to ${selectedItems.size} item${selectedItems.size !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`;
        document.getElementById('discountPercent').value = 10;
        document.querySelectorAll('.discount-preset').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('discount-preset--active'));
        document.querySelector('.discount-preset[data-percent="10"]').classList.add('discount-preset--active');
        document.querySelectorAll('.discount-expiry-option').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('discount-expiry-option--active'));
        document.querySelector('.discount-expiry-option[data-duration="indefinite"]').classList.add('discount-expiry-option--active');
        selectedDuration = null;
        document.getElementById('modalError').style.display = 'none';
        document.getElementById('discountModal').style.display = 'flex';
        });

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        //  DISCOUNT MODAL
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        function openDiscountModal(btn) {
        const itemId = btn.dataset.itemId;
        const title = btn.dataset.itemTitle;
            
        currentItemId = parseInt(itemId);
        document.getElementById('modalIsBulk').value = 'false';
        document.getElementById('modalSubtitle').textContent = `Set a discount for "${title}"`;
        document.getElementById('modalItemId').value = itemId;
        document.getElementById('discountPercent').value = 10;
            
        document.querySelectorAll('.discount-preset').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('discount-preset--active'));
        document.querySelector('.discount-preset[data-percent="10"]').classList.add('discount-preset--active');
        document.querySelectorAll('.discount-expiry-option').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('discount-expiry-option--active'));
        document.querySelector('.discount-expiry-option[data-duration="indefinite"]').classList.add('discount-expiry-option--active');
        selectedDuration = null;
            
        document.getElementById('modalError').style.display = 'none';
        document.getElementById('discountModal').style.display = 'flex';
        }

        function closeDiscountModal() {
        document.getElementById('discountModal').style.display = 'none';
        }

        document.querySelectorAll('.discount-preset').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.discount-preset').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('discount-preset--active'));
        this.classList.add('discount-preset--active');
        document.getElementById('discountPercent').value = this.dataset.percent;
        });
        });

        document.querySelectorAll('.discount-expiry-option').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.discount-expiry-option').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('discount-expiry-option--active'));
        this.classList.add('discount-expiry-option--active');
        selectedDuration = this.dataset.duration === 'indefinite' ? null : parseInt(this.dataset.duration);
        });
        });

        async function applyDiscount() {
        const percent = parseFloat(document.getElementById('discountPercent').value);
        if (percent < 1 || percent > 99) {
        showModalError('Discount must be between 1% and 99%.');
        return;
        }

        let expiresAt = null;
        if (selectedDuration) {
        const date = new Date();
        date.setHours(date.getHours() + selectedDuration);
        expiresAt = date.toISOString();
        }

        const isBulk = document.getElementById('modalIsBulk').value === 'true';
            
        const btn = document.querySelector('#discountModal .tl-btn--primary');
        btn.disabled = true;
        btn.textContent = 'Applying...';

        try {
        let url, body;
                
        if (isBulk) {
        url = BULK_DISCOUNT_URL;
        body = {
        itemIds: Array.from(selectedItems),
        discountPercentage: percent,
        expiresAt: expiresAt
        };
        } else {
        url = DISCOUNT_URL;
        body = {
        itemId: currentItemId,
        discountPercentage: percent,
        expiresAt: expiresAt
        };
        }

        const response = await fetch(url, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'RequestVerificationToken': AF_TOKEN
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(body)
        });

        const data = await response.json();

        if (data.success) {
        location.reload();
        } else {
        showModalError(data.error || 'Failed to apply discount.');
        btn.disabled = false;
        btn.textContent = 'Apply';
        }
        } catch (err) {
        showModalError('Network error. Please try again.');
        btn.disabled = false;
        btn.textContent = 'Apply';
        }
        }

        async function removeDiscount(itemId) {
        if (!confirm('Remove the discount and restore original prices?')) return;

        try {
        const response = await fetch(REMOVE_DISCOUNT_URL + '?itemId=' + itemId, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
        'RequestVerificationToken': AF_TOKEN
        }
        });

        const data = await response.json();

        if (data.success) {
        location.reload();
        } else {
        alert(data.error || 'Failed to remove discount.');
        }
        } catch (err) {
        alert('Network error. Please try again.');
        }
        }

        function showModalError(msg) {
        const errEl = document.getElementById('modalError');
        errEl.textContent = msg;
        errEl.style.display = 'block';
        }

        document.getElementById('discountModal').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (e.target === this) closeDiscountModal();
        });

        window.openDiscountModal = openDiscountModal;
        window.closeDiscountModal = closeDiscountModal;
        window.applyDiscount = applyDiscount;
        window.removeDiscount = removeDiscount;

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        //  TOGGLE ITEM STATUS
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        
        async function toggleItemStatus(itemId) {
        const res = await fetch(TOGGLE_URL, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'RequestVerificationToken': AF_TOKEN },
        body: JSON.stringify({ itemId: itemId })
        });
        return res.json();
        }

        document.querySelectorAll('.toggle-item-btn').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
                
        const itemId = parseInt(this.dataset.itemId);
        const originalText = this.innerHTML;
                
        this.disabled = true;
        this.innerHTML = '...';
                
        try {
        const result = await toggleItemStatus(itemId);
        if (result.ok) {
        location.reload();
        } else {
        alert(result.error || 'Failed to update status.');
        this.disabled = false;
        this.innerHTML = originalText;
        }
        } catch (err) {
        alert('Network error.');
        this.disabled = false;
        this.innerHTML = originalText;
        }
        });
        });

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        //  IMAGE MODAL
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        const backdrop = document.getElementById('imgModalBackdrop');
        const modalTitle = document.getElementById('imgModalTitle');
        const previewArea = document.getElementById('imgPreviewArea');
        const dropZone = document.getElementById('imgDropZone');
        const fileInput = document.getElementById('imgFileInput');
        const dropInner = document.getElementById('imgDropInner');
        const saveBtn = document.getElementById('imgModalSave');
        const cancelBtn = document.getElementById('imgModalCancel');
        const closeBtn = document.getElementById('imgModalClose');
        const errorEl = document.getElementById('imgModalError');

        let activeField = null;
        let pendingFile = null;

        function openModal(field, currentUrl, title) {
        activeField = field;
        pendingFile = null;
        saveBtn.disabled = true;
        errorEl.hidden = true;
        fileInput.value = '';
        modalTitle.textContent = title;

        previewArea.innerHTML = '';
        if (currentUrl && currentUrl !== 'null') {
        if (field === 'BannerUrl') {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'sp-modal__banner-preview';
        const cleanUrl = currentUrl.split('?')[0];
        div.style.backgroundImage = `url('${cleanUrl}')`;
        previewArea.appendChild(div);
        } else {
        const img = document.createElement('img');
        const cleanUrl = currentUrl.split('?')[0];
        img.src = cleanUrl;
        img.className = 'sp-modal__logo-preview';
        previewArea.appendChild(img);
        }
        } else {
        const empty = document.createElement('div');
        empty.className = 'sp-modal__preview-empty';
        empty.textContent = 'No image set — upload one below';
        previewArea.appendChild(empty);
        }

        dropInner.querySelector('.sp-modal__drop-label').textContent = 'Click or drag an image here';
        backdrop.removeAttribute('hidden');
        dropZone.focus();
        }

        function closeModal() {
        backdrop.setAttribute('hidden', '');
        activeField = pendingFile = null;
        }

        closeBtn?.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
        cancelBtn?.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
        backdrop?.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === backdrop) closeModal(); });
        document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeModal(); });

        function handleFile(file) {
        if (!file) return;
        const allowed = ['image/jpeg','image/png','image/webp','image/gif'];
        if (!allowed.includes(file.type)) { showModalImageError('Only JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF images are allowed.'); return; }
        if (file.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) { showModalImageError('File exceeds the 5 MB limit.'); return; }

        errorEl.hidden = true;
        pendingFile = file;
        saveBtn.disabled = false;

        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = e => {
        previewArea.innerHTML = '';
        if (activeField === 'BannerUrl') {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'sp-modal__banner-preview';
        div.style.backgroundImage = `url('${e.target.result}')`;
        previewArea.appendChild(div);
        } else {
        const img = document.createElement('img');
        img.src = e.target.result;
        img.className = 'sp-modal__logo-preview';
        previewArea.appendChild(img);
        }
        };
        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
        dropInner.querySelector('.sp-modal__drop-label').textContent = file.name;
        }

        fileInput?.addEventListener('change', () => handleFile(fileInput.files[0]));
        dropZone?.addEventListener('dragover', e => { e.preventDefault(); dropZone.classList.add('sp-modal__drop-zone--over'); });
        dropZone?.addEventListener('dragleave', () => dropZone.classList.remove('sp-modal__drop-zone--over'));
        dropZone?.addEventListener('drop', e => {
        e.preventDefault();
        dropZone.classList.remove('sp-modal__drop-zone--over');
        handleFile(e.dataTransfer.files[0]);
        });

        saveBtn?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        if (!pendingFile || !activeField) return;
            
        const originalText = saveBtn.textContent;
        saveBtn.disabled = true;
        saveBtn.textContent = 'Uploading...';
        errorEl.hidden = true;

        try {
        const fd = new FormData();
        fd.append('shopId', SHOP_ID);
        fd.append('field', activeField);
        fd.append('file', pendingFile);
                
        const res = await fetch(IMAGE_URL, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'RequestVerificationToken': AF_TOKEN },
        body: fd
        });
        const data = await res.json();
                
        if (!data.ok) {
        showModalImageError(data.error || 'Upload failed');
        saveBtn.disabled = false;
        saveBtn.textContent = originalText;
        return;
        }

        const cacheBuster = `${data.url}?v=${Date.now()}`;

        if (activeField === 'BannerUrl') {
        const banner = document.getElementById('shopBanner');
        banner.style.backgroundImage = `url('${cacheBuster}')`;
        const placeholder = banner.querySelector('.sp-banner__placeholder');
        if (placeholder) placeholder.remove();
        banner.setAttribute('data-original-bg', data.url);
        } else {
        const existingLogo = document.getElementById('shopLogoImg');
        if (existingLogo) {
        if (existingLogo.tagName === 'DIV') {
        const img = document.createElement('img');
        img.src = cacheBuster;
        img.id = 'shopLogoImg';
        img.alt = 'Shop logo';
        img.className = 'sp-identity__logo';
        img.setAttribute('data-original-src', data.url);
        existingLogo.replaceWith(img);
        } else if (existingLogo.tagName === 'IMG') {
        existingLogo.src = cacheBuster;
        existingLogo.setAttribute('data-original-src', data.url);
        }
        }
        }
                
        closeModal();
        } catch (err) {
        showModalImageError('Network error. Please try again.');
        } finally {
        saveBtn.disabled = false;
        saveBtn.textContent = originalText;
        }
        });

        function showModalImageError(msg) {
        errorEl.textContent = msg;
        errorEl.hidden = false;
        }

        const bannerElement = document.getElementById('shopBanner');
        if (bannerElement) {
        bannerElement.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const style = bannerElement.style.backgroundImage;
        let current = null;
        if (style && style !== 'none') {
        current = style.replace(/^url\(['"]?/, '').replace(/['"]?\)$/, '').split('?')[0];
        }
        openModal('BannerUrl', current, 'Banner Image');
        });
        }

        const logoWrap = document.getElementById('shopLogoWrap');
        if (logoWrap) {
        const openLogo = () => {
        const img = document.getElementById('shopLogoImg');
        let current = null;
        if (img && img.tagName === 'IMG') {
        current = img.getAttribute('data-original-src') || img.src.split('?')[0];
        }
        openModal('LogoUrl', current, 'Logo Image');
        };
        logoWrap.addEventListener('click', openLogo);
        logoWrap.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
        e.preventDefault();
        openLogo();
        }
        });
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        //  INLINE TEXT EDITING
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        async function saveTextField(field, value) {
        const res = await fetch(FIELD_URL, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'RequestVerificationToken': AF_TOKEN },
        body: JSON.stringify({ shopId: SHOP_ID, field, value })
        });
        return res.json();
        }

        document.querySelectorAll('.sp-inline--editable').forEach(block => {
        const display = block.querySelector('.sp-inline__display');
        const editor = block.querySelector('.sp-inline__editor');
        const input = block.querySelector('.sp-inline__input');
        const saveBtnInline = block.querySelector('.sp-inline__save');
        const cancelBtnInline = block.querySelector('.sp-inline__cancel');
        const errorElInline = block.querySelector('.sp-inline__error');
        const field = block.dataset.field;

        if (!display || !editor || !input) return;

        let originalValue = input.value;

        function openEditor() {
        input.value = originalValue;
        display.hidden = true;
        editor.removeAttribute('hidden');
        block.classList.add('sp-inline--editing');
        input.focus();
        if (input.tagName === 'INPUT')
        input.setSelectionRange(input.value.length, input.value.length);
        }

        function closeEditor(restore) {
        if (restore) input.value = originalValue;
        display.hidden = false;
        editor.setAttribute('hidden', '');
        errorElInline.hidden = true;
        block.classList.remove('sp-inline--editing');
        }

        display.addEventListener('click', openEditor);
        cancelBtnInline.addEventListener('click', () => closeEditor(true));

        input.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
        if (e.key === 'Escape') { e.preventDefault(); closeEditor(true); }
        if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'Enter') saveBtnInline.click();
        });

        saveBtnInline.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const val = input.value.trim();
        errorElInline.hidden = true;
        saveBtnInline.disabled = true;
        saveBtnInline.textContent = 'Saving...';

        const res = await saveTextField(field, val);

        saveBtnInline.disabled = false;
        saveBtnInline.textContent = 'Save';

        if (!res.ok) {
        errorElInline.textContent = res.error;
        errorElInline.hidden = false;
        return;
        }

        originalValue = val;

        if (field === 'ShopName') {
        const h1 = display;
        const editHint = h1.querySelector('.sp-inline__edit-hint');
        if (editHint) {
        h1.childNodes[0].textContent = val + ' ';
        } else {
        h1.textContent = val;
        }
        document.title = val;
        } else {
        display.textContent = val || 'Click to add a bio...';
        display.classList.toggle('sp-identity__bio--empty', !val);
        if (val) {
        const hint = block.querySelector('.sp-inline__edit-hint');
        if (hint) display.appendChild(hint);
        }
        }

        closeEditor(false);
        });
        });

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        //  ADDRESS INLINE EDIT
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        const addressContainer = document.querySelector('.sp-address');
        if (addressContainer && addressContainer.classList.contains('sp-inline--editable')) {
        const displayEl = document.getElementById('shopAddressDisplay');
        const editorDiv = addressContainer.querySelector('.sp-address__editor');
        const addressInput = document.getElementById('addressTextInput');
        const saveAddressBtn = addressContainer.querySelector('.sp-address__save');
        const cancelAddressBtn = addressContainer.querySelector('.sp-address__cancel');
        const addressError = addressContainer.querySelector('.sp-address__error');
        const mapPickerBtn = document.getElementById('openMapPickerBtn');
            
        let originalAddress = addressInput?.value || '';

        function openAddressEditor() {
        if (!editorDiv) return;
        originalAddress = addressInput?.value || '';
        displayEl.style.display = 'none';
        editorDiv.removeAttribute('hidden');
        addressInput?.focus();
        }

        function closeAddressEditor(restore) {
        if (restore && addressInput) addressInput.value = originalAddress;
        displayEl.style.display = 'block';
        editorDiv?.setAttribute('hidden', '');
        if (addressError) addressError.hidden = true;
        }

        displayEl?.addEventListener('click', openAddressEditor);
        cancelAddressBtn?.addEventListener('click', () => closeAddressEditor(true));

        saveAddressBtn?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const newAddress = addressInput?.value.trim() || '';
        if (addressError) addressError.hidden = true;
        saveAddressBtn.disabled = true;
        saveAddressBtn.textContent = 'Saving...';

        const res = await saveTextField('StoreAddress', newAddress);

        if (!res.ok) {
        saveAddressBtn.disabled = false;
        saveAddressBtn.textContent = 'Save';
        if (addressError) {
        addressError.textContent = res.error || 'Failed to save address';
        addressError.hidden = false;
        }
        return;
        }

        try {
        const lat = document.getElementById('ShopLocation-latitude')?.value || '';
        const lng = document.getElementById('ShopLocation-longitude')?.value || '';
        const latNum = lat ? parseFloat(lat) : null;
        const lngNum = lng ? parseFloat(lng) : null;
                    
        if (latNum != null && lngNum != null) {
        const locRes = await fetch('/Shop/SaveLocation', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'RequestVerificationToken': AF_TOKEN },
        body: JSON.stringify({ shopId: SHOP_ID, latitude: latNum, longitude: lngNum })
        });
        const locJson = await locRes.json();
        if (!locJson.ok && addressError) {
        addressError.textContent = locJson.error || 'Failed to save coordinates';
        addressError.hidden = false;
        }
        }
        } catch (err) {
        console.warn('Failed to save coordinates', err);
        } finally {
        saveAddressBtn.disabled = false;
        saveAddressBtn.textContent = 'Save';
        }

        displayEl.innerHTML = (newAddress || 'No address set') +
        `<span class="sp-inline__edit-hint" aria-hidden="true">` +
        `<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" width="11" height="11">` +
        `<path d="M11.013 1.427a1.75 1.75 0 012.474 0l1.086 1.086a1.75 1.75 0 010 2.474l-8.61 8.61c-.21.21-.47.364-.756.445l-3.251.93a.75.75 0 01-.927-.928l.929-3.25c.081-.286.235-.547.445-.758l8.61-8.61z" />` +
        `</svg></span>`;
        originalAddress = newAddress;
        closeAddressEditor(false);
        });

        if (mapPickerBtn && typeof window.openMapPicker === 'function') {
        mapPickerBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        window.openMapPicker('ShopLocation', (latLng, addressString) => {
        if (addressInput && addressString) {
        addressInput.value = addressString;
        }
        });
        });
        }
        }
    </script>
}

--- Views\User\index.cshtml ---
﻿@model ThriftLoop.DTOs.User.UpdateProfileDTO
@using ThriftLoop.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "My Profile";
    Layout = null;

    var profile = ViewBag.Profile as ThriftLoop.DTOs.User.UserProfileDTO;
    var sellerApp = ViewBag.SellerApplication as ThriftLoop.DTOs.User.SellerApplicationStatusDTO;

    @* ── Address field validation state ───────────────────────── *@
    var addrError = ViewData.ModelState.ContainsKey("Address")
                    && ViewData.ModelState["Address"]!.Errors.Count > 0;
    var addrErrorMsg = addrError
                       ? ViewData.ModelState["Address"]!.Errors[0].ErrorMessage
                       : string.Empty;
}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>@ViewData["Title"] - ThriftLoop</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/User.css" asp-append-version="true" />
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Navbar.css" asp-append-version="true" />

    @* ── Leaflet + Map Picker ──────────────────────────────────── *@
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/map-picker.css" asp-append-version="true" />
</head>
<body>
    @await Html.PartialAsync("_Navbar")

    <div class="up-container">
        <div class="up-shell">

            @* ── Left sidebar: user info ───────────────────────────────────────── *@
            <aside class="up-sidebar" aria-label="Profile information">
                <div class="up-sidebar__header">
                    <span class="up-sidebar__title">Your Profile</span>
                </div>

                <div class="up-profile-card">
                    <div class="up-avatar up-avatar--large">
                        @(profile?.FullName?.FirstOrDefault().ToString().ToUpper() ?? "U")
                    </div>
                    <div class="up-profile-name">@(profile?.FullName ?? "User")</div>
                    <div class="up-profile-badges">
                        <span class="up-badge">
                            <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                <path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2" />
                                <circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4" />
                            </svg>
                            @profile?.Role
                        </span>
                        @if (profile?.IsGoogleAccount == true)
                        {
                            <span class="up-badge up-badge--google">
                                <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
                                    <path d="M22.56 12.25c0-.78-.07-1.53-.2-2.25H12v4.26h5.92c-.26 1.37-1.04 2.53-2.21 3.31v2.77h3.57c2.08-1.92 3.28-4.74 3.28-8.09z" />
                                    <path d="M12 23c2.97 0 5.46-.98 7.28-2.66l-3.57-2.77c-.98.66-2.23 1.06-3.71 1.06-2.86 0-5.29-1.93-6.16-4.53H2.18v2.84C3.99 20.53 7.7 23 12 23z" />
                                    <path d="M5.84 14.09c-.22-.66-.35-1.36-.35-2.09s.13-1.43.35-2.09V7.07H2.18C1.43 8.55 1 10.22 1 12s.43 3.45 1.18 4.93l2.85-2.22.81-.62z" />
                                    <path d="M12 5.38c1.62 0 3.06.56 4.21 1.64l3.15-3.15C17.45 2.09 14.97 1 12 1 7.7 1 3.99 3.47 2.18 7.07l3.66 2.84c.87-2.6 3.3-4.53 6.16-4.53z" />
                                </svg>
                                Google Account
                            </span>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="up-filter-group">
                    <span class="up-filter-group__label">Account Information</span>
                    <ul class="up-info-list">
                        <li class="up-info-item">
                            <span class="up-info-label">Email</span>
                            <span class="up-info-value">@profile?.Email</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="up-info-item">
                            <span class="up-info-label">Member Since</span>
                            <span class="up-info-value">@profile?.CreatedAt.ToString("MMMM d, yyyy")</span>
                        </li>
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(profile?.PhoneNumber))
                        {
                            <li class="up-info-item">
                                <span class="up-info-label">Phone</span>
                                <span class="up-info-value">@profile?.PhoneNumber</span>
                            </li>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(profile?.Address))
                        {
                            <li class="up-info-item">
                                <span class="up-info-label">Address</span>
                                <span class="up-info-value">@profile?.Address</span>
                            </li>
                        }
                    </ul>
                </div>

                @* ── BECOME A SELLER BUTTON ── *@
                @if (profile?.Role != "Seller" && profile?.Role != "Admin")
                {
                    <div class="up-filter-group" style="margin-top: 20px; padding-top: 16px; border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);">
                        <a asp-controller="User" asp-action="Requests" class="up-btn up-btn--primary" style="width: 100%; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;">
                            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" />
                            </svg>
                            Become a Seller
                        </a>
                        <p class="up-form-hint" style="margin-top: 10px; text-align: center; font-size: 0.75rem;">
                            Start selling your items to thousands of buyers
                        </p>

                        @if (sellerApp != null && sellerApp.Status == ApplicationStatus.Pending)
                        {
                            <div class="up-alert up-alert--info" style="margin-top: 16px; padding: 10px; font-size: 0.75rem;">
                                <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" />
                                    <polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14" />
                                </svg>
                                <span>Seller application pending review</span>
                            </div>
                        }
                        else if (sellerApp != null && sellerApp.Status == ApplicationStatus.Rejected)
                        {
                            <div class="up-alert up-alert--warning" style="margin-top: 16px; padding: 10px; font-size: 0.75rem;">
                                <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" />
                                    <line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12" />
                                    <line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16" />
                                </svg>
                                <span>Previous application rejected — you can reapply</span>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>
                }
                else if (profile?.Role == "Seller")
                {
                    <div class="up-filter-group" style="margin-top: 20px; padding-top: 16px; border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);">
                        <a asp-controller="Shop" asp-action="Index" class="up-btn up-btn--primary" style="width: 100%; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;">
                            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                <rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2" />
                                <line x1="16" y1="2" x2="16" y2="6" />
                                <line x1="8" y1="2" x2="8" y2="6" />
                                <line x1="3" y1="10" x2="21" y2="10" />
                            </svg>
                            Manage Your Shop
                        </a>
                    </div>
                }
            </aside>

            @* ── Main content: edit profile form ────────────────────────────────── *@
            <main class="up-main">
                <header class="up-feed-header">
                    <h1 class="up-feed-title">Edit Profile</h1>
                    <p class="up-feed-meta">Update your personal information</p>
                </header>

                @if (TempData["ProfileSuccess"] != null)
                {
                    <div class="up-alert up-alert--success">
                        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12" />
                        </svg>
                        <span>@TempData["ProfileSuccess"]</span>
                    </div>
                }

                @if (TempData["InfoMessage"] != null)
                {
                    <div class="up-alert up-alert--info">
                        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" />
                            <line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12" />
                            <line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16" />
                        </svg>
                        <span>@TempData["InfoMessage"]</span>
                    </div>
                }

                <div class="up-form-card">
                    <form method="post" asp-action="UpdateProfile">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

                        <div class="up-form-group">
                            <label asp-for="FullName" class="up-form-label">Full Name</label>
                            <input asp-for="FullName"
                                   class="up-form-input @(ViewData.ModelState.ContainsKey("FullName") && ViewData.ModelState["FullName"]!.Errors.Count > 0 ? "up-form-input--error" : "")"
                                   placeholder="Enter your full name" />
                            <span asp-validation-for="FullName" class="up-form-error"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="up-form-group">
                            <label asp-for="PhoneNumber" class="up-form-label">Phone Number</label>
                            <input asp-for="PhoneNumber"
                                   class="up-form-input @(ViewData.ModelState.ContainsKey("PhoneNumber") && ViewData.ModelState["PhoneNumber"]!.Errors.Count > 0 ? "up-form-input--error" : "")"
                                   placeholder="e.g., +63 912 345 6789" />
                            <span asp-validation-for="PhoneNumber" class="up-form-error"></span>
                            <span class="up-form-hint">Include country code for better delivery coordination</span>
                        </div>

                        @* ── Address with map picker ──────────────────────────── *@
                        @await Html.PartialAsync("_AddressInputWithMap", (object?)null,
                            new ViewDataDictionary(ViewData)
                            {
                                { "FieldId",      "Address" },
                                { "FieldName",    "Address" },
                                { "Label",        "Address" },
                                { "CurrentValue", Model?.Address ?? string.Empty },
                                { "Placeholder",  "Street, Barangay, City/Municipality, Province" },
                                { "HintText",     "Your delivery address for purchases — or click Map to pin it" },
                                { "HasError",     addrError },
                                { "ErrorMessage", addrErrorMsg }
                            })

                        <div class="up-form-actions">
                            <button type="submit" class="up-btn up-btn--primary">
                                <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">

                                    <polygon points="18 2 22 6 12 16 8 16 8 12 18 2" />
                                </svg>
                                Save Changes
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>

                {

                        <div class="up-security-header">
                            <span class="up-security-title">Password & Security</span>
                            <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                                <rect x="3" y="11" width="18" height="11" rx="2" ry="2" />
                                <path d="M7 11V7a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v4" />

                        </a>

﻿@model ThriftLoop.DTOs.User.SellerApplicationDTO
@using ThriftLoop.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Seller Application";
    Layout = null;

    var existingApp = ViewBag.Application as ThriftLoop.DTOs.User.SellerApplicationStatusDTO;

    @* ── StoreAddress validation state ────────────────────────── *@
    var storeAddrError = ViewData.ModelState.ContainsKey("StoreAddress")
                         && ViewData.ModelState["StoreAddress"]!.Errors.Count > 0;
    var storeAddrErrorMsg = storeAddrError
                            ? ViewData.ModelState["StoreAddress"]!.Errors[0].ErrorMessage
                            : string.Empty;
}

<!DOCTYPE html>

    ViewData["Title"] = "Add Funds";
    Layout = "~/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml";

@section Styles {
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Wallet.css" asp-append-version="true" />
}

<div class="addfunds-shell">

    <nav class="detail-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">
        <a asp-action="Index" asp-controller="Wallet" class="detail-breadcrumb__link">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" aria-hidden="true">
                <path d="M12.5 5L7.5 10L12.5 15" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
            </svg>
            Back to Wallet
        </a>
    </nav>

    <div class="addfunds-card">

        <div class="addfunds-card__icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.25 18.75a60.07 60.07 0 0115.797 2.101c.727.198 1.453-.342 1.453-1.096V18.75M3.75 4.5v.75A.75.75 0 013 6h-.75m0 0v-.375c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125H20.25M2.25 6v9m18-10.5v.75c0 .414.336.75.75.75h.75m-1.5-1.5h.375c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v9.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-.375m1.5-1.5H21a.75.75 0 00-.75.75v.75m0 0H3.75m0 0h-.375a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.125-1.125V15m1.5 1.5v-.75A.75.75 0 003 15h-.75M15 10.5a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0zm3 0h.008v.008H18V10.5zm-12 0h.008v.008H6V10.5z" />
            </svg>
        </div>

        <h1 class="addfunds-card__title">Add Funds via GCash</h1>
        <p class="addfunds-card__subtitle">
            Scan the QR code with GCash, send money, then upload your receipt screenshot.
        </p>

        @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] is string successMsg)
        {
            <div class="addfunds-alert addfunds-alert--success" role="alert">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="16" height="16">
                    <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.857-9.809a.75.75 0 00-1.214-.882l-3.483 4.79-1.88-1.88a.75.75 0 10-1.06 1.061l2.5 2.5a.75.75 0 001.137-.089l4-5.5z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                </svg>
                @successMsg
            </div>
        }

        @if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] is string errMsg)
        {
            <div class="addfunds-alert addfunds-alert--error" role="alert">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="16" height="16">
                    <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M18 10a8 8 0 11-16 0 8 8 0 0116 0zm-8 5a1 1 0 100-2 1 1 0 000 2zm0-9a1 1 0 00-1 1v4a1 1 0 102 0V6a1 1 0 00-1-1z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                </svg>
                @errMsg
            </div>
        }

        @* ── Step 1: Display QR Code ──────────────────────────────────────── *@
        <div class="addfunds-step">
            <div class="addfunds-step__badge">1</div>
            <div class="addfunds-step__content">
                <h3 class="addfunds-step__title">Scan QR Code with GCash</h3>
                <p class="addfunds-step__desc">Open GCash app → Tap "Scan QR" → Point at the code below</p>

                @if (Model.HasQRCode)
                {
                    <div class="addfunds-qr-container">
                        <img src="@Model.QRCodePath" alt="GCash QR Code" class="addfunds-qr" />
                        <p class="addfunds-qr__hint">Scan this QR code with your GCash app</p>
                    </div>
                }
                else
                {
                    <div class="addfunds-qr-placeholder">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" width="48" height="48">
                            <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"/>
                            <circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5"/>
                            <path d="M21 15l-5-5L5 21"/>
                        </svg>
                        <p>QR code not available yet.</p>
                        <p class="addfunds-qr-placeholder__hint">Please contact admin to set up GCash payments.</p>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>
        </div>

        @* ── Step 2: Upload Receipt ───────────────────────────────────────── *@
        <div class="addfunds-step">
            <div class="addfunds-step__badge">2</div>
            <div class="addfunds-step__content">
                <h3 class="addfunds-step__title">Upload Receipt Screenshot</h3>
                <p class="addfunds-step__desc">After sending money, take a screenshot of the GCash receipt and upload it here</p>

                <form asp-action="AddFunds" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" class="addfunds-form" id="addFundsForm">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

                    @* Screenshot Upload - Auto-scanned for amount & reference *@
                    <div class="addfunds-form-group">
                        <label for="receiptImage" class="addfunds-form-label">Upload GCash Receipt</label>
                        <input type="file"
                               name="receiptImage"
                               id="receiptImage"
                               class="addfunds-form-file"
                               accept="image/png,image/jpeg,image/jpg"
                               required
                               capture="environment" />
                        <span class="addfunds-form-hint">We'll automatically read the amount and reference number from your screenshot. PNG or JPEG, max 5MB.</span>
                    </div>

                    @* Preview *@
                    <div class="addfunds-preview" id="previewContainer" style="display: none;">
                        <p class="addfunds-preview__label">Preview:</p>
                        <img id="previewImage" alt="Receipt Preview" class="addfunds-preview__img" />
                    </div>

                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn--primary addfunds-submit" id="addFundsBtn">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M16.704 4.153a.75.75 0 01.143 1.052l-8 10.5a.75.75 0 01-1.127.075l-4.5-4.5a.75.75 0 011.06-1.06l3.894 3.893 7.48-9.817a.75.75 0 011.05-.143z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
                        </svg>
                        Submit for Processing
                    </button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>

        @* ── Info Box ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── *@
        <div class="addfunds-info">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true">
                <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M18 10a8 8 0 11-16 0 8 8 0 0116 0zm-7-4a1 1 0 11-2 0 1 1 0 012 0zM9 9a.75.75 0 000 1.5h.253a.25.25 0 01.244.304l-.459 2.066A1.75 1.75 0 0010.747 15H11a.75.75 0 000-1.5h-.253a.25.25 0 01-.244-.304l.459-2.066A1.75 1.75 0 009.253 9H9z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
            </svg>
            <div>
                <strong>How it works:</strong>
                <ul>
                    <li>Scan the QR code and send money via GCash</li>
                    <li>Take a screenshot of the GCash receipt</li>
                    <li>Upload it — our system will read the amount and reference number</li>
                    <li>We'll credit your wallet automatically or after quick review</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>

    </div>

</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        (function () {
            'use strict';

            var form = document.getElementById('addFundsForm');
            var btn = document.getElementById('addFundsBtn');
            var fileInput = document.getElementById('receiptImage');
            var previewContainer = document.getElementById('previewContainer');
            var previewImage = document.getElementById('previewImage');

            // Image preview
            if (fileInput) {
                fileInput.addEventListener('change', function () {
                    var file = this.files[0];
                    if (file) {
                        var reader = new FileReader();
                        reader.onload = function (e) {
                            previewImage.src = e.target.result;
                            previewContainer.style.display = 'block';
                        };
                        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
                    }
                });
            }

            // Form submit
            if (form && btn) {
                form.addEventListener('submit', function () {
                    btn.disabled = true;
                    btn.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="16" height="16" class="animate-spin"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 2a.75.75 0 01.75.75v2.5a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0v-2.5A.75.75 0 0110 2zM5.5 10a.75.75 0 01.75-.75h2.5a.75.75 0 010 1.5h-2.5A.75.75 0 015.5 10zm7 0a.75.75 0 01.75-.75h2.5a.75.75 0 010 1.5h-2.5A.75.75 0 0112.5 10zM10 14.5a.75.75 0 01.75.75v2.5a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0v-2.5a.75.75 0 01.75-.75zM3.22 5.22a.75.75 0 011.06 0l1.77 1.77a.75.75 0 11-1.06 1.06L3.22 6.28a.75.75 0 010-1.06zm11.31 1.77l1.77-1.77a.75.75 0 111.06 1.06l-1.77 1.77a.75.75 0 11-1.06-1.06z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg> Processing…';
                });
            }
        }());
    </script>
}

--- Views\Wallet\Index.cshtml ---

}

@section Styles {

            </svg>
            @successMsg
        </div>
    }
    @if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] is string errMsg)
    {
        <div class="wlt-toast wlt-toast--error" id="wltToast" role="alert">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" width="18" height="18" aria-hidden="true">
                <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M18 10a8 8 0 11-16 0 8 8 0 0116 0zm-8-5a.75.75 0 01.75.75v4.5a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0v-4.5A.75.75 0 0110 5zm0 10a1 1 0 100-2 1 1 0 000 2z" clip-rule="evenodd" />
            </svg>
            @errMsg
        </div>
    }

    @* ── Balance cards ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── *@
    <div class="wlt-cards">

        <div class="wlt-card wlt-card--available">

                    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.5 10.5V6.75a4.5 4.5 0 10-9 0v3.75m-.75 11.25h10.5a2.25 2.25 0 002.25-2.25v-6.75a2.25 2.25 0 00-2.25-2.25H6.75a2.25 2.25 0 00-2.25 2.25v6.75a2.25 2.25 0 002.25 2.25z" />
                </svg>
